Name: PPG
Description:
PPG: WE PROTECT AND BEAUTIFY THE WORLD

At PPG (NYSE:PPG), we work every day to develop and deliver the paints, coatings and specialty materials that our customers have trusted for more than 140 years. Through dedication and creativity, we solve our customers’ biggest challenges, collaborating closely to find the right path forward. With headquarters in Pittsburgh, we operate and innovate in more than 70 countries and reported net sales of $15.8 billion in 2024. We serve customers in construction, consumer products, industrial and transportation markets and aftermarkets. 

To learn more, visit www.ppg.com and follow @PPG on X and @PPGIndustries on Facebook, Instagram and Threads.

Name: Sherwin-Williams
Description:
Our mission began more than 150 years ago in 1866 when Henry Sherwin and Edward Williams founded the company in Cleveland, Ohio. The duo went on to shape an industry and create a global legacy. That legacy continues on today as we look ahead and continue to innovate our future. With stores, distribution centers and facilities spanning the globe, we're able to deliver the best in paints, coatings and related products to the world. From our headquarters to our 130 distribution centers and more than 5,000 retail locations, we continue to grow in new and exciting ways.

Here, there's no one path to success. Our 64,000+ employees are diverse, innovative and passionate. Our employees worldwide bring their energy and unique perspectives to each new day. We believe in careers that grow with you and open up new opportunities. With the support of a global team, you can innovate, grow and discover a career where you can thrive and Create Your 𝗣𝗼𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲.

Equal Opportunity Employer of all protected statuses, including disability and veteran.

Name: Jotun Middle East, India and Africa (MEIA)
Description:
We protect steel and aluminium structures so they last longer. We help generate sizeable fuel savings by protecting the hull of vessels. We help prevent oil rigs from rusting in the open sea. We help make your homes beautiful, inside and out. We are Jotun. Jotun Protects Property
 
Established in Sandefjord in Norway in 1926, we put innovation, technology and research at the heart of what we do. Now, with hubs in Malaysia, UAE and China, we rank amongst the biggest paint companies in the world.
 
The Jotun Group is divided into seven regions responsible for the sale of Decorative Paints and Marine, Protective and Powder Coatings. The company has 37 production facilities in 21 countries, 63 companies in 45 countries & is represented in more than 100 countries around the world.
 
The Middle East, India and Africa region consists of operations in Oman, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Morocco, Algeria, India, South Africa, United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Jordan, Syria, Libya and Pakistan, with more than 2,600 dedicated employees, united by an exceptionally strong corporate culture.
 
Our ability to provide a 'Single Source Solution' for all areas of projects that need protection has enabled the company to serve some of the world’s most iconic buildings and projects, including Burj Khalifa and Dubai Metro in the UAE, Kingdom Tower in Saudi Arabia, Bibliotheca Alexandrina in Egypt, and Shangri-La's Barr Al Jissah in Oman, amongst others. Our unique combination of innovation and integrity ensures that Jotun provides the finest products across all sectors such as Education, Hospitality, Residential, Healthcare, Infrastructure and Commercial. That’s why, with Jotun, you can always rest assured that your project will be an inspiration for years to come.

Name: PT Avia Avian Tbk. (Avian Brands)
Description:
Jadilah bagian dari Avian Brands untuk saling berbagi ide, kreatifitas, dan nilai kehidupan untuk jadikan perbedaan #LebihBerwarna. 

Kami menyatukan perbedaan tiap individu untuk mencapai tujuan yang sama. 

Visi kami adalah menjadi perusahaan cat dan material bahan bangunan yang terintegrasi, unggul, ramah lingkungan dan terkemuka di Indonesia.
Melalui jaringan bisnis yang terintegrasi, Anda dapat memilih untuk bekerja di PT Avian Avian Tbk. sebagai produsen cat terkemuka dengan kapasitas produksi 200.000.000 kg per tahun ataupun di PT Tirtakencana Tatawarna, sebagai anak perusahaan dalam bidang distribusi dengan 131 Pusat Distribusi dan 15 Pusat Distribusi Mini baru yang tersebar di Indonesia.

Anda akan dikelilingi oleh pemimpin yang menginspirasi dan rekan kerja yang mendukung. Dapatkan inspirasi, pelajaran, dan keahlian baru setiap harinya. Avian Brands menawarkan lingkungan kerja yang mendukung Anda mengembangkan diri menjadi lebih baik. Dengan semangat terus maju, jadikan pengalaman berkarir Anda #LebihBerwarna bersama Avian Brands. 
Anda akan bekerja dengan merek cat yang dicintai masyarakat Indonesia, seperti No Drop Cat Pelapis Anti Bocor, Avitex Cat Tembok, Avian Cat Kayu dan Besi, serta Supersilk Anti Noda. 

Dapatkan kesempatan untuk melihat masa depan yang #LebihBerwarna dengan kontribusi yang Anda berikan sekarang. Setiap tindakan baik Anda untuk perusahaan, masyarakat, dan lingkungan berpotensi mewujudkan Indonesia yang lebih baik.

Name: PT Propan Raya ICC
Description:
PT Propan Raya, a 100% Indonesian-owned paint company founded in 1979 by Dr. Hendra Adidarma, is a leading Indonesian paint company committed to innovation. Our team of skilled chemists, including local talent with international expertise, develops a range of high-quality paints and building materials to meet market demands.

From wood and rattan finishes, our product line has expanded to include wall paint, metal coatings, flooring solutions, anti-rust coatings, waterproofing, marine paint, aerosol paint, and car refinish paint. Notably, our products carry certifications for quality and sustainability.

With 47 branch offices, 18 service centers, and 5 inspiration centers across Indonesia, we have a widespread presence. Internationally, we operate in countries such as Malaysia, Singapore, Brunei, Thailand, Myanmar, and Vietnam.

Our market segments include retail (19,381 stores), project (residential, commercial, and infrastructure), and industrial (furniture, metal, plastic, marine, and automotive industries).

Key to our success is a commitment to innovation, a dedicated team, and the use of advanced technology like the Rapid Production System (RPS) from our factory. This technology, unique in Asia, supports the creation of environmentally friendly paint products.

Aligned with our mission, we focus on providing value-added paint solutions, building partnerships, developing talent, creating eco-friendly paints, and supporting national infrastructure development.

At PT Propan Raya, our vision is to continue driving innovation and contributing to Indonesia's progress with high-quality paint products.

Name: Terraco
Description:
Established in 1980, Terraco is a leader in the design, formulation and production of environmentally-friendly finishing materials and performance products and systems for the construction industry. We provide innovative, green solutions from our 23 factories across the globe to our customers in over 75 countries. 
 
We pride ourselves on being our customers’ preferred partner and solutions provider for: 
 
•  Architectural Coatings & Finishes
•  EIFS / ETICS / EWI
•  Decorative Finishes & Effects
•  Levellers & Fillers
•  Tiling Solutions 
•  Waterproofing
•  Substrate Preparation & Repair
•  Concrete Repair & Protection
•  Flooring & Surfacing
•  Acoustic Systems
 
A selection of some of our key brands include: Terraco EIFS, Terracoat, Terralite, Styrobond, Handycoat, Sprayplaster, Terrafix, Weathercoat, Flexicoat, Terraroc, Terramix, Addagrip, Flexipave and Ambient.

Name: Kaizen Paint
Description: Kaizen Paint is one of the leading paint manufacturing and distribution companies in the Middle East and North Africa. With a culture of collaboration and teamwork, our colleagues and partners work together across five countries, and four world-class production facilities, to serve our clients and communities.

Name: Mirage Colors
Description:
Chez Mirage Colors, nous sommes spécialisés dans la vente de peintures de haute qualité, offrant une gamme complète de produits adaptés à tous types de projets. Basés à Had Soualem, nous intervenons sur divers chantiers tels que maisons, appartements, villas, bureaux, restaurants, cabinets médicaux, et autres locaux commerciaux.
Nos services :

    Peintures d'intérieur et d'extérieur : Solutions pour tous types de bâtiments.
    Peintures décoratives : Finitions élégantes et personnalisées pour chaque projet.
    Peintures écologiques : Produits respectueux de l’environnement avec des performances optimales.
    Peintures industrielles : Solutions techniques pour des environnements exigeants.
    Revêtements pour sols : Durabilité et esthétisme pour les espaces résidentiels et commerciaux.
    Produits pour bois et métal : Protection et finition sur mesure.

Nous proposons des produits allant de l'entrée de gamme aux finitions de luxe, avec des livraisons rapides (24 à 48 heures) sur l’ensemble de vos chantiers. Nous nous engageons à offrir qualité, innovation, et un service personnalisé pour répondre à tous vos besoins en peinture.

Name: Sinteplast
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina, líder en fabricación y comercialización de pinturas, recubrimientos y materiales para la construcción. 
Con 66 años en el mercado, 13 plantas de producción en Argentina, Bolivia, Uruguay, Brasil y Paraguay, inspiramos hoy y siempre un futuro de #INFINITASPOSIBILIDADES

Name: Asseeb Paints | عسيب للدهانات
Description:
Asseeb Paint Manufacturing Company was founded in 1975 in Torino, Italy, as an importer of high-quality paints. Over the years, the company has grown significantly, driven by the increasing demand for premium paint products in the local market. In response to this demand, Asseeb opened its first manufacturing facility in Diriyah, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, to better serve the region. In 2000, the company further expanded by launching a state-of-the-art plant in the Sudair Industrial Area, increasing production capacity and reinforcing its position in the market.

Asseeb Paints has established itself as a leader in the paint manufacturing industry, renowned for its commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. Over the course of its more than 50 years of operation, the company has consistently delivered products that meet the highest industry standards, catering to both residential and commercial needs.

In 2024, Asseeb Paints reached a significant milestone by transitioning from a limited liability company to a closed joint-stock company, further solidifying its foundation for future growth and long-term success. With a strong legacy of excellence and a dedicated team, Asseeb continues to lead the way in the Saudi Arabian paint industry, contributing to the nation's growth with innovative and reliable solutions.

Name: Teknos
Description:
Welcome to Teknos

Here you can find out how our paint and coating solutions can help your business.

We provide a wide range of paints and coatings for the manufacturing industry, building professionals, and consumers. 

Our commitment to high-quality products and dedicated service has helped us grow quickly. Today, we're in over 20 countries across Europe, Asia, and the USA, with around 1,550 employees. We are one of the leading suppliers of industrial coatings, with a strong presence in retail and architectural coatings.

Our mission is to make the world last longer with smart, advanced paint and coating solutions. We work closely with our customers to create tailored solutions and improve their entire painting process. We don’t just want to sell paint; we want to be your business partner.

Name: Birla Opus Prime
Description:
Diverse product range spanning across exteriors, interiors, enamels, waterproofing and textures for all your project needs.

Outstanding products and solutions that surpass customer expectations, ensuring excellence and satisfaction.

Functionality, longevity, and performance form the core of everything that we build at Birla Opus Prime.

Name: Diamond Paints
Description:
Founded in 1982, Diamond Paints has grown into Pakistan’s No.1 paint brand through innovation, quality manufacturing, and a commitment to excellence. We are the only local company producing our own alkyd resins and powder coatings, offering a comprehensive range of decorative paints, industrial coatings, protective systems, automotive finishes, and specialised solutions.
With a strong nationwide network and a customer-first approach, Diamond Paints continues to set the benchmark for durability, performance, and trusted colour solutions across Pakistan.

Name: Happilac Paints
Description:
Happilac Paints is a brand of KARSS Paint Industries (Pvt.) Limited. The company has held a paramount position in providing paint-related and construction chemical solutions; both nationally and internationally. The founding father of the company; Khawaja Abdul Razak Sikka (late) established the KARSS Paint Industry (Happilac) in 1978. Since then the company has grown and been refined by the dedication of three generations. Starting with a limited product list, the company now has a highly diversified list of products that are being manufactured in its state of the art production facilities.

The decorative and industrial products offer unique paint solutions and have been praised by all our clients. The company has embraced research and development as a prime pillar which has revolutionized the products in terms of quality and customer satisfaction. At Happilac we have a perfect balance of experience and professionalism which allows us to serve our clientele with
unique and innovative paint solutions.

Name: Pacific Paint Indonesia
Description:
Pacific Paint is the pioneer paint manufacturer in Indonesia. Spanning over four generations, Pacific Paint employees over 1,000 and manufactures decorative paints, protective coatings, automotive finishes, heavy-duty and industrial paints of over 30,000 metric tons a year. Over the years, we have formed strong alliances with various international manufacturers such as DIC corporation of Japan (1976), Hempel marine paints of Denmark (1977), BASF of Germany (1978), Carboline of USA, and Transocean Marine paints of Netherlands (1989), which has helped maintained and strengthened Pacific Paint’s foothold in the paint market until today. Our ultimate goal is to continue growing with Indonesia as this country continues to develop rapidly. It has always been the company’s policy to have arrangements on technological exchange with overseas suppliers and paint companies to stay up-to-date with paint technologies and development. Striving to meet and exceed customer satisfaction is the driving force in our pursuit of technological advancements.

Additional info: https://linktr.ee/pacificpaintindonesia

Name: Montana Colors
Description:
All brands take a path and a place in history, as well as they have an original story that provides their authenticity. Our journey began in 1994 in Barcelona when we launched our first spray product. Word quickly spread throughout Europe, and writers and artists began to arrive from France, Germany, Switzerland, and Italy to try it out.

Since then, the Montana Colors has undergone an expansion that has reached more than 80 countries around the world, along with more than 20 official Montana Shop & Gallery points of sale distributed throughout the world: Amsterdam, Bangkok, Barcelona, Brussels, Mexico City, Cape Town, Curitiba, Istanbul, Kuala Lumpur, Los Angeles, Madrid, Marseille, Miami, Monterrey, Montevideo, Montpellier, Montreal, New York City, Nottingham, Porto, Puebla, Querétaro, Santiago de Chile, São Paulo, Seville, Tokyo

Our ability to innovate, attention to detail, total dedication to our customers, commitment to graffiti and concern for the environment are our core values, and these differentiate us from the rest.

Name: Mankiewicz Coating Solutions
Description:
Our tradition: Creating the future

Mankiewicz is a globally operating paint manufacturer, founded 1895 in Hamburg. Nowadays, the Mankiewicz group supplies high-quality coating systems for industrial series production to various sectors, including demanding markets such as Machinery, Automotive, Aviation, Railway, Utility Vehicles, Medical Engineering, Yacht and Wind Power Industry.

The in-house development department permits creation of all paint systems in all color shades, gloss grades and textures, tailor-made for each customer. More than 1.800 employees worldwide are involved in the realization of “Coating Concepts of the Future” to ensure long-term preservation of utility and capital goods. Our products fulfil the wish for the highest quality and continuous proximity to the market and its requirements. 

The high quality of products and processes is ensured by a quality management system, which was established many years ago. Mankiewicz is certified according to ISO 9001, IATF 16949, EN 9100, ISO 14001 and ISO 50001.

Name: Seal For Life Industries
Description:
Seal For Life, part of the Henkel Adhesive Technologies Group, offers the most diversified protection, maintenance and repair solutions in the market. With fourteen distinct brands offering products from self-healing coatings to heat-shrink sleeves, anti-corrosion tapes to liquid epoxy coatings, cathodic protection to intumescent coatings, polymer floorings to pipeline logistic solutions; all around the globe.

We work in a variety of industries including infrastructure protection, renewable energy, water and desalination, energy and commodity pipelines, district heating/cooling, safety and integrity and offshore.

Together we are Protecting The Future.

Name: Grupo Solid
Description:
Marcas: Pinturas Paleta, Pinturas Corona, Pinturas Modelo, Sytec, Transocean, entre otras.
Presencia en Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panamá, República Dominicana y Paraguay

Name: FinishMaster, Inc.
Description:
LKQ FinishMaster is now part of the LKQ family – in the LKQ Refinish Division.  A leading distributor of paint, body, and equipment primarily to the automotive collision repair industry. Our vision is to be the leader in creating value in the automotive and industrial paint refinishing industry by distributing products, services and technology that are recognized by you as key factors in your success. At LKQ Refinish, our customers, our people, and the services, resources, and information we provide are our primary focus.

Founded with a single outlet in 1968, as FinishMaster and acquired by LKQ Corporation in 2023, we have grown to 210+ branch locations in 48 states with major distribution centers across the US. The combined experience of our team members enables us to provide you with the products and services needed to help you grow your business. We provide you the local hometown service with the support of a national footprint. 

Our commitment to top customer service starts with delivering the right products to you, at the right time, every time. Our customer service extends to providing you with the latest products, driving process improvement, inventory management, and technical support through our team of local representatives.

Name: BUTT PAINTS INDUSTRY
Description: Butt Paint Industries is a leading paint manufacturing and distributing brand in Pakistan.The company is serving from past 22 years in Pakistan and its territories. Our brands include Silk paints Omega paints and goldfish paints.

Name: Amchem Products
Description:
High performance, 100% solids (solvent free) polyurethane coatings for steel and concrete in various sectors such as oil and gas, power, water and wastewater, marine, industrial, etc. Our coating, trademarked Purethane, provides exceptional long term protection against corrosion, abrasion, and impact. 

Amchem has two separate divisions for commercial construction sector:

•Drythane Solvent Free Polyurethane Waterproofing Membrane.

•Amshield Deck Solvent Free Polyurethane Parking Deck, Industrial Floor & Clean Room Floor Coatings.

Our products have an 25+ year, multi million square metre track record in North America, Japan, Middle East, Singapore & India. We ship coating materials worldwide from ISO 9001 certified manufacturing facility in Greater NOIDA, suburb of New Delhi, India with a ZERO defect track record.

Name: Sirca Paints India Limited
Description:
Sirca Paints India | Pioneers in premium Italian wood coatings | Blending heritage craftsmanship with innovative technology since 1946 | Creating sustainable luxury finishes that elevate living spaces | Partner to interior designers, architects and discerning homeowners worldwide.

At Sirca, we believe every surface tells a story. For over seven decades, we've been crafting premium Italian wood coatings that transform ordinary spaces into extraordinary expressions of individuality. Our legacy of excellence began in the artistic heart of Italy and continues today as we blend time-honored craftsmanship with cutting-edge innovation. Each Sirca finish doesn't just protect—it elevates, bringing soul and character to the spaces you cherish most.

Name: ACRILEX TINTAS ESPECIAIS S.A.
Description:
A Acrilex foi fundada em 1964 na cidade de São Paulo e, em 1972, teve suas instalações transferidas para São Bernardo do Campo, no Grande ABC Paulista.

Hoje, a Acrilex é considerada a maior fábrica da América Latina no segmento de tintas para manualidades e está também entre as maiores empresas nos segmentos de tintas artísticas e escolares.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: RAK PAINTS LLC
Description: We are UAE based manufactures of High Quality Architectural paints and Industrial protective coatings. We are part of RAK Ceramics Holdings and export our products around the world.

Name: LANCO DOMINICANA
Description: Lanco consta de una amplia variedad de productos que incluye desde pinturas arquitectónicas y acabados para madera hasta adhesivos industriales y selladores de alto rendimiento.

Name: The Pittsburgh Paints Company
Description:
The Pittsburgh Paints Company is a leading producer of interior and exterior paints, stains, caulks, repair products, adhesives, and sealants for do-it-yourselfers and professionals, as well as certain light-duty protective coatings in the United States and Canada. We manufacture and sell some of industry’s most trusted brands including GLIDDEN, PITTSBURGH PAINTS & STAINS, MANOR HALL, OLYMPIC, LIQUID NAILS, HOMAX, TRUEFINISH, MULCO, FLOOD, DULUX (in Canada), and SICO, among others.

Our line-up of residential, commercial and industrial paint brands offers a wide range of choice to meet the varying needs of consumers, interior designers, painting contractors, property managers, developers and architects.

Shop our products at THE HOME DEPOT, WALMART, MENARDS, LOWE’S, independent retailers, and 750+ company stores.

Name: Oscar Paints دهانات اوسكار
Description:
Oscar Paints | Beauty That Lasts For Generations
Saudi Made | Since 2004

Oscar Paints is a leading industrial and decorative paint manufacturer in Saudi Arabia, providing innovative and sustainable solutions for a wide range of applications. Our products cover comprehensive needs for interior, exterior, insulation, and industrial coatings, delivering superior performance in the harshest environments.

We specialize in cutting-edge technologies such as epoxy coatings, anti-carbonation solutions, and coly-polymer emulsion-based products. Aligned with Vision 2030, we are committed to producing eco-friendly and sustainable paints, from economic to premier grades. Our state-of-the-art facilities are governed by a robust quality control department, ensuring our products comply with international standards under the ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ASTM, BSI & OHSAS 18001 certifications.

Oscar Paints continues to lead the industry by delivering high-quality, environmentally responsible, and durable paint solutions that reflect Saudi expertise and innovation.

Name: Enercool
Description:
Expert des solutions cool roof, peintures anti-chaleur.

Réduisez les consommations énergétiques de vos bâtiments et améliorez le confort d'été. 

Gagnez jusqu'à -6° C en intérieur et économisez 40% sur vos factures de climatisation avec une large gamme de produits : peintures, laques, étanchéité.

Protégez vos bâtiments de la chaleur. 

Solution adaptée aux professionnels comme aux particuliers.

Name: Formica Brasil
Description:
Uma marca Formiline. Soluções completas em revestimentos HPL e TFL. Conheça também nossa linha de adesivos.

Essa é uma história com mais de 110 anos, escrita mundialmente. 
Maior fabricante sul-americana de laminados de alta pressão e líder nesse mercado, a Formica possui uma planta produtiva de alta performance em Suzano, São Paulo e oferece vantagens para dois grandes mercados:

Indústria moveleira e marcenaria:
Obedecendo a rigorosos padrões de qualidade e com uma gama de padrões, os laminados Formica são atualizados constantemente, proporcionando aos fabricantes de móveis produtos de alta qualidade com excelente acabamento.

Construção Civil:
Os laminados Formica são amplamente utilizados na construção civil no revestimento de paredes e pisos, sendo ainda aplicados na fabricação de fôrmas para concreto, balanceamento de chapas e produção de divisórias, fachadas etc.

Liderança na América do Sul:
A Formiline é a maior produtora de laminados decorativos de alta pressão e tem a maior participação no mercado da América do Sul. Comercializados sob a marca Formica no Brasil, Argentina, Paraguai, Uruguai, Peru, Bolívia e Chile, e sob a marca Form Plac nos demais mercados.

Name: Futura Tintas
Description:
Somos um fabricante de tintas. Mas não somos apenas um
fabricante de tintas. Tem muito mais do que tinta nas nossas latas!
 
Tem Amor pelos nossos Parceiros, Lojistas e Pintores.
Tem Respeito pelo nosso Mercado.
Tem Fé no nosso Brasil.

Somos movidos por uma preciosa equipe de colaboradores, com uma visão arrojada e humana, engajada em servir, acolher, pesquisar, contribuir para que todo o processo, da fabricação ao resultado da pintura nos ambientes, seja o melhor. Essa inspiração e equipe nos movimentam e constroem nossa história, que temos orgulho em compartilhar.

PRODUTOS COM QUALIDADE:

Nossos profissionais melhoram continuamente a linha de produtos, que além de alto desempenho, possuem todas as certificações dos órgãos reguladores.

RESPEITO PELO MERCADO

Temos uma conduta ética nas nossas relações comerciais, respeitando concorrentes, fornecedores, clientes diretos, consumidores finais e toda a sociedade.

LOJISTAS

Apoio e treinamento de equipes de loja fazem parte do nosso dia-a-dia, melhorando o resultado de equipes. Parceria genuína, que se fortalece numa constante relação ganha-ganha

PINTORES

Agente mais significativo da nossa cadeia, o pintor é peça chave para a pintura ser mais do que colocar cor nos ambientes: ele transforma tinta em beleza, saúde e arte. Investimos grande parte do nosso lucro para capacitá-los a se tornarem profissionais de Alto Valor!

FÉ NO BRASIL

Não deixamos de lado nunca nossa missão de construir um país melhor, mais equilibrado e humano através do programa COLORINDO VIDAS!

Name: British Coatings Federation
Description:
The British Coatings Federation is the UK Trade Association representing the interests of the decorative paints, industrial coatings, printing inks and wallcoverings industries.  

Members are invited to join the main BCF Group.

The BCF's prime functions are:

   To promote and to protect the interests of its members.    
   To encourage the prosperity of the industry.    
   To improve the business climate in which the industry operate.    
   To provide an interface between the industry and the Government, other industry and non-industry organisations, the media and the general public.

Name: Hempel Decorative Middle East
Description:
We are a global team with a local presence, united in the belief that coatings can make our world safer, more colourful, and longer-lasting.

Our mission is to deliver high-quality decorative and coating solutions that add value and colour to our customers' lives, as well as beautify, improve, and protect their most valuable and treasured assets. 

With sustainability at the heart of everything we do, our coating solutions enhance work performance while cutting maintenance costs and increasing efficiency.

Name: GIT Coatings
Description: GIT Coatings (Graphite Innovation & Technologies Inc, www.gitcoatings.com) is a Canadian company developing sustainable graphene-based hull and propeller coatings. With a commitment to delivering environmentally friendly, efficient, and economically viable solutions, the company is helping ship owners achieve sustainability goals by enhancing vessel performance while reducing emissions to air and water.

Name: Paints & Coatings Manufacturers Nigeria Ltd.
Description:
Formely known as PCD Nigeria, Paints and Coatings Manufacturers Nigeria ltd. (PCMN) commenced business in Nigeria in 2001 in Port Harcourt, as the sole distributor of the oil and gas industry's leading brand - International Paints Protective Coatings and Marine Coatings. 

The demand, from discerning Nigerian businesses and individuals, for world-class paints and coatings led PCMN to simply to pursue its vision of providing world class service to its clients in Nigeria, but to succeed in doing so. 

Today, PCMN provides Nigeria with the best that the industry has to offer. We manufacture, market and sell world-class paints & coatings and other services.

PCMN is not merely a supplier of Paints & Coating systems, but a partner committed to working with you to understand your needs and figure out a solution. It's in this spirit that PCMN is proud to aid the fight against Malaria carrying mosquitoes by being the first in the world to bring revolutionary mosquitoe repellent range - Mozzi to Nigeria.

Name: NanoQuinn
Description:
NanoQuinn – The Future of Asset Protection with Unmatched Nanotechnology  

For the first time globally, NanoQuinn introduces 360° All-Surface Asset Protection with an unconditional warranty, setting a new industry benchmark. Our advanced nanotechnology-driven solutions offer unparalleled protection across all asset categories, ensuring long-term durability and sustainability.  

 Metal Protection – Prevents rust & corrosion  
 Concrete & Infrastructure – Advanced waterproofing & durability  
 Electrical Systems – Prevents short circuits & enhances safety  
 Solar Efficiency – Maximizes energy output & panel lifespan  
 Underground Cables – Wear & tear protection for longevity  

and many many more...

Backed by globally certified and unmatched technologies, NanoQuinn is redefining surface protection across industries. As the world moves toward sustainability, nanotechnology is the future of asset protection.  

Join us in revolutionizing the way assets are safeguarded for generations to come.

Name: SIB
Description:
For over 30 years our commitment to our clients, SIB’s purpose is to provide the best fit-for-use coatings and related products, by reducing costs, saving time, and increasing efficiencies.

We sell the biggest paint brands in the world with the support products to
match, and our experts are always available to make sure that our clients experience our added advantage.

Description:

Pan India Delivery 

Walls | Wood | Metal | Heat Resistant Coatings| Fire Retardant Coatings | Enamels | PU | Epoxy | Primers | Sports Court Acrylic Coatings | Black IS 158 | IS 164 Road Marking

Name: PT. Musashi Paint Indonesia
Description:
We are a leader in the technology used to create special paints used in the plastic and metal components of automobile interiors, mobile phones, computers, and consumer electronics.

Musashi Paint Group was founded in 1958. We are now a paint company group that leads the industry with a network of thirteen bases in nine countries, as well as a system that allows us to develop and manufacture the same quality of paint all around the world.

Name: PT KANSAI PRAKARSA COATINGS
Description:
KANSAI PAINT  is the largest paint industry in Japan since 1918, then developed the business in Indonesia since 1977, starting when we were established under the name PT Dayin Prima Paint. Then in 1996 it changed to PT Gajah Tunggal Prakarsa, and in 2012 it changed to PT Kansai Prakarsa Coatings.

Our efforts for more than three decades have now received widespread recognition. Finally, it marked by the awarding of ISO 9001 Quality Management System certificates and ISO 14001 Environment Management System certificates for Paint and Resin units. This certification, which is an international recognition, is proof of our sincerity in doing business and our commitment to always create products that satisfy customers.

To ensure product availability in the market, we maintain the continuity of our distribution network nationwide. There are two distribution systems that we apply to meet different needs. Direct system, dealing directly with consumers from the industrial sector as well as special projects that often require a special specification paint supply. The indirect system relies on cooperation with dealers who are widely spread throughout Indonesia, so our products are easily available to consumers.

The series of high quality paints from KANSAI PAINT are widely used for painting heavy equipment, industrial wood goods such as pianos and furniture, painting floors, to painting heavy duty products that function as a protector against weather changes and corrosion as well as the influence of materials. 

KANSAI PAINT also provides high quality decorative paints, such as various types of wall paints that able to protect and beautify buildings, as well as iron and wood paints with the advantages of fast drying, excellent adhesion and gloss.

Name: Śnieżka
Description:
Jesteśmy jednym z liderów rynku farb dekoracyjnych w Polsce, z historią sięgającą 1984 roku. Nasze produkty trafiają do klientów w kilkunastu krajach, a magazyn branżowy European Coatings Journal sklasyfikował nas wśród 25 największych producentów farb w Europie w raporcie Top25 2024.

Zatrudniamy ponad 1100 osób w czterech krajach, gdzie zlokalizowane są nasze zakłady produkcyjne, a rocznie wytwarzamy około 140 milionów kilogramów farb dekoracyjnych i chemii budowlanej. Nasze marki: Śnieżka, Magnat, Poli-Farbe, Vidaron, Rafil i Foveo-Tech cieszą się zaufaniem klientów w Polsce i Europie.

Od 2003 roku nasza spółka dominująca, Fabryka Farb i Lakierów Śnieżka SA, jest notowana na Giełdzie Papierów Wartościowych w Warszawie. 

Jako członek Polskiego Stowarzyszenia ESG oraz Polskiego Paktu Plastikowego, angażujemy się w odpowiedzialność społeczną i środowiskową. Złoty Medal EcoVadis plasuje nas wśród 5% najlepiej ocenianych firm pod tym względem. 
Dołącz do nas i twórz z nami przyszłość branży farb.

Name: Asian Paints Causeway
Description:
Causeway Paints Lanka Ltd, popularly known as “Asian Paints Causeway” is the market leader in Sri Lanka for all paint categories including decorative and automotive. The Asian Paints Causeway is a 100% subsidiary of the multinational Asian Paints Group which operates in 14 countries and has 26 paint manufacturing facilities in the world servicing consumers in over 60 countries.
Asian Paints Group has come a long way since its small beginnings in 1942 and emerged as India’s preferred paint brand in 1967. It has been India’s largest paint company for almost 50 years and is among the Top 10 decorative paint companies worldwide.
Asian Paints Causeway was established with the merger of two leading paint manufacturing companies in Sri Lanka namely Asian Paints Sri Lanka and Causeway Paints Lanka (Pvt) Ltd in 2021. In 1999, Asian Paints Sri Lanka was established as the first overseas acquisition of the Asian Paints Group and Causeway Paints Lanka (Pvt) Ltd was a Singapore and Sri Lanka joint venture established in 1994. Asian Paints International Pvt Ltd acquired Causeway Paints Lanka (Pvt) Ltd in 2017 and continues its excellence under the multinational Asian Paints Group. With the merger, the company emerged as the #1 Paint Company in Sri Lanka.

Asian Paints Causeway has emerged in the market with the customer-centricity approach and introduced diverse projects such as "Safe Painting Service", to serve consumer needs. We value our consumers with utmost priority and nurture their loyalty.
We are equipped with the best talent & our people are passionate, innovative & work with integrity. We provide an environment that celebrates diversity and values integrity. A dynamic work environment, inspiring leaders, supportive colleagues, and global work exposure which makes life interesting at Asian Paints Causeway.

Name: Haymes Paint
Description:
Born in Ballarat in 1935, Haymes Paint is the outcome of Henry Haymes’ passion to provide quality and innovative paint and coating products to all Australians. Over the years, each family member has taken care to hand on the commitment and passion for crafting quality products. After all, it is our name and reputation on the can.

But that doesn’t mean that we have been resting on our laurels.  We're driven to bring new and innovative products to market, ensuring our customers always have the best. 

We live and breathe our values of individuality, independence and integrity. It's why you can be sure we'll never treat you like a number and never take shortcuts with the quality of our products or our service. We remain committed to supporting other family-owned businesses whether that be the local Paint Specialists and Hardware stores that stock our paint or the professional trade painting contractors who use Haymes Paint every day.

Today our family run business is led by the third generation of Haymes. We are still Australian Made and Owned and based in Ballarat, where it all began. 

With a network of over 50 Haymes Paint Shops and 35 PaintRight stores and partnering with more than 220 independent paint specialists and hardware stockists across Australia, every Australian has the opportunity to experience Haymes Paint.

 Un listino di oltre 300 articoli di produzione propria.

Oltre alla produzione delle referenze con i nostri marchi, offriamo 2 servizi:

 La realizzazione di prodotti a marchio personalizzato per specifiche richieste dei Clienti, curando ogni aspetto “in prima persona” (studio grafico del packaging, produzione personalizzata e consegna del materiale a destino).

 Consulenza online per fornire consigli tecnici sull’utilizzo dei prodotti, grazie alla professionalità ed esperienza del nostro Servizio Tecnico. 

Che cosa ci differenzia dagli altri?
I nostri punti di forza sono:

 Il sistema tintometrico DisTinto che assicura snellezza operativa ed efficienza.
Esso, infatti, permette al Cliente di ottimizzare i costi di gestione del magazzino riducendo le scorte di basi tintometriche e coloranti.

Il laboratorio interno, fondamentale per il controllo delle produzioni e per lo studio e la formulazione dei prodotti nuovi; il tutto nel rispetto delle norme che regolamentano il settore. 

La filiera decisionale e operativa corta che permette di avere maggior controllo delle operazioni e di prendere decisioni rapide per risolvere le esigenze della Rete Commerciale e della Clientela. 

Grazie alla nostra esperienza e competenza, abbiamo oltre 400 clienti attivi sul territorio nazionale e garantiamo una presenza commerciale capillare in tutte le regioni del centro-sud Italia.

 Vorresti altre informazioni?
Scrivici una mail a: info@prismacolori.it
Clicca sul pulsante “Contatta il team vendite” qui sotto.

Name: EFACO Finland
Description:
Nanoshield on lasin pintaan levitettävä lämpöä eristävä pinnoite, joka luo pitkäaikaisen suojan auringon lämpöä ja haitallisia UV-säteitä vastaan.

Nanoshield pinnoite estää 99,9% UV-säteilyä, ja jopa 85% infrapunasäteilyä läpäisemästä lasin pintaa, päästäen silti luonnonvalon sisään.

Nanoshield levitetään lasin sisäpintaan, ja on itsestään tasoittuva eikä näin ollen jätä näkyviä saumoja. 

Talvisin pinnoite vähentää lämpöhukkaa ja kesäisin estää lämpösäteilyn läpäisyn ikkunan läpi.

Pinnoite kestää oikein käsiteltynä lasin pinnassa jopa 20 vuotta säilyttäen tehonsa.

Tutustu mullistavaan, nanoteknologiaa sisältävään ikkuna- ja lasipinnoitteeseen, ja tee älykäs, tulevaisuuden ekologinen valinta kodillesi tai kiinteistöllesi.

Name: SAN DECO USA
Description:
San Deco is a global manufacturer of decorative paints and plasters, providing innovative finishes that unite design, performance, and sustainability. To ensure the highest application standards, we operate the San Deco Design Academy, a training and certification program for applicators and industry professionals. San Deco USA is more than a materials supplier—we are a design partner dedicated to supporting project teams with product guidance, technical support, and inspiration. Name: DEUKORR
Description:

Die DEUKORR GmbH wurde 2020 gegründet. Die Antrieb kam aus der Erfahrung, dass man gemeinsam große Ziele erreichen kann. Dabei steht für uns die Qualität und nicht die Expansion im Vordergrund. Kundenzufriedenheit und Lösungsorientierung haben den höchsten Stellenwert.

Die Einstellung der DEUKORR GmbH gründet auf dem Versprechen, Kundenbedürfnisse in den Vordergrund zu stellen und immer schnell und professionell zur Seite zu stehen. Wir stehen für Flexibilität, schnelle Entscheidungs- und Bearbeitungsprozesse und Sicherheit.

Von der Beratung über die Planung bis zur Abnahme habe Sie es immer mit Profis zu tun. Die Mitarbeiter der DEUKORR GmbH gehören zu den erfahrensten der Branche.

Keine Schnittstellen! Wir decken den gesamten Prozess ab.

Bei Revisionen, Sanierungen, Instandhaltung und für Notfälle – für Ihre Sicherheit 24 Stunden am Tag und 7 Tage in der Woche.

Name: SurfAce Cleantech
Description:
The demand for compostable packaging is surging, driven by stricter regulations on plastics and growing consumer preference for sustainable solutions. However, widespread adoption remains limited due to two key challenges: higher costs and weaker mechanical properties, which prevent bioplastics from fully replacing traditional plastics.

At SurfAce Cleantech, we have developed a biobased composite coating technology that strengthens bioplastic films, enabling packaging to be 30% thinner and more cost-effective—a game-changer for the industry.

Our Mission is Threefold

Name: Prism Coatings
Description:
Prism Coatings Company Introduction

Prism Coatings was founded in 1992 by Muhammad Aijaz. The company is located in Momin Pura Industrial Estate, Lahore, and has been one of the Best Exporter in the paint industry for over 10 consecutive years.
The company has been producing, industrial , architectural coatings and various types of special coatings used in the paint industry. We are the first producer of spray paints of international level quality in Pakistan as well as one of largest manufacturers of polyester car body filler. Our most exporting products are Decorative Paints (Building Paints).
Improving the quality of the products, the company has been able to obtain various International Certificate like ISO 9001:2015 , 14001:2015 , 45001:2018.
Using UpToDate marketing techniques has made a vast breakthrough in the non-oil export industry which has lead the company to become one of the leading paint exporter in the nationwide maintaining most of the percent of the whole paint export with a weekly production capacity of 80 to 100 tones.
Prism Coatings has one of the most modern and well-equipped R&D centers. 
Products are delivered to Central Asia, Middle East, South Asia and African Regions.
Prism Coatings has made its best to ensure its products stands up to International standards and its operations have the least possible impact on the environment.

Innovation is our foundation. Durability is our promise. Sustainability is our mission.

Name: Master Painters and Decorators Association (MPDA)
Description:
Master Painters and Decorators Association (MPDA) is a non-profit association of quality paint and coating contractors. It is dedicated to the establishment of quality standards and quality assurance in the painting and coatings industry. 

The association was originally founded in 1899, was regularized in 1911 and was formally incorporated as a society in 1927. The operations of the society are to be carried on throughout the province of British Columbia and our offices have been located in the greater Vancouver area since inception.
Our members are active primarily in the ICI (institutional, commercial, industrial) sector and in Residential (high-rise, townhouse and larger) developments.

The purposes of the society are to:
Promote the interest of the paint and coatings industry.
Establish the best relations within the trade industry by: 

* Providing information and assistance to individual members, 
* Formulating and establishing ethical business standards, 
* Instituting a program of education and public relations within the industry.

With these mandates, the society produced the first Architectural and Repainting Specification Manuals in the mid 1960’s. These manuals have been used throughout the world for many years and form the basis for many training programs. 

In 1967, an Inspection & Guarantee program had been developed (MPDA Specification Services Inc). 

The MPDA's standards were the basis for the former CGSB's (Canadian Government Specification Board) National Painting Specification. That organization evolved into the Canadian General Standards Board, and the 'core' of that standard continues to be based upon the MPDA Architectural Specification Manual. Both of the original MPDA painting specification manuals are now produced by Master Painters Institute (MPI Architectural Painting Specification Manual and the MPI Maintenance Repainting Manual). See www.mpi.net for further information.

Description:

1: Weathershield is a specialist range of paint for exterior masonry, wood and metal that uses advanced technology to help withstand the elements, so your paint will look better for longer.

2: Super Emulsion - For the most part, emulsion paint is exclusively for interior walls and ceilings. It’s the most common type of interior paint. You can use emulsion paint on previously painted interior walls or newly plastered walls. For newly plastered walls you might want to use an all-purpose primer before your emulsion paint colour, because new plaster tends to drink it in so you’ll save yourself a few coats of colour.

So can you paint wood with emulsion? Ideally no. You shouldn’t really use emulsion paint on wood or metal - there are other paints designed especially for those surfaces that stick better and provide a more hardy finish. One type of paint does not fit all. 

3: Wall putty is a white cement-based powder made of polymer and other minerals that make the wall look smoother. It is primarily used to fill in cracks and holes in walls and prepare an even wall surface before applying paint. Using wall putty helps to provide better protection against stains, mould & cracks for your walls.

Wall putty is a versatile material that can be used on any wall, from precast walls to concrete and even rendered walls, providing the best paint and wall finish. Also referred to as paint putty, wall putt is usually applied before you paint the walls, as this helps better cover up cracks and holes that may otherwise obstruct the smooth application of wall paints. Depending on the surface, it may take 1-2 coats of painting putty coupled with sanding to make the surface ready for new paint.

Depuis sa création, l’entreprise s’est donnée une mission claire : fournir des solutions techniques fiables, durables et adaptées aux réalités du terrain, afin d’aider les professionnels à protéger leurs ouvrages, valoriser leurs réalisations et sécuriser leurs chantiers.

Avec un catalogue de plus de 100 produits et 250 références, PUREPOX couvre l’ensemble des besoins du marché :
• peintures bâtiment (intérieur & extérieur)
• systèmes anticorrosion et revêtements industriels
• époxy, polyuréthane, vernis et spécialités techniques
• étanchéité, imperméabilisation & traitements de surfaces
• solutions pour sols, bois, métaux et bétons
• produits complémentaires dédiés aux professionnels et applicateurs

Grâce à une chaîne de production maîtrisée, un laboratoire intégré, des procédures de contrôle strictes et un réseau de distribution en expansion, PUREPOX garantit une qualité constante, une réactivité élevée et un accompagnement technique personnalisé.

Entreprise pragmatique et ancrée dans son marché, PUREPOX assume son rôle de partenaire des professionnels :
• Assistance technique avant, pendant et après application
• Recommandations produits selon les contraintes de chaque projet
• Formations, démonstrations et visites terrain
• Développement de solutions sur mesure pour les besoins spécifiques

Au-delà des produits, PUREPOX porte une conviction forte : la qualité doit être accessible, et le progrès industriel passe par des solutions locales, fiables et cohérentes avec les exigences actuelles du marché algérien.

Aujourd’hui, PUREPOX continue d’investir, d’innover et de se professionnaliser pour construire un acteur national de référence solide, responsable et tourné vers le long terme.

Name: SynMatter
Description:
SynMatter is a woman owned startup commercializing smart corrosion inhibitors, Smart Particles, that address the numerous economic, environmental and health concerns associated with corrosion, a global trillion-dollar problem affecting everything made of metal. Current corrosion inhibitors deliver insufficient protection and are harmful to people and the environment.
Based on NASA technology, Smart Particles are sustainable replacements that enhance existing coatings, extend their lifetime up to 2-fold and prevent the deterioration of metal structures. They reduce the maintenance cost of ships, oil & gas platforms, bridges, and many other metal assets up to 50% and decrease the downtime associated with repainting. This will deliver the shipping, cruise, defense, oil & gas and infrastructure industries millions of dollars of savings every year. Smart Particles achieve all of this with no heavy metals, poisons or pollutants, improving water and air quality, and protecting people’s health.

Name: Your Partner for Adhesion Technology -TECNADE
Description:
TECNADE GmbH – Your European Partner for Industrial Process Reliability through Advanced Anaerobic Adhesive Technology

With over four decades of engineering excellence in anaerobic adhesives and cyanoacrylates, TECNADE unites German corporate structure with Italian research innovation to deliver solutions that raise operational reliability across global industrial environments.

Our products function far beyond conventional adhesives. They perform as engineered components, eliminating tolerance gaps, chemically stabilizing metal assemblies, and preventing fretting corrosion. As a result, they reduce unplanned downtime and safeguard sustained equipment performance, even under extreme thermal, mechanical, and chemical stress conditions.

Core pillars of mechanical maintenance:

Threadlocking: Permanent resistance against vibration and shock in motors, pumps, and transmission systems.

Thread sealing: Gas-tight, liquid-tight, and pressure-resistant sealing for pipelines carrying gas, steam, water, and aggressive fluids – an advanced alternative to PTFE and hemp.

Retaining compounds: Precision bonding of bearings, bushings, and gears to eliminate clearance and extend the lifespan of critical rotating equipment.

Flange sealing: Reliable sealing of rigid metal flanges, ideal for gear housings, pump casings, and industrial transmission units.

Certified safety and compliance:
TECNADE products meet stringent international standards and are approved by BAM, DVGW, WRAS, and Eurofins, providing confidence for applications where safety and reliability are essential.

Driven by continuous investment in R&D, application engineering, and on-site technical support, we empower our customers to achieve maximum operational efficiency and long-term equipment integrity.

Name: USP COATINGS
Description:
At USP Coatings, we help commercial property owners, facilities managers and business owners across the UK who want their buildings to look better, last longer, and stay protected without unnecessary disruption or huge replacement costs. 

If you manage or own a commercial property, you already know how quickly a building can start to look tired. Faded coatings, weather damage, corrosion, worn metalwork, outdated branding — these issues don’t just affect appearance, they impact reputation, customer trust and long-term maintenance costs.

That’s where we come in.

We know that choosing a company to work on your building isn’t easy. You’re trying to balance safety, appearance, budgets, timelines, and the pressure to keep your business running normally. That’s why we focus on clear communication, careful planning, and solutions that genuinely make sense for your property long-term — not quick fixes.

Our experience spans over 15 years, beginning in the residential spray painting industry and expanding into full commercial and industrial on-site spraying. Today we specialise in services such as cladding spraying, curtain wall spraying, cut-edge corrosion treatment, roof recoating, staircase spraying, shot blasting, and protective coatings including intumescent fire protection. Every project is carried out by trained professionals using durable, long-lasting coatings designed for the realities of UK weather and modern commercial environments.

What our clients value most is how we work: organised, safe, tidy, and always focused on minimising downtime. We plan around your business operations, work out of hours when needed, and prioritise safety on every site. This approach has earned us the trust of national brands including McDonald’s, Tim Hortons, CarShop and FIA.

We believe refurbishment should be more sustainable, more cost-effective, and far less disruptive than most people expect. 

Feel free to reach out for a friendly chat or to arrange a free site survey.

Name: BRICOTEX.PRO
Description:
En el año 2004, Luis González, junto a su hermano y un amigo de toda la vida, deciden fundar la empresa BRICOTEX S.L., con la cual hemos estado desarrollando nuestra actividad durante todos estos años.
Varios son las actividades que se han desarrollado a lo largo de este tiempo, venta de pinturas y accesorios, artículos de bricolaje, textil, decoración y un largo etc...Además de la realización de múltiples y complicados trabajos de reformas en construcción, y de limpieza de calderas en centrales térmicas de todo el norte de España (Gas Natural, Iberdrola, Endesa), donde se han solucionado problemas muy importantes en tiempo récord.
El A.R.I  de León también confió en nuestra experiencia para la rehabilitación de fachadas en todo el casco antiguo de la ciudad, podría seguir muchas líneas más de currículo pero creo que no es necesario.
A partir del año 2.020 la empresa decide dar un salto adelante, pasando a denominarse BRICOTEX WEB S. L., y especializarse en la venta on line para poder dar un mejor servicio a nuestros clientes.
Ahora y dando un paso hacia delante con las nuevas tecnologías, nos decidimos a vender en el comercio virtual todos los artículos que llevamos años comercializando en nuestro BRICOLAJE de León, muchos de los cuales somos fabricantes y a la vez inventores de los mismos.

O Sindiceram atua como representante das indústrias cerâmicas de Criciúma perante autoridades governamentais, órgãos reguladores e outras entidades relevantes e na defesa de interesses do setor, participando de negociações coletivas, contribuindo para a formulação de políticas públicas e buscando soluções para os desafios enfrentados pelas empresas.
Além disso, negocia acordos coletivos de trabalho em nome das indústrias cerâmicas, promovendo o diálogo entre os empregadores e os trabalhadores, visando alcançar um consenso que atenda às necessidades de ambas as partes.
Promove ainda capacitações, treinamentos e cursos para os trabalhadores e empresários do setor cerâmico, e assessoria jurídica aos associados.
A região Sul tem papel de destaque na produção estadual e nacional de revestimentos cerâmicos. 
O Sindiceram conta com oito empresas associadas que são responsáveis por 6,2 mil empregos diretos, com uma produção anual de 125 milhões de metros quadrados.

Painting your home or commercial and industrial properties is important for many reasons. A good paint job beautifies your building inside and out and adds character and personality. More importantly, paint is a primary line of defense against weather, insects, and damage caused by people and animals.
 
We take immense pleasure in the result of every painting project which is why the starting point is so important to us. Choosing the right product for your interior and exterior needs makes an enormous difference.
 
A superior quality paint job will last for years. It means less upkeep and savings in the long term. Paint Pros uses the right products in the right way to do it right first time, so you don’t have to do it again for a long time.
 
Quality paint combined with our experienced and knowledgeable people is a winning formula that has stood Paint Pros in good stead since we started doing business in Johannesburg in 2002.

Description:
Proven Maritime Surface Innovations - Stop Corrosion and Spend More Time in the Water while Protecting your Investment!

Our proprietary technology offers products with the unique ability to create an impenetrable and integrated shield not only on the surface of the material but from within the material as well.  This monomer coating protects the substrate from harsh environments such as corrosion and erosion.

This inseparable shield is the backbone of our marine anti-corrosion protective system. Description:
The forum has been in existence for over thirty years courtesy of the now late John Hannah OBE RCNC,  with the aim of exchanging information and ideas between companies in the manufacturing, application and use of paint and related products in the marine industry.
We welcome new members to the forum, to discuss non-commercially sensitive information.
The forum intends to keep abreast of developments in surface preparation, coating technology, coating application technology and coating disposal technology.
The forum invites discussion regarding consideration to environmental and occupational hygiene impact of all aspects of marine coatings.
We ensure that regulatory authorities are fully informed of the impact of proposed legislations.

Our objectives are ever evolving due to members imparting their concerns and ideas and developments in the industry.

Name: ITS Coatings Pvt Ltd India
Description:
ITS Coatings is a dynamic enterprise with a focussed approach towards traffic safety products and services.

After studying the options available for traffic safety markings in India, we realised that there was a huge demand for high quality markings which the traditional paint companies were unable to cater to as Traffic Paints, is a very niche and specialized product which needs a completely different perspective and expertise, which is not available with most paint manufacturers.

Subsequently, in June 2014, ITS commenced manufacturing of high performance Water Based and Solvent Based Traffic Paints with an eye on the requirements of Airports and Seaports segment where high quality markings play a major role in the safety of man and machine.

With the rapid growth and development in the infrastructure industry in India over the past few years and the number of road development projects coming up, coupled with the traffic density,  safety on roads is of utmost importance. One of the major factors that would help in this direction would be good quality markings with high visibility. Having realised this, we have formulated a range of high quality, cost effective liquid traffic paints especially for Kerb and Road markings.

ITS coatings is associated with Graco, the world leader in the field of traffic paint application equipments. We are perhaps the only company which offers a comprehensive solutions to the Traffic Safety industry with following products catering to all critical applications right from the Airports, Seaports/CFS to Highways, PWD roads, Kerbs, Parking Lots & Cycle Tracks

- High Performance Paint

- Finest Quality Glass Beads

- Latest technology machines for better installation of markings

In the ever changing world of increased travel & safety challenges, we will continue to provide innovative products for the Traffic Safety Sector and strive hard to create awareness of the importance of safety markings and encourage our customers

Sejak awal didirikan, kami memiliki tujuan utama memberikan kontribusi pada bidang pembangunan, sekaligus mampu bersaing dalam pasar yang didominasi produk-produk luar negeri. Masa masa yang kami lalui sejak tahun 1992 memberikan pelajaran yang sangat berarti, sehingga dapat menyempurnakan tekad kami untuk selalu memberikan yang terbaik. Seiring waktu, pengalaman ini menghantarkan TANAL Paint Indonesia menjadi perusahaan yang dapat bersaing dengan memenangkan pertempuran merebut hati dan pikiran konsumen.

Kami menjadi produsen cat yang menerapkan sistem terintegrasi dalam setiap tahap produksinya. Visi kami tentu menjadi pemimpin pasar di industri cat yang dicintai semua orang. Oleh karena itu, misi kami selaras dengan visi kami, yaitu dengan selalu meningkatkan kualitas layanan dan inovasi yang berbasis kepada kepuasan pelanggan.

Berangkat dari kekurangan dan keterbatasan, kini Pada tahun 2019 TANAL paint Indonesia sudah memiliki kapasitas produksi hingga 10.000 ton/tahun dengan 12 titik jaringan distribusi dan 6 titik representative office sampai pada akhir 2019.

Name: PT. SEIV Indonesia
Description:
PT. SEIV Indonesia didirikan sejak tahun 1965 oleh Bapak Husin Suriaatmaja. Mulanya sebagai industri kecil (Home Industry) di jalan Lautze no.32, Jakarta. Dengan produk pertamanya ialah merek "Cat & Dog" diawali sebagai perusahaan pabrik cat, tinta dan thinner milik perseorangan dengan nama Sumber Makmur. Seiring dengan tumbuhnya penjualan thinner "Cat & Dog" dan kapasitas produksi sudah tidak memungkinkan di Jakarta, didirikan pabrik pertamanya di jalan Merdeka no.53, Tangerang. Kemudian mengingat perkembangan pesatnya penjualan, dari perusahaan perseorangan didirikanlah perseroan terbatas (PT) dengan nama PT. Sumber Makmur Bahagia pada tahun 1980 dan untuk penambahan kapasitas produksi didirikan pabrik di jalan Gatot Subroto km 7-8, Jatake, Tangerang. Untuk Head Office dipindahkan ke jalan Gajah Mada no.37, Jakarta Pusat.

Untuk menunjang kegiatan-kegiatan penjualan yang semakin meningkat dan pelayanan kepada konsumen secara lebih baik, maka pada tahun 1981 didirikan perwakilan perusahaan pertama yang berlokasi di Bandung, selanjutnya berkembang di buka perwakilan lainnya seperti Surabaya, Cirebon, Semarang dan beberapa daerah lainnya di luar pulau Jawa serta kantor Head Office dipindahkan ke Harkot Trade Center, Tangerang. Mengingat kuatnya semangat persaingan dan perlunya perkembangan zaman memasuki era pasar bebas, maka pada tahun 2013 perusahaan berganti nama menjadi PT. SEIV Indonesia.

Name: Zinga Mosh Pakistan
Description:
Zinga Mosh Pakistan a subsidiary of Mosh Group is the exclusively authorised partner of Zingametall, Belgium in Pakistan since 2007. Premiers in world class corrosion prevention solution.

ZINGA on-site Film Galvanizing System combines many advantages: an active or galvanic protection, a passive barrier protection and an easy application (just like a paint). In order to offer a galvanic protection, a zinc concentration of at least 92% has to be present in the dry extract. Having 96% of zinc in the dry film, ZINGA certainly meets this condition. 

ZINGA offers an excellent active and passive protection, including:

- The Zinc provides active, cathodic protection through galvanic sacrifice.
- The barrier, provided by both the zinc oxides and the binder ensures a passive protection.

In case of mechanical damages or in case of expansion and shrinking of the metal due to temperature variations, there will be no formation of rust whatsoever.

For more information on ZINGA, please explore our website or contact us.

zinga@zingamoshpakistan.com

Name: Almaplast nv
Description:
Specialist in volgende domeinen : POEDERCOATEN - NATLAKKEN - WERVELSINTEREN.

Al meer dan een halve eeuw presenteert Almaplast (Kontich) zich als dé specialist op het vlak van coating van alle mogelijke objecten in metaal, later ook kunststoffen en MDF. 

Kwaliteit – met oog voor detail – komt altijd op de eerste plaats en wordt gegarandeerd door een modern machinepark, zowel voor voorbehandeling als voor coating. In het najaar van 2017 werd een nieuwe automatische poederlakstraat (power & free) met ultramoderne poederlakcabine in gebruik genomen. Dankzij deze investering werd de capaciteit van de poederlakafdeling verdubbeld.  

Het bedrijf vergaarde de voorbije decennia de nodige expertise in oppervlaktebehandeling en kan als flexibele kmo zowel orders van 100.000 stuks als kleine series van 10 stuks aan. Ongeacht de coatingwijze krijgt elk voorwerp een grondige chemische of mechanische voorbehandeling. Vervolgens brengt Almaplast er de coating aan via het procédé van natlakken, poederspuiten of wervelsinteren.   

Het klantenbestand situeert zich binnen de meest uiteenlopende economische sectoren: de automobielindustrie, de luchtvaart, het openbaar vervoer, de bouw, de medische en farmaceutische apparatuur, de meubelindustrie, de waterwerken, enz.  Almaplast is ISO9001-gecertificeerd.

Name: Mueller Coatings
Description:
Since 1955, Mueller Coatings has been a trusted provider of vacuum metalizing and spray coating solutions, helping customers overcome complex challenges with precision, innovation, and quality. Our expertise has made us a preferred partner for industry leaders across aerospace, defense, medical devices, automotive, and consumer goods.

Companies like Johnson & Johnson, P&G, and Raytheon rely on Mueller for our ability to deliver high-performance coatings that meet stringent cost, quality, scale, and certification requirements. We’ve built a reputation for rigorous quality control, industry compliance, and engineering excellence—ensuring exceptional results for every project.

With nearly 70 years of experience, there are few application challenges we haven’t seen. Our engineering experts are always available to help you navigate the complexities of specialized coating processes—even if you’re starting with just a concept.

Our team specializes in:
 EMI/RFI shielding
 Decorative vacuum metalizing & painting
 Heat shielding
 Highly reflective coatings
 Vapor barriers
 Light reflective coatings
 Functional spray coatings

Mueller Coatings provides customized vacuum metalizing and spray coating solutions across multiple industries. Our in-house experts have deep experience in aerospace, defense, medical devices, automotive, and consumer products.

We stay at the forefront of industry advancements to continuously meet and exceed our customers’ expectations. Mueller Coatings holds industry-leading certifications, including:

 ISO 9001:2015
 AS 9100D
 ITAR Compliance
 ISO 13485:2016

Mueller Corporation is now doing business as (dba) Mueller Coatings. While our name and branding have been updated to better reflect our expertise in coating services, our legal entity, ownership, and leadership remain Mueller Corporation. All agreements, contracts, and legal documents remain unchanged.

- Workshop & PPE

Name: VOLA Group
Description:
About Vola (Quin Global Holdings Ltd)

Vola Group is a trusted adhesive partner and House of Brands, combining innovation, manufacturing, and recycling to deliver proven brands and adhesive solutions across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, supporting safer, cleaner, and industrial applications with closed-loop recovery embedded.

We operate across the UK, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, supplying high-performance adhesive systems into roofing, insulation, flooring, composites, joinery, transportation, and industrial manufacturing.

Our role goes beyond product supply. We help customers reduce waste, simplify compliance, and improve certainty — from early-stage formulation and innovation through to application, training, and lifecycle responsibility.

Vola combines in-house formulation, scalable manufacturing, and deep application expertise with the ability to deliver adhesives in every relevant industrial format, from bulk liquids to aerosols and canister spray systems. This supports OEM and private-label manufacturing, specification-led markets, and high-performance, fire-rated, and low-VOC technologies at both local and pan-European scale.

We are deliberately expanding our brands, manufacturing footprint, and distribution infrastructure across Europe — including the Netherlands, France, Germany, Poland, and Eastern Europe — through disciplined organic growth and targeted acquisitions. The result is a resilient, scalable pan-EMEA adhesive systems platform built for long-term partnership and value creation.

Alongside innovation and manufacturing, we are investing in recovery and recycling infrastructure for aerosol and canister-based adhesive systems across the UK and Europe, embedding circularity into how products are designed and supported.

At Vola, sustainable growth starts with people. Clear roles, practical training, and a culture of trust drive better customer outcomes and long-term recurring value.

The Vola Way:
Innovate. Deliver. Reuse.

Entre os materiais de destaque estão o microcimento, resina, terrazzo, marmorino e epoxy. Cada um desses materiais é cuidadosamente selecionado e trago ao mercado de acordo com os mais rigorosos padrões de qualidade, garantindo durabilidade, resistência e um acabamento impecável.

Wij begrijpen als geen ander dat je product goed en duurzaam beschermd moet worden. Dat is waarom wij sinds 1986 onze unieke ambachtelijke kennis en werkwijze mogen inzetten voor klanten zoals Hörmann, VDL, Isoss, Etna en HSV, Krepel. 

Dit is hoe we dat doen: 

1.	Boek een afspraak/presentatie/rondleiding
2.	We doen een pilot voor je
3.	We starten de samenwerking 

Dus, plan nu je afspraak/presentatie/rondleiding en download ondertussen onze whitepaper.

Zodat je geen afbreukrisico hebt op de kwaliteit van je product, genoegen hoeft te nemen met mindere kwaliteit en lange levertijden.

En in plaats daarvan kunt genieten van onze innovatieve oplossingen die zorgen voor een hoge afwerking van je producten in een prettige samenwerking.

Name: Miracle Reliable Sealants (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Miracle Reliable Sealants (Pvt) Ltd was established in 2017 in Sri Lanka and known as MR Seal. We are the first local manufacturer to introduce a penetrating sealant product range in Sri Lanka. The ideal waterproofing solution for just about any surface as you apply it over your finished floor, it will stop water penetrating via tile & grout and save you all the cost and trouble of having to remove the tiles and address the problem the traditional way. Also it acts as a preventative measure against the deterioration process in tile grout, bricks, concrete, blocks, pavers, stones, rugs, carpets, leather, wood and timber, while preserving the original condition and increasing the lifespan for years to come. The technology of the sealant does not form a surface film or membrane coating. Instead, the sealant absorbs deep into the substrate, internally filling the micro-pores without the need to remove or replace the concerned surfaces.

Natural stone is one of the most beautiful and durable of materials used in construction today. It is unlike any other surface and requires special care and protection to insure a lifetime of beauty and pleasure. Today these sealers are at the forefront of the industry in providing our customers with superior breathable sealers that give outstanding results.

We launched the product in 2017 and our presence in all major Architects, Housing & Construction Exhibition received tremendous feedback. We have won Awards for two consecutive years for the best product in Sri Lanka organized by the Sri Lanka Institute of Architects for 2018 & 2019.

Name: MCU Coatings Saudi Arabia/Bahrain
Description: Bill Brinton (the inventor of moisture-cure polyurethane technology) currently sits on MCU's BOD and was instrumental in the development of MCU's next-generation, thin-film, industrial coating system for harsh environments (C5VH).  In 2019, MCU submitted our newest coating system for testing by world renowned IFO/COT Labs-Holland (Saudi Aramco's preferred lab), where it was applied in only 2-coats, 225 microns total DFT, on RUSTED steel plates that were surface prepared via rotary power tooling (St3).  The result?  IFO/COT awarded MCU a 25-year durability rating!  Unheard of in the industry, which subsequently led Shell Oil to globally approve MCU and specify MCU use on all Shell's offshore platforms in SE Asia.  At MCU, our motto is; "Do it once and forget it!"

Name: MC Oberflächentechnik GmbH
Description:
Seit unserer Gründung im Oktober 2014 in Hamburg haben wir, die MC Oberflächentechnik GmbH, uns als dynamische Unternehmensgruppe in der Oberflächenbeschichtungsbranche etabliert. Unsere Gruppe umfasst vier Tochterunternehmen an verschiedenen Standorten: ALSTAB Oberflächentechnik GmbH in Osterwieck, L&P Beschichtungen GmbH in Hilkenbrook, Timm Lackierungen GmbH in Kiel und zuletzt OZB Oberflächenzentrum Bremen GmbH in Bremen. Mit dieser breiten Aufstellung decken wir ein vielfältiges Spektrum an Branchen ab – von der Bahn und Bundeswehr über die Schifffahrt bis hin zu Landwirtschaft und Windkraft. Diese Vielfalt ermöglicht es uns, spezialisierte Lösungen für eine Vielzahl von Anwendungen zu bieten und unsere Vision, ein führender Anbieter in unserer Branche zu sein, kontinuierlich zu verfolgen.

Unsere Mission ist klar: Wir setzen unsere umfangreiche Expertise ein, um individuell abgestimmte und ressourceneffiziente Lösungen für unsere Kunden zu entwickeln. Dank unserer technischen Exzellenz und strategisch günstig gelegenen Produktionsstandorten können wir schnellen und lösungsorientierten Service direkt vor Ort bieten. Die geografische Nähe zu unseren Kunden ist für uns ein Schlüssel zum Erfolg, da sie es uns ermöglicht, nicht nur den Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden gerecht zu werden, sondern auch einen geringeren ökologischen Fußabdruck zu hinterlassen.

Branchenübergreifend veredeln wir Produkte für den industriellen und gewerblichen Bereich. An unseren Standorten beschichten wir eine Vielzahl von Materialien wie Aluminium, Stahl, verzinkten Stahl, Edelstahl, Kunststoff, Glas und Holz. Unser Leistungsportfolio ist umfangreich und beinhaltet Mechanische Vorbehandlung, Glasperlenstrahlen, Sandstrahlen, Strahlen mit Korund, Chemische Vorbehandlung, Zink-Phosphatierung, Kathodische Tauchlackierung, Pulverbeschichtungen, Nasslackbeschichtung und Montage.

Name: Quantum Light
Description:
Quantum Light aims to revolutionize the world of pigments by creating colours, coatings, pigments, dyes and inks that harness the incredible optical qualities of quantum dots. 

Quantum dots are small particles of crystalline semiconductors, typically core/shell structures that exhibit a property known as quantum confinement. The tremendous quantum yield they exhibit makes Quantum Pigments the next chapter in the history of pigments.

Description:

Reaktive Hotmelts verbinden die Vorteile von thermoplastischen Klebstoffen in der Verarbeitung mit denen von reaktiven Klebstoffen in Bezug auf die Beständigkeit der Verbindung nach der Aushärtung. Sie sind die zukunftsweisende Technologie für zeitgemäße Industrieverklebungen und garantieren eine hohe Produktqualität bei wirtschaftlichen und umweltschonenden Fertigungsprozessen.

ADTRACON bietet Problemlösungen für vielfältige Anwendungen und alle gängigen Applikationsmethoden (Schablone, Walzen- Sprüh- oder Düsenauftrag).

Our success is driven by our pursuit of innovation and excellence, creating the world’s first class, No Mix Automotive Refinish System, a true solvent clear, over base coat system which is revolutionary in that it requires No Mixing.

Today, Concept Paints exports our No Mix Automotive Refinish System to major international markets across the globe, including, New Zealand, Fiji, Russia, the Middle East, North America, South America and Central America which arguably has one of the toughest compliance regulations in the world. 

We continue to evolve our paint systems in our colour laboratory using our specialised chemists and we continually ensure your satisfaction is exceeded at our on-site, quality and control facility. 

As we expand our global market and progress our innovative product range, we do so by proudly supporting and promoting the great Australian story whilst encouraging and contributing to a sustainable environment for the future.

Name: Bioplast | Liquid wallpaper | Textile plaster
Description:
We are a Ukrainian company Dina-Teks LLC, which has existed for over 16 years and occupies a leading position in Ukraine, Europe, Middle East and Asia.
We produce liquid wallpaper and textile plaster Trademark Bioplast in Ukraine.
Liquid wallpaper Trademark Bioplast is an innovative material based on cellulose and textile fibers used for interior decoration of walls and ceilings. The material has proven itself well in rooms with high humidity and in unheated rooms.
A feature of our production is the use of primary materials. Cellulose and textile fibers are the basis of our material. All components that are the part of the mixture are natural and environmentally friendly. The quality is confirmed by the EU Declaration of Conformity.
Advantages Trademark Bioplast combines the best properties of finishing materials: ease of application, heat and sound insulation, air permeability, resistance to negative temperatures, hypoallergenicity. The wallpaper is applied with a single coating, which eliminates the presence of seams, is resistant to microcracks. It`s easy to prepare the wall, it’s possible to repair wall quickly - this is one of the main advantages of Тrademark Bioplast wallpaper.
Our range includes more than 250 articles in different color and texture compositions.
We do not stand still. We are developing and expanding our product line constantly.
Our Company Dina-Teks LLC invites new partners for mutually beneficial cooperation. We provide:
 Affordable working conditions;
 Prompt order execution;
 We provide promotional material and stand equipment
 Quality confirmed by the European Certificate (EC). The material can be used in residential and public buildings, in children's institutions, on people's evacuation routes.
