Name: Specialist Painting Group Ltd
Description:
Specialist Painting Group (SPG) is a trusted international coatings contractor with over 25 years of experience protecting critical infrastructure. Founded in 1997 in Peterborough, UK, we have grown from a small commercial painting company into an industry leader delivering high-performance protective coatings across the UK and Europe.

Our expertise covers:

• Corrosion Protection – Advanced anti-corrosion coatings for steel structures in food processing, oil & gas, petrochemical, marine, rail, flood defence, civil engineering, nuclear, and utilities.
• Passive Fire Protection (PFP) – Licensed applicators of epoxy intumescent systems that safeguard steel against hydrocarbon jet and pool fires.
• Energy & Sustainability Solutions – Innovative grit blasting using recyclable materials to reduce waste and improve efficiency.

At SPG, safety and quality are non-negotiable. Our ICATS-certified engineers and project managers are trained in the latest techniques, ensuring compliance with rigorous industry standards such as RISQS, SafeContractor, and ISO certifications. By combining cutting-edge spray technology with a client-focused approach, we deliver durable, cost-effective, and compliant solutions for every project.

As a family-run business, we value expertise, innovation, and long-term client partnerships. Our mission is simple: to protect, extend, and enhance the life of our clients’ assets through world-class protective coating solutions.

Name: Nieuwe Lagen
Description:
Schilderwerk met maatschappelijke impact & volledige invulling van uw SROI-verplichting

Bij Nieuwe Lagen geloven we dat een laag verf méér is dan alleen afwerking. Wij combineren hoogwaardig binnen- en buitenschilderwerk met een duidelijke maatschappelijke missie: het opleiden en begeleiden van nieuwe Nederlanders naar een duurzaam perspectief als vakbekwaam schilder.

SROI in de schilderbranche? Wij maken het concreet.
Veel opdrachtgevers zoeken naar een praktische en sociale invulling van hun SROI-verplichting. Nieuwe Lagen biedt precies dat: vakmanschap met maatschappelijke waarde.

Wat wij doen:
- Opleiden van statushouders tot professionele schilders
- Vaktraining gecombineerd met taallessen en persoonlijke begeleiding
- Begeleiden naar duurzame uitstroom in de schilderbranche
- Uw factuur telt vaak volledig mee voor uw Social Return-verplichting.

Onze impact in cijfers 
- Gespecialiseerd in binnen- en buitenschilderwerk
- Actief in 5 Bollenstreek-gemeenten
- Vakteam van 8 ervaren schilders, aangevuld met 20 opgeleide krachten in 12 maanden
- 100% SROI-verplichting ingevuld met meetbare sociale impact

Onze diensten
 Professioneel schilderwerk voor particulieren, bedrijven en overheden – snel, vakkundig en met oog voor detail
 Opleiding & werktrajecten voor mensen met een vluchtelingenachtergrond – van eerste kennismaking tot zelfstandig vakman
 Samenwerkingen met gemeenten, woningcorporaties, bedrijven en maatschappelijke organisaties – kwaliteit en impact gaan bij ons hand in hand

Elke laag verf staat symbool voor transformatie – van muren en mensenlevens.

Interesse in samenwerking of meer weten over SROI?
 Mail ons via sroi@nieuwelagen.nl voor een gesprek over maatschappelijke impact en vakmanschap.
 Of vraag een offerte aan via info@nieuwelagen.nl

Trefwoorden:
Professioneel schilderwerk | Binnen- en buitenschilderwerk | Maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen | Vakmanschap | Gemeentelijke samenwerking | Opleiden in de bouw| Sociale impact

Name: maxepoxy
Description:

Our  high-performance polymer composites systems are not only environmentally and user-friendly, they are also highly cost-effective, bringing a better return to your investment while providing protection and repair solutions, maximizing your asset life and efficiency. Whether it's a dry, damp, or immersion emergency reconstructive or a conventional repair project, on any metallic, non-metallic, or concrete substrate, exposed to extreme abrasion, corrosion, or chemical attack, maxepoxy is the right answer.
 
maxepoxy versatile range of application friendly High-performance polymers provides an easy and safe way to rebuild, repair, and protect any surface. Often use for the emergency and quick repair of units affected by cracks, erosion, corrosion, manufacturing defects, cavitation, chemical attacks and others.
 
Used and approved worldwide by the Mining Industry, Steel mills, Pulp and Paper plants, Pipelines, Oil & Gas, Offshore and Petrochemical facilities, and others.

Name: A&A Coatings
Description:
For over 70 years, A&A Coatings has provided thermal spray coatings and applications to a long list of satisfied customers. We have always been at the forefront of the thermal spray coating, and thermal spray application industry. We serve a wide range of industries including the military and defense, electronics, aerospace, and marine industries. We have earned our reputation of high quality results, fast turnaround time & dependable service. 

In addition to providing thermal spray coating services and thermal coating application service, we also do restoration and machining. We can extend the life of critical parts or salvage mismachined parts thanks to our in house grinding, lapping, undercutting, and finishing service capabilities. 

Over the years, we have also developed many proprietary coatings to solve industry specific problems. for example, we developed A706 for the printing industry, MicroCoat semi-conductor, Cerami-Pak for packaging, Wirewear for the wire drawing industry. Our proven record of innovation and cost-effective solutions are sure to meet your business or agency's specific needs.

Clean & Safe Formulas : Our coatings are low-odor and free from harmful chemicals, including carcinogens and reproductive toxins, making them safe for children and consumers.

High Standards & Certifications : We hold top international certifications like Greenguard Gold, EN71.3, IOS-MAT0066/IKEA, CPSIA, REACH, and IKEA standards, ensuring our products meet the highest safety and environmental criteria.
Performance Benefits : Compared to traditional coatings, our water-based solutions dry quickly, resist yellowing, are highly durable, and protect against scratches, all while maintaining vibrant and long-lasting colors.

We are committed to innovation and quality, earning clients' trust worldwide. Whether you're a furniture manufacturer, toy producer, or craftsman, our coatings offer the perfect combination of performance, safety, and sustainability.

Name: LIGNICOAT BBI Project
Description: Sustainability in coatings covers aspects related to energy and resource conservation, waste minimization or efficiency and the use of renewable and non-toxic products. The coatings industry has been driven by regulatory issues to diminish the content of volatile organic compounds to improve indoor and outdoor air quality, shifting from solvent borne systems (still the preferred choice globally) to waterborne ones. However, even in the case of products labelled as “environmentally friendly” their bio-based content is usually small (up to 30-40%). The challenge is to substitute fossil-based resins maintaining at least the same performance. New bio-based value chains are necessary. Lignin is an underutilized product with a high potential to provide not only economic returns, but also environmental benefits if value-added applications are found. Although lignin is a topic of great interest, the conversion of lignocellulosic biomass into real products is not trivial and still no commercial options are available. LIGNICOAT proposal provides new synthetic routes to obtain bioresins “à la carte” (PUD, ALKYD and EPOXY) based on lignin intermediates (Polyols, Epoxies, phosphorylated, polyacids and carbonates) for application in coatings and validated in an industrial relevant environment (TRL5). The target is not only to increase the biobased content and ensure performance, but also take advantage of lignin specific characteristics, to develop bioadditives (enzymes, chitosan, sugars, …), increasing the biocontent and providing anticorrosive, fireproof and antimicrobial/antiviral features in high-volume market case studies. Depending on the intermediates and the resins used, the estimated biocontent of the coatings will vary between 60-90%. A multidisciplinary and complementary consortium consists in 9 industrial partners BARPIMO, VENCOREX, AEP, HEXION, FORESA, BRS, IRIS, ECOAT and AXIA and 4 RTOs, TECNALIA, VITO, VTT, NORCE and ARDITEC.

Name: FreeMe project
Description: The FreeMe project aims to eliminate the use of Cr6+ and Pd from the Plating on Plastics (PoP) process. PoP is the main plating method that introduces metal coatings on plastic substrates, enhancing the wear and corrosion resistance, as well as the visual appearance of the final surface. The current industrial PoP processes, however, are facing disadvantages regarding environmental sustainability, occupation safety, and coatings quality. FreeMe revolutionary approach is based on REACH-compliant chemicals, avoiding toxic compounds, and ensuring long-term sustainability. In particular, FreeMe’s two technologies address the metallization of polymeric (plastic or resins) surfaces without the use of Cr6+ and Pd. The proposed technologies will be applied in three different applications in the automotive, aerospace, and home appliances industries.

Name: Greenkote
Description:
Greenkote is the developer of a patented corrosion-blocking, thermal diffusion coating technology – the Greenkote process. This process is eco-friendly and involves no solvents, heavy metals or acids. Greenkote coatings find many applications in automotive parts, rubber-to-metal molding, mining, oil/gas, fasteners — anywhere corrosion poses a challenge to steel or iron-based components. 

In the Greenkote process, finished metal parts are heated in the presence of proprietary treated zinc alloy powders, causing the powders to vaporize and react with the metal part surfaces. This forms a fully-alloyed zinc-iron surface structure that covers the components conformally – even fine threads, recesses and holes. The resulting coating is metallurgically bonded into the surface, providing exceptional corrosion resistance, increased hardness and strong adhesion to paints and other topcoats. Greenkote can also coat small assemblies of parts that include features such as hinges, and still provide uniform coverage.  

Greenkote is a global provider of industrial coatings and surface modification technologies to a broad range of markets including automotive, mining and construction. Greenkote coating technology is available as a service from multiple Greenkote locations or through our global network of licensed applicators. The company also provides traditional e-coat and powder paint services to the automotive and appliance industries. For full information go to www.greenkote.com.

Name: Almas Fanavaran Giti | GITACE Hotmelt Adhesives

Efficiency and performance are at the core of our operations. We are dedicated to not only meeting but exceeding our customer's expectations. From custom formulations to tailored coatings solutions, Blue River Coatings continues to provide unparalleled customer satisfaction.

Westing has a partnership agreement with AkzoNobel and has in recent years developed into their largest paint distributor in Europe. Through this collaboration, we also deliver ship and industrial paint worldwide.

Our dedicated team of sales representatives along the coast assists customers in the correct choice of painting systems and advice on surface treatment and corrosion protection. We have a common order office, back office, and customer service at Westinghuset, as well as warehouse employees who ensure fast deliveries along the entire coast.

Westing is a subsidiary of Kaston AS and part of Teige Gruppen, which has a wide range of activities in several business segments, including fisheries, shipping, agencies, real estate, and health.

Name: Stonex Surface Design
Description:
Welcome to our texture paint company, where we specialize in creating unique and beautiful finishes for your walls and surfaces using lime plaster and microconcrete. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing high-quality products that not only add texture and depth to your walls but also create a visually stunning and durable finish.

Our lime plaster finishes are made from the finest quality hydrated lime and silica sand, creating a smooth and creamy texture that can be manipulated to create various textures and patterns. Whether you're looking for a rustic, traditional look or a sleek, modern finish, our lime plaster finishes are versatile and can be customized to meet your design needs. Our lime plaster finishes are perfect for both indoor and outdoor applications, and are ideal for homes, offices, restaurants, and more.

In addition to our lime plaster finishes, we also offer microconcrete finishes. Microconcrete is a high-performance, cement-based coating that creates a seamless, polished surface. Our microconcrete finishes are perfect for creating a contemporary, minimalist look that's both stylish and durable. Our microconcrete finishes are available in a range of colors, allowing you to create a custom look that perfectly complements your decor.

At our texture paint company, we pride ourselves on using eco-friendly, sustainable materials that are safe for both you and the environment. All of our finishes are free from harmful chemicals and are low VOC, ensuring that your space remains healthy and free from pollutants.

Whether you're a homeowner, architect, or designer, our texture paint company can help bring your vision to life. Contact us today to learn more about our lime plaster and microconcrete finishes, and let us help you create a truly unique and stunning finish for your walls and surfaces.

Description:
Every successful company begins with a great idea. In the 1970s, the Blanco family began with a simple model yet effective: produce quality products able to exceed consumers’ needs. From their humble beginnings to its present global expansion, the idea has remained intact and continues being their guiding purpose.

The Blanco Group began as a distribution company, small in size, but big on ideas. In little more than 45 years, this family-owned company has become an international enterprise, with 9 state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and 5 major distribution centers with over 1,600 employees, catering to dozens of markets and millions of people in the United States, the Caribbean, and Central & South America.

The product line encompasses a wide array of applications ranging from architectural & industrial coatings and wood finishes, industrial adhesives and high-performance sealants, as well as cement based products such as thin sets, mortars and grouts and automotive products. Every product they make is available to every customer they reach. Thus, The Blanco Group recognizes the importance of reinvesting in its facilities and maintaining a high level of efficiency in its manufacturing processes by counting on the newest and most advanced equipment possible.

The Blanco Group understands the importance of providing their customers with the highest quality products at the best prices. It is the reason behind their drive for improved performance and innovative ideas.

Name: World Coatings Council (WCC)
Description:
For over two decades the World Coatings Council has worked to improve communication and coordinate policy on matters of international concern to the paint and printing inks industry. The council provides a forum for exchange and cooperation on major issues and priorities facing the industry, and has established itself as a global voice for the industry.

History of the World Coatings Council
Over the last several years, common issues facing the paint and printing ink industries on a global level have increased significantly. While it is always a constant challenge for each individual country to manage the myriad of domestic regulations, it has become increasingly difficult to interpret the potential impact of foreign issues. In 1992, in an attempt to improve communication and to coordinate industry policy on matters of international concern, the International Paint and Printing Ink Council (now the World Coatings Council) was formed. The council was established to ensure that the industry, in coordinating the development of policy on international issues, fully discussed and analyzed the global implications. In 2005 the council was granted NGO status from the United Nations Economic and Social Council allowing it to highlight industry issues to the UN and it’s governing body. In 2019, the name of the International Paint and Printing Ink Council (IPPIC) was changed to the World Coatings Council.

- Three Swedish universities: SLU, KTH, and LNU
- Four Gold partners, strongly influencing BioGlue-Centre’s management as members of the Board: IKEA, AkzoNobel, Stora Enso, and Tetra Pak

- Six Bronze partners, participating in all BioGlue-Centre activities, with access to the entire network: Lantmännen, IsoTimber, Masonite Beams, Green Furniture Concept, 2D fab, and Swedish Wood

Name: Alkemis Paint
Description:
Alkemis is the world’s first wellness paint—bringing nature and design together to create healthier, more intentional interior spaces.

As one of the only Cradle to Cradle Certified paints in North America, Alkemis is ethically produced to help customers breathe easier and live more harmoniously.
 
In addition to being C2C Certified, Alkemis Paint is one of the only paint companies in the US that fulfills all five covenants of the Mindful Materials Common Materials Framework and the American Institute of Architects Materials Pledge, a nationwide initiative that has been signed by over 175 architectural firms. The products are contributory to LEED Certification Points, WELL Building Standard Points and the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, and are certified by Parsons Healthy Materials Lab, meeting their rigorous product evaluation requirements.

Formulated using sustainable raw materials and clear quartz as its foundational layer, proprietary mixes of artist-quality pigments and earthen minerals (including hematite, goethite and chromite) are then added to create a high-performing interior paint that supports a holistic lifestyle. 

The omission of plasticizers means that Alkemis products are 100% water vapor-permeable; consequently, mold growth on walls decorated with Alkemis Paint is virtually impossible. Thanks to the groundbreaking mineral binder (which forms a permanent chemical bond between the paint and the underlying substrate), Alkemis Paint is as indestructible as stone and in most cases, will typically give 20+ years of satisfactory performance before repainting is necessary (far exceeding the life cycle of traditional latex or acrylic paints). 

Alkemis paints are unique in that they are free from synthetic pigments, hazardous organic pollutants (HAPs), volatile organic compounds (VOCs), plasticizers/phthalates, preservatives, solvents, biocides, and alkylphenol ethoxylates (APEs)—making the product safe for all living beings.

Name: MOZART EU Project
Description:
METAL MATRIX NANO-COMPOSITE COATINGS UTILIZATION AS ALTERNATIVE TO HARD CHROMIUM

MOZART is an EU-Horizon project involving 15 stakeholders from 8 countries among universities, research institutes, large enterprises, and SMEs. It is based on a multidisciplinary approach for achieving high-quality durable composite coatings as a replacement to hard chromium. The coating solutions will be developed under the principles of the Sustainable and Safe by Design (SSbD) concept based on nickel matrix nano-composite electroplating processes. These types of coatings will cover a wide range of applications and sectors by proper handling of production parameters. Also, they will be free of toxic chemicals and are based on abundant raw materials, and their mechanical properties have already been experimentally proven and are comparable or even higher in relation to the hard chromium coatings. Overall, the MOZART project provides scientific, technological, and societal impact by delivering an SSbD methodology for applying high-quality durable Ni-matrix nanocomposite coatings as a replacement of hard chromium plating, aligned with the twin transformation targets of the European Commission: #Green – based on the REACH compliance materials that will be utilized, the increased energy efficiency of the process, modifications of plating lines for decreasing wastes and increased occupational safety; and #Digital – based on the utilization of AI models and simulation for the identification of optimum parameters of plating in relation to the geometry of the objects that will be plated, leading to savings in raw materials and time.

Description:
Nanoman is a high-technology business offering a wide range of goods to protect surfaces using nanotechnology. Unique and multifunctional surface finishes provide a long lasting protection on a chemical nanotechnological basis.

We are the first and largest company in India to specialise in manufacturing and distribution of nanotechnology based surface coatings. We offer a wide range of nanocoating products for private and professional use.

Nanotechnology, essentially, is the engineering of functional systems at the molecular scale. In its original sense, 'nanotechnology' refers to the projected ability to construct items from the bottom up, using techniques and tools being developed today to make complete, high performance products.

The lotus effect refers to the very high water repellency (superhydrophobicity) exhibited by the leaves of the lotus flower. Dirt particles are picked up by water droplets due to a complex micro- and nanoscopic architecture of the surface, which minimizes adhesion.

This phenomenon has been researched by scientists and is now being reproduced for use as nanocoatings for several surfaces.

These coatings help minimise costs, as they make harmful cleaning techniques practically redundant.

Name: Eco Safety Products
Description:
Eco Safety Products is a manufacturer of bio-renewable coatings & specialty chemicals that replicate performance characteristics of petrochemicals without the hazards. 

Our goal since inception was to not only address V.O.C.'s (volatile organic compounds), it was imperative to improve water based chemistry performance shortfalls without the need for toxic or carcinogenic ingredients. 

We have known that natural plant oils possesses petrochemical attributes for decades, but no one was advancing this alternative chemistry in the paint and coatings industry. So we  created an emulsion chemistry that takes 100% natural agricultural byproducts that are mixed with water to deliver the most sustainable high performance line of paints, stains, coatings, finishes, and specialty cleaners. 

The end results are products that contain zero toxins, zero hazardous air pollutants, zero toxic air pollutants, zero red list chemicals, zero flammable ingredients, and no solvent odors. Our products contain the highest sustainability attributes by using rapidly renewable resource ingredients, recycled content, low emitting materials, and requires no hazardous materials reporting or hazardous materials safety concerns. 

Performance levels are increased by using natural ingredients that act like petrochemicals. When you can achieve solvent characteristics naturally, you don't need to use toxic additives. By creating formulations that reduce the amount of material required, installers can save both labor and material costs. Another important feature is unlike petrochemical or oil based products, our coatings dry within an hour and is free of solvent odors for a safe and fast return to service. 

Our unique chemistry delivers performance and sustainability at a cost that is the same and in most cases less than competitive products in class. Ask us about tips and methods that will help you save time while achieving your project objectives.

Name: Barwa Kielce
Description:
Od 1990 roku zajmujemy się dostawą materiałów lakierniczych oraz technologii dla zakładów stosujących powłoki lakiernicze. 
Oferowane materiały, nasza wiedza i wieloletnie doświadczenie pozwalają zaspokoić zarówno potrzeby produkcji jednostkowej jak i wielkoseryjnej. Jesteśmy dostawcą materiałów lakierniczych dla wielu liczących się producentów pojazdów użytkowych, maszyn oraz sprzętu obronnego. 
Ścisła współpraca z koncernem PPG oraz wysoki standard zarządzania firmą potwierdzony certyfikatami ISO 9001, AQAP 2110 oraz ISO 14001 są gwarantem kompleksowej i wysokiej jakości obsługi klientów.

PRODUKCJA/LOGISTYKA 
W naszej ofercie znajduje się pełna gama produktów PPG przeznaczonych do zastosowania w przemyśle oraz farby do produkcji specjalnej zgodne z normą obronną NO 80-A200. Posiadamy certyfikaty WITI, IK, ICC oraz wdrożony system WSK.
Nasze możliwości technologiczne i doświadczenie pozwalają na produkcję lakieru spełniającego wymagania techniczne stawiane przez Klienta. Podstawowymi kryteriami są: jakość wykończenia, zabezpieczenie antykorozyjne, kolor, ochrona środowiska i cena. 

SZKOLENIA/ POMOC TECHNICZNA 
Wysoko wykwalifikowana kadra specjalistów opracowuje technologie kompletnych pokryć na różnego rodzaju podłożach. Zespół techniczny służy pomocą przy wdrażaniu technologii, organizacji i projektowaniu lakierni. 
Posiadamy własne centrum szkolenia lakierników.

LABORATORIA 
Posiadamy dwa laboratoria: powłok adhezyjnych oraz środowiskowe. 
Dobrze wyposażone i stale rozwijające się laboratoria umożliwiają ciągłą kontrolę jakości materiałów lakierniczych oraz gotowych powłok. 
Jesteśmy w stanie określić odporność antykorozyjną oraz inne własności fizyczne powłoki lakierniczej. 
Odtwarzamy kolory zgodnie ze wzorcami RAL, NCS, BS oraz na podstawie próbki.
Świadczymy usługi doradcze i pomiarowe w zakresie badań środowiskowych. 
Posiadamy certyfikat akredytacji laboratorium badawczego nr AB 1488 wydany przez Polskie Centrum Akredytacji.

Name: SOLTA GROUPE
Description:
Active dans le secteur depuis 1983... La société Solta (Société des Laboratoires de Technologie Appliquée), est spécialisée dans la fabrication de peintures. Au cours de son évolution, SOLTA a su conjuguer ses talents pour transmettre à ses clients des produits à la mesure de leurs besoins à travers des process toujours plus performants et dans le respect de l’environnement.
Entreprise familiale, SOLTA a été reprise en 2010 par l’un de ses salariés aujourd’hui président, Florent Lebayle. Ingénieur en chimie de formulation, il a su donner à SOLTA une impulsion vers l’innovation qui a fait de cette entreprise une référence dans le domaine de l’industrie et de la marine.
Depuis 2010, Solta est en perpétuelle croissance. L’unité de production d’Etréchy de 1000 m², qui emploie 12 personnes, dispose d’une capacité annuelle de production de 600 tonnes de peinture. L’unité de Souzy nouvellement créée de 3000 m² emploie elle 20 personnes et dispose d’une capacité annuelle de production de 1000 tonnes de peinture.
Grâce à ses efforts de développement et de création d’emplois, SOLTA fait aujourd’hui partie du réseau PM’UP sur la région Ile de France. L’objectif de l’entreprise sur la prochaine décennie est le développement à l’export et de multiplier son CA par 3.
Grâce à ses compétences en matière de souplesse, de sécurité, d’approvisionnement et de stockage, SOLTA permet à ses clients de bénéficier d’une disponibilité quasi immédiate de tous les produits.

Description:
At Point Adhesive- a brand name of Chadha Corporation Pvt Ltd.
Evolution is more than just a business term — it’s a philosophy.
For us, evolution means progress fueled by purpose, innovation guided by experience, and most importantly, delivering consistent satisfaction that brings a smile to every customer's face.
At Point Adhesive, we don’t just bond materials — we bond possibilities. As a trusted innovator in high-performance adhesive solutions, we specialise in creating powerful connections that stand the test of time, pressure, and precision.
Since our inception in 1988, we have remained steadfast in our commitment to manufacturing high-quality adhesives that meet the highest industry standards. Our approach is customer-first, and we believe in continuous improvement.
What began as a modest production facility with a daily output of just 450 kilograms has, over the past 37 years, grown into a formidable force in the Indian adhesive industry. Today, we proudly operate with a production capacity of 500MT/month, serving a wide spectrum of industrial and commercial applications with confidence and credibility.
Our success is built on the pillars of consistent quality, innovation, and adaptability. Through an unceasing focus on research and development, we have not only kept pace with rapidly changing technologies but also anticipated market needs, delivering future-ready adhesive solutions that ensure durability, strength, and performance.
Under our flagship brand “Point Adhesive,” we have earned a reputation as a reliable and respected leader in the adhesive market. From furniture, upholstery, automobile, railways, mattress, footwear, and beyond, our products have become the trusted choice for businesses across India and beyond.
With a legacy of trust and a vision for the future, we are not just bonding surfaces — we are building lasting connections.
Driven by science, engineered for strength, and refined through experience, Point Adhesive is where quality sticks.

Name: THERMOROOF
Description:
La société THERMOROOF a développé un revêtement de toiture appelé " cool roofing " qui diminue les coûts énergétiques et la température des bâtiments en réfléchissant la lumière du soleil.
Le cool roofing permet de réduire la température de la toiture et de diminuer la charge de climatisation nécessaire pour refroidir l'intérieur des bâtiments. Cela représente une diminution en moyenne de 6°C des températures à l’intérieur des bâtiments.

Cette solution est élaborée à partir d'un mélange de pigments réfléchissants et d'un liant qui en assure l'application et la durabilité.

En somme, notre revêtement est une solution efficace pour améliorer rapidement l'efficacité énergétique des bâtiments en réduisant les coûts de climatisation, en augmentant la durabilité de la toiture et en améliorant les performances thermiques globales du bâtiment.

Avec la solution THERMOROOF bénéficiez de solutions efficaces.

Name: Servitech Industries, Inc.
Description:
Established in 1988, Servitech Industries, Inc. is a leading applicator of SermaGard and RoBo Coatings in North America. Based in Nashville, Tennessee, we specialize in providing premium coating services to various industries, including automotive, heavy truck, appliance, construction, utility, commercial lighting, and HVAC sectors. Our ISO/TS 16949:2009 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications reflect our dedication to delivering exceptional quality and service.
The SermaGard line offers sacrificial metallic/ceramic and non-sacrificial barrier coatings designed for high-temperature and corrosion-critical applications. Our portfolio includes inorganic ceramic and organic fluorocarbon modified epoxy coatings, known for their salt-spray performance, chip resistance, adhesion, and ductility. These coatings are commonly used in fasteners, stampings for bonded rubber applications, exhaust hanger rods, clamps, spring clips, and specialty nails.
SermaGard's ceramic/aluminum high-temperature capabilities allow for the use of lower-cost plain carbon steel in exhaust system components, reducing the need for expensive stainless steel.
RoBo Coating is a semi-sacrificial system designed for components exposed to oxidizers like bleach, peroxide, and chlorine. This coating addresses stress corrosion cracking in constant tension hose clamps used by automotive manufacturers. Radiator caps, compression springs, pneumatic components, and others benefit from RoBo's unique properties.
At Servitech Industries, Inc., we are dedicated to providing cutting-edge coating solutions that not only meet but exceed industry standards. Our commitment to excellence, backed by decades of experience and a relentless pursuit of innovation, ensures that our clients receive nothing short of the best.

Name: Torres Guma S.L.
Description:
Torres Gumà S.L. es una empresa dedicada al tratamiento superficial y recubrimiento orgánico de todo tipo de piezas metálicas, con amplia experiencia en el sector desde 1986.

Somos un grupo de personas comprometidas con el servicio al cliente, realizando recubrimientos de superficies en piezas metálicas. Convertimos las necesidades de nuestros clientes en el objetivo de nuestro trabajo, buscando la mejora continua, el respeto al medio ambiente, la vigilancia en seguridad y salud como tareas que nos imponemos como sistema para avanzar en nuestro sector. Esperamos con entusiasmo colaborar cada día con más personas que deseen contar con nosotros como colaboradores, respaldados por nuestra historia para llevar a cabo procesos y sistemas de trabajo de alto nivel.

La capacidad de nuestra empresa para llevar a cabo procesos desarrollados completamente por nosotros mismos nos permite ofrecer soluciones integrales para cualquier tipo de pieza y necesidad. Nuestra ingeniería puede diseñar los sistemas adecuados, y nuestro potencial humano proporcionará el trato y los plazos de entrega deseados por ustedes.

Entre nuestras instalaciones, contamos con un laboratorio químico y metalográfico totalmente equipado para realizar ensayos relacionados con el proceso, como el control de espesor.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de tratamientos, como granallado, desengrasado, fosfatado, tamboreo y recubrimiento orgánico/inorgánico por inmersión y centrifugación en masa.

Todos estos tratamientos están destinados a la protección de la pieza metálica, evitando la corrosión y proporcionando un acabado homogéneo que facilita la fricción en el montaje final de la pieza en sectores como la automoción, línea blanca, construcción, etc.

Name: NTD Paints
Description:
With 20+ years of experience spanning multiple industries & business sectors, we are uniquely positioned to tackle the challenges that the paint industry faces. We serve multiple regions ranging from Asia, Africa, and the Middle East, catering to different needs and issues experienced when dealing with paint.

NTD Paints introduces the ultimate sustainable solution to the global paint industry. We offer paint that has NO TiO2, NO VOC, and NO Pesticides. NTD Paints has developed the world’s only substitute for titanium dioxide that is healthy and just as white.

A standard can or bucket of paint can consist of up to 55% water. NTD Paints produces, packages, and transports paint in the form of powder. In doing so, we minimize waste and maximize our water and carbon efficiency. NTD Paints has innovated and solved reoccurring problems within the regional paint industry by introducing NTD White 5.

NTD White 5 is certified and tested by TÜV Rheinland, which confirmed that it complies with the functional and regulatory requirements of the EU Eco-Label.

We pride ourselves in assisting you with thorough consultation regarding current issues that you want to tackle and from there, we work with our team to present you with relevant test results. We strive to be the solution to your ongoing problems with paint and what better way to do that than by providing the most sustainable answer.

In the post war period our business grew quickly, leveraging on the skill of our professional colourists , which attracted a prestigious client list both in the Paint and Automotive industries. 
With our state-of-the-art colorimetric technology and extended production capacity we can now be regarded as one of the global leader in the colour collateral market, counting among our Customers the most important paint manufacturers worldwide.
From the small typography business in Milan to international success; from grandfather to son, so much has changed but not the philosophy at the heart of our company: mindful of our family roots we focus on the future and keep growing together with our customers

Name: Fontana Industrie Vernici
Description:
Fontana Industrie Vernici
Dal 1939 azienda leader nella produzione di vernici stradali.
Un’azienda storica che si è imposta nel mercato della segnaletica stradale orizzontale, affermandosi tra i principali leader italiani del settore.

Nato nel 1939, il marchio "FIV" si è contraddistinto grazie ad esperienza, competenza e dinamismo, che permettono di offrire soluzioni concrete alle esigenze dei clienti, sia privati che Pubbliche Amministrazioni.
Una lunga esperienza e una continua crescita tecnologica sono all'origine di prodotti che coprono tutte le aree di applicazione, studiate per ogni tipo di materiale.

I segnali orizzontali, tracciati sulla strada, sono utilizzati per regolare la circolazione, per guidare gli utenti e per fornire prescrizioni e indicazioni utili per comportamenti particolari da seguire in base al CODICE DELLA STRADA.

Lo scopo principale della segnaletica è la SICUREZZA STRADALE, quindi è essenziale: identificare il tipo di pittura stradale da utilizzare per la realizzazione della segnaletica orizzontale, la cui scelta deve essere ponderata in base al tipo di strada e alle esigenze richieste: trasversale strisce, incroci pedonali o piste ciclabili, frecce direzionali, iscrizioni e simboli, confini di parcheggi o parcheggi riservati, isole di traffico o presagi di ostacoli all'interno della carreggiata, e altro.

Name: KAY-COAT SOLAR HEAT REFLECTIVE COOL ROOF PAINT
Description:
KAY-COAT is 100% acrylic elastomeric latex white Heat Reflective paint / Cool roof paint. KAY-COAT paint film is cross-linked at room temperature, so fast drying of paint is possible as its glass transition temperature, as well as minimum film-forming temperature, is favorable to dry at room temperature. KAY-COAT film is latex elastomeric so it expands in summer and contrasts in winter so has great flexibility.

KAY-COAT Heat Reflective Paint reduces the heat loading in the building and keeps the building`s temperature lower than the outside temperature. It is a versatile product for Cement, Mattel Asbestos, Galvanized roof, terraces, and sidewalls of residential and commercial buildings, factories, warehouses, Godowns, Cold storage, and Water Tanks for effective heat Reflection. 

In the air conditioning area, power saving of up to 20% can be noted during peak summer.

Name: Tirolack Berghofer GmbH
Description:
1981 zieht das kleine Farbenfachgeschäft in der Schwazer Innenstadt ins alte Fabrikgebäude, an seinen heutigen Standort. Dort wird ein neues Geschäftskonzept verwirklicht, um dem Trend der Zeit des Fachmarktes mit genügend Parkplätzen Rechnung zu tragen. Der Name Tirolack wird eingeführt.

Acht Jahre später wird die Idee eines österreichweiten Netzwerks von Qualitäts-Farbenhändlern geboren: die ADLER-Farbenmeister-Geschäfte entstehen. Der ADLER-Farbenmeister Tirolack ist dabei das erste von ihnen und hat seither Vorbildfunktion. Der Pioniergeist ist bei Tirolack auch heute noch zu spüren. Als erste Anlaufstelle für alle Farbfragen punktet das Unternehmen mit der umfangreichen ADLER-Qualitätsprodukt-Palette, bester Beratung und umfassendem Service und entwickelt sich laufend weiter: 2021 wurde das Geschäftsfeld um eine hauseigene Malerei erweitert. Gleichzeitig mit unserem legendären 90-Jahr Jubiläum im Jahr 2024 eröffnen wir unsere Zweigstelle in Brixlegg. Dieser Schritt gibt uns die Plattform, unsere wachsende Kundengruppe im Tiroler Unterland fachkräftig und professionell zu betreuen und kürzere Wege für Stammkunden im Farbenfachmarkt und der Malerei zu ermöglichen.

Name: Corundum Coating & Innovation Pvt Ltd
Description:
Corundum Coating Innovations Pvt. Ltd. (CCIPL) is a specialised surface-engineering company offering advanced zinc-flake, zinc-aluminium lamellar, and cold-dip galvanizing (CDG) coating technologies for automotive, industrial, renewable energy, construction, rail, defence, and engineering sectors. Focused on high-performance thin-film protection, CCIPL delivers durable, OEM-aligned coating solutions for fasteners, precision parts, small metal components, and threaded assemblies operating across C3–CX corrosion categories.

Our capabilities combine automated spray systems, CE-certified dip-spin coating lines, controlled curing processes, and global QA/QC practices, ensuring consistent, repeatable, and high-precision performance. CCIPL’s portfolio includes zinc-flake basecoats, organic lamellar zinc systems, water-based technologies, CDG coatings as HDG alternatives, and engineered sealer topcoats designed for friction control, torque-tension stability, COF accuracy, and chemical resistance. All coatings meet international standards including ISO 10683, VDA 233-102, ASTM F3393, ISO 9227, and ISO 12944.

Our state-of-the-art facility in Sinnar, Nashik features modern machinery, precision curing systems, and a dedicated quality laboratory for salt-spray testing, coating-thickness measurement, adhesion checks, friction testing, and metallurgical evaluation. Each batch follows traceable workflows supported by disciplined process control.

CCIPL is committed to sustainability, PFAS-free chemistry, low-VOC systems, reduced energy use, and near-zero liquid discharge, supporting compliance with ESG, REACH, RoHS, and emerging CBAM frameworks. Through continuous innovation and global collaboration, we deliver reliable, environmentally responsible coating solutions that strengthen modern supply chains.

CCIPL is dedicated to advancing corrosion-protection technology through innovation, engineering excellence, and sustainable manufacturing.

Name: NashGuard Corrosion Defence
Description:
The concept behind NASHGUARD started around 15 years ago with exposure to the offshore oil and gas industry and the corrosion effects of a saline rich and H2S environments and the dangers of abrasive blasting and needle blasting within an ATEX environment. It was at this point where we started investigating chemically activated surface preparation, to explore the market and understand the dangers and issues relating to “rust converters” within any environment.This concept became more apparent in early 2011 with exposure to the power industry, CHP sites and in particular with GIS lines and SPL type circuit breakers. On these sites, environmental breakdown of gaskets continually causes SF6 carrying pipelines and leak, which is an ever increasing problem. This helped guide our focus on both chemically induced iron oxide neutralisation, that does not damage the integrity of seals or gaskets, and the necessity to develop a protective barrier that prevent electrolytes and environmental breakdown of the rubber gaskets and metal components.In 2014 the first evolution of our Passive Corrosion Inhibitor was developed and provided welcome relief to a host of offshore and onshore industrial sites, from oil rigs, to water treatment sites, to DNO sites to chemical manufactures and the growth started. The first steps proved hard, as we had a lot of hoops to jump through, regarding testing and suitability, so we approached "sales" as a slow burner.

As part of the initial 2015 development, we wanted to expand on the PCI and The first step was to conduct in depth analysis and research into what those people on the front end, actually want the general consensus was to develop a complete anti-corrosion system that is user friendly, that does not just mask corrosion, that requires minimal equipment and is safe to use, in any environment.

ALCEA is an Italian family-owned company with a strong focus on the development and manufacturing of quality wood, metal and powder coatings. The products and services for wood coatings include stains, colorants for solid pigmented colors, acrylics, polyurethanes, polyesters, and water-based products for interior and exterior applications. 
Started in 1932, with over 90 years of success.  The strength of ALCEA has always been represented by product research & development, always respecting the environment and safety requirements. ALCEA maintains a state-of-the-art, modern production site in Senago (Milan) - in Northern Italy -   to support its customers around the world with just-in-time production and delivery with local warehousing in North America. The commitment to quality is confirmed by the ISO  9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications.

Please get in touch to discuss how we can help streamline your painting or coating processes.

Name: PEGAFULL
Description:
PEGAFULL es una empresa mexicana que nace hace más de 10 años, después de integrar experiencias globales y técnicas en un proyecto industrial y comercial que conforma nuestra filosofía de UNIÓN y FORTALEZA generando SINERGIA, DESARROLLO y ARMONÍA en nuestra comunidad. Así surge PEGAFULL, empresa que desarrolla, fabrica y comercializa productos y servicios de adhesión y unión.

Creemos en la “ComunUnidad” y colaboramos tanto internamente como con nuestros proveedores, clientes y entorno para fortalecer la eficiencia, calidad y productividad que incremente UTILIDADES y BIENESTAR de todas las partes interesadas.

Buscamos que nuestros colaboradores se desarrollen de manera CREATIVA, PRODUCTIVA y RESPONSABLE para que con su ESFUERZO logremos resultados POSITIVOS, EFECTIVOS y EFICIENTES.

Estamos convencidos que el mundo y nuestro entorno requiere cuidado y conciencia de que todos somos UNO y que debemos vivir en ARMONÍA para lograr un mejor BIENESTAR, es por eso que nuestro compromiso es desarrollar y promover cada vez más el uso de productos y sistemas productivos amigables con el medio ambiente.

En PEGAFULL nos comprometemos constantemente a aprender y mejorar de manera creativa para generar BIENESTAR, por eso somos UNIÓN QUE FORTALECE.

Name: Adheco Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1983, Adheco has proudly supplied the industrial market with quality adhesives, pressure-sensitive tapes and abrasives for over 35 years. 
Our experienced sales team is committed to providing expert service and support, and to working directly with industrial manufacturers to find the optimal solution to every unique bonding problem.  Adheco's 20,000 sq.ft. warehouse holds the largest stock of industrial adhesives, tapes and abrasives in the GTA, and our converting capabilities (rotary die, slitting, steel-rule die, lamination) allow us to customize solutions for your individual needs. 

Our suppliers include 3M, Henkel/Loctite, Scapa, Saint-Gobain, Tesa, Velcro, and Dural to name a few. It is with great pride that we maintain excellent relationships with these world class suppliers, and it ensures that you will receive unquestionable support at all times. Our focus on adhesives, tapes and abrasives remains intact, and everything we do is central to this theme.

Don't get stuck on a bonding application - call the Glue Gurus at Adheco for expert support and world-class service.  That's a commitment we can stick to.

Name: Shield Polymers
Description:
We help maintenance teams win against corrosion and erosion.


__________

Be relentless.

Sounds simple enough. It’s what drives us everyday. When the work feels unbearable. When fear that this crazy idea might never work arrives.

But what does ‘be relentless’ really mean? 

We have a duty...

To honor those before us, many who sacrificed everything, including their lives. 

To provide the same opportunity to those after us.

To perform at the highest level

And too be the example that needs set in the world today.

One of helping those in need, especially those that can do nothing for you.

One of pushing the limits on what you thought was impossible.

One of chasing excellence. 

In your health. 

In your relationships. 

And in your professional career.

There are no participation trophies. We aren’t playing to not lose. 

We’re playing to win.

Go all in. Never give up. Be a force for good in this world.

BE RELENTLESS.

Name: Inesfly Nigeria
Description:
Inesfly Insecticide Paint uses an innovative technology that incorporates different active ingredients (natural products, biocides, etc) into a polymeric microcapsule and is then introduced into our Wall paints. This technology in our products:

• Allows the insecticides to be released in a gradual and slow manner, therefore prolonging the active duration of the ingredients for over 2 years whilst being harmless to humans and pets.

• Contains three active ingredients, thereby tackling the resistance of some insects to certain insecticides.

• Attacks the full cycle of the insect, from the egg/ larvae to the Adult stage due to the presence of insect growth regulator (IGR) in the technology.

• Protects the active ingredients against external factors such as weather and wear.

We provide integrated painting solution to domestic and commercial buildings ensuring our clients confidence and satisfaction with our vibrant and exciting variety of colors to choose from. 

Our experienced network of independent contractors across Africa and Europe and the non toxic nature of our paint makes our product the prime choice for any property investor in the world.

Name: Köber România
Description:
În anul 1991, am început activitatea alături de o echipă dornică de muncă, motivată, definită prin inițiativă și implicare. De-a lungul anilor, am devenit simbolul creativității și al calității, simbol pe care l-am menținut prin muncă și perseverență. Cu un istoric de peste 30 de ani pe piața românească, firma Köber a reușit să se impună prin profesionalism, inovație și eficiență la cel mai înalt nivel.
Numele ”Köber” este asociat cu diversitatea, inovația și calitatea, clienții regăsind în produsele noastre o gamă completă în ceea ce privește protecția și decorarea suprafețelor din lemn, metal și zidărie. Caracterizate prin rezistență și aplicabilitate ușoară, produsele noastre oferă un aspect vizual deosebit și protecție suprafețelor, indiferent de anotimp. Zertifikat Plus, Tencuiala Siliconică, Emailul IDEEA! sau Lacul Ecolac sunt doar câteva exemple din rezultatele muncii și a dezvoltării durabile din firma noastră.
Încă din anul 1996, compania este certificată de către organismul german de certificare DNV-GL privind managementul de calitate și de mediu. Produsele sunt, de asemenea, agrementate și avizate, unele dintre ele având și etichete ecologice recunoscute în Uniunea Europeană.

Name: Engineered Custom Coatings, LLC
Description:
Engineered Custom Coatings, LLC is a comprehensive coatings and chemical manufacturing company dedicated to providing the highest quality, custom-designed, coatings solutions for applications in industrial OEM, building, and specialty consumer market segments. 

Our company name says it all – custom coatings are what we do best. We’ve built our business around the customer with a singular focus on protecting, enhancing, and growing customer products and brands.

We are agile, nimble, and embody a customer-first approach. With over a century of combined company experience, we have developed thousands of unique solutions. The ECC Proven Process - our signature coatings development system - leads the way.

Our coatings are used by the most trusted manufacturers worldwide, from well-known global brands to mid-sized and local manufacturers. Our team of experts understand not only the needs of your market, manufacturing, product, and customer, but also the stringent process of developing coatings for production. 

With two patents and almost 25% of our workforce dedicated to technology, research, and development, we constantly look for new ways to improve coatings production and performance, while being mindful of the environment. 

Whether the business need calls for solvent-borne, waterborne, or UV, we can design a bespoke and complete finishing solution to meet the most demanding product and process needs.

Name: NECAL LLC
Description:
NECAL LLC delivers high-performance pressure-sensitive adhesives coated products for industrial markets such as automotive, appliance, and recreational markets. Leveraging strong partnerships with proven adhesive chemistries, NECAL offers a compelling alternatives to the supply chain - delivering reliable performance with transparent, cost-effective pricing.

Our adhesives are trusted by industrial designers, engineers, and manufacturers worldwide for applications such as brand identification, overlays, panels, appliqué assemblies, anti-slip surfaces, and wall laminates. NECAL products consistently meet or exceed the performance of leading brands, with stable pricing, no hidden fees, and quality. We also offer converting capabilities to ensure products arrive “press ready” at your dock, streamlining your production process.

We prioritize quality, fast lead times, dependable stock availability on well-known items, and responsive technical support—including adhesive testing, tailored product recommendations, and custom formulations when needed. NECAL ensures a smooth transition from other suppliers with side-by-side product comparisons and risk-free sample testing all at no cost to you. 

All NECAL products meet key industry standards including UL, RoHS, and REACH, giving you confidence in both performance and compliance.

Designed for easy application and clean removal, Peeltex products protect surfaces against paint, dust, and debris during storage, transport, and finishing processes—reducing waste, improving efficiency, and saving time.

We partner closely with manufacturers, body shops, and OEMs to deliver customized solutions tailored to specific needs. Whether you're safeguarding high-value assets during production or looking for a green alternative to traditional masking methods, Peeltex offers innovative, reliable, and cost-effective products you can count on.

Sustainability, performance, and customer satisfaction are at the heart of everything we do. Backed by a passionate R&D team and a global distribution network, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of protective coatings while building lasting relationships with our clients.

Learn more about how Peeltex can protect your surfaces—and the planet—at www.peeltex.com.

Name: FarCo
Description:
Farby proszkowe, ze względu na doskonałe właściwości powstających powłok proszkowych, brak rozpuszczalników, niskie koszty aplikacji i wysokie możliwości odzysku, zaliczają się do najlepszych rozwiązań w dziedzinie nowoczesnego i przyjaznego środowisku powlekania powierzchni.

W firmie FreiLacke proces produkcyjny farb proszkowych odbywa się z zachowaniem bardzo wysokich wymogów jakościowych. Wszystkie zlecenia produkcyjne sterowane są, przy uwzględnieniu ilości, przez system planowania produkcji (PPS). Surowce zostają precyzyjnie odważone wedle ustalonych receptur (żywica stała, utwardzacz, pigmenty, dodatki ulepszające, itp.), wymieszane i poddane dyspergacji w ekstruderze, w temperaturze do 130 °C.

Gorący, ekstrudowany produkt zostaje schłodzony w pierwszej fazie procesu, następnie rozdrobniony do postaci „chipsów”, po czym następuje jego zmielenie i frakcjonowanie. Po zakończonym cyklu produkcyjnym farby pakowane są w kartony 25 kg lub big box’y (400kg).

Zoptymalizowany proces technologiczny pozwala na krótkoterminową obsługę klienta, zarówno w przypadku dużych jak i małych zamówień. Najważniejsza dla nas jest pewność dostaw, dopasowanie produktów do indywidualnych wymagań i elastyczność. Z tego względu nasi doświadczeni doradcy techniczni i technologiczni zatroszczą się o optymalne wdrożenie oferowanych przez FreiLacke farb proszkowych na liniach produkcyjnych w Państwa firmach.

A missão da empresa vai além da produção e prestação de serviço; é um compromisso com a segurança viária e a conscientização da população sobre a importância de respeitar as normas de trânsito. Acreditamos que contribuir para um tráfego mais seguro é fundamental para reduzir o número de acidentes em cidades e estradas.

Com uma visão voltada para o crescimento e a excelência, a Incovia expandiu suas operações e, atualmente, atende todo o território nacional por meio da distribuição de tintas. Além disso, oferecemos serviços especializados de sinalização horizontal em diversas regiões, contribuindo para a eficiência e organização do trânsito local.

Na Incovia, buscamos continuamente inovar e aprimorar nossos produtos e serviços, visando sempre à máxima satisfação de nossos clientes e à construção de um trânsito mais seguro e responsável em todo o Brasil.

Name: JordanPaint
Description:
it was started by hussain chemical industry in 2016 .it aim is to provide good paint quality products .The paint product offer by jordan paint are as follow;
Jordan super emulsion
Super Emulsion is an excellent quality emulsion with improved coverage, binding, and finishing. It is specially developed for all interior use, including brickwork, plaster, cement, and wallboards. Super Emulsion may also be used on exterior surfaces, but it is preferred you use Jordan Weather Shield for exterior surfaces.
Jordan weather shield
Weathershields is external paints that protect walls from cracks, debris, and faults.  Their main function is to deflect rain, sun, and even sandstone debris away. Weather shields are recognized for their great quality and strength.
Jordan gloss enamel
Gloss enamel paint dries with a lustrous, smooth surface. It is commonly used on surfaces that must be sturdy, easy to clean, and moisture resistant, such as doors, trim, furniture, and metal or wood surfaces. Gloss enamel is noted for its high shine, giving it a polished, shiny appearance, and it is commonly used in both interior and exterior applications.
It comes in a variety of colors and may be applied to a variety of materials, including wood, metal, and ceramics, and typically requires less coats than matte finishes to obtain an even, glossy surface. Some gloss enamels are oil-based, while others are water-based, and they can be applied with brushes, rollers, or spray equipment.
Jordan plastic emulsion
Plastic emulsion is a form of water-based paint that is widely used on interior walls and ceilings. It's named "plastic" because of the polymer content in the paint, which provides a smooth, long-lasting finish. The emulsion is produced with a combination of pigments, binders (typically acrylic or vinyl), water, and additives, making it easy to apply and quick to dry.
Jordan wall putty
Wall putty is a smooth, thick paste used to cover and fix cracks, gaps, and flaws in walls and ceilings

We strive to be a trusted partner for our customers and within our industry, by providing strong, agile leadership and smart, innovative solutions for the industrial and specialty coatings market.

V Flooring is your go-to expert for professional floor polishing and restoration services. 
With a commitment to quality and attention to detail, we transform dull, worn-out floors into stunning surfaces that enhance the beauty of any space.
Our skilled team utilizes advanced techniques and state-of-the-art equipment to deliver exceptional results,

At V Flooring, we understand that the right flooring can make all the difference. Let us help you create an inviting and polished environment 
that leaves a lasting impression. Experience the V Flooring difference—where your floors reflect your style!

Name: Lafaiete Grupo

São mais de 70 anos de paixão por tintas! 



Amamos tintas, ela está presente em nossas vidas faz muito tempo. No início da década de 50, no interior do nosso Ceará, na cidade de Iguatu, começamos o que hoje já se tornou uma longa história de experiência e trabalho.


Nossa cultura é sustentada com positividade, sabedoria e garra para realizar sonhos de famílias e profissionais. Acreditamos que construir ou reformar é uma forma de transformar vidas! Por isso, estamos sempre dispostos, desde 1953, a prover o melhor para qualquer tipo de obra.

Name: PINVISA Coatings
Description:
Pinturas Villada SKC se creó en el año 2004 dentro del Grupo Julio Crespo.

El Grupo se dedica desde hace más de 40 años a la ingeniería de protección anticorrosiva con empresas repartidas por toda la geografía nacional y que desarrollan su negocio a lo largo de todo el planeta.

PINVISA Coatings nació con la vocación de aportar soluciones de protección para todo tipo de superficies, de forma que las empresas puedan extender la vida útil de sus instalaciones y optimizar así sus inversiones. Desde el principio de su actividad, PINVISA estableció un acuerdo de fabricación con la multinacional PPG (anteriormente Sigma Kalon), de forma que se fabrican en sus instalaciones una buena parte de los productos que la división PMC (Protective and Marine Coatings) de PPG pone en el mercado.

La misión de PINVISA consiste en estar cerca de las empresas que necesiten proteger de manera eficiente instalaciones y activos, tanto propios como ajenos, y proporcionarles los mejores medios para conseguirlo.

El objetivo de PINVISA implica convertirse en el principal suministrador español de soluciones de protección de superficies en el ámbito industrial, apostando por el desarrollo de nuevos productos cada más eficaces y cada vez más respetuosos con el medio ambiente.
Los Valores de PINVISA, incluyen:
- Orientación al cliente.
- Honestidad personal y profesional.
- Compromiso con el desarrollo sostenible.
- Flexibilidad

Name: HAMELIN Peintures
Description:
HAMELIN PEINTURES – Fabricant de peintures depuis 1919

Depuis plus d’un siècle, HAMELIN PEINTURES accompagne les professionnels du bâtiment avec des solutions fiables, performantes et adaptées aux besoins du terrain. Créée en 1919, l’entreprise s’est imposée comme un acteur de référence dans la fabrication de peintures, notamment en produisant pendant plusieurs décennies la célèbre gamme ONIP, reconnue pour sa qualité et sa durabilité.

Forte de son ancrage local et de son savoir-faire historique, HAMELIN PEINTURES a toujours placé au cœur de son activité la proximité avec ses clients – artisans, entreprises de construction et distributeurs – en leur offrant des produits de confiance et un service de qualité.

Aujourd’hui intégrée au sein du groupe ECO’PRISME, HAMELIN PEINTURES apporte son expérience centenaire et son outil industriel pour contribuer à la montée en puissance d’un acteur innovant du secteur. Cette alliance permet de conjuguer tradition et innovation, en associant le savoir-faire historique d’HAMELIN PEINTURES et les technologies de pointe d’ECO’PRISME (vernis et peintures thermiques à base de nanoparticules, solutions énergétiques durables).

Notre ambition : continuer à être un partenaire de confiance pour les professionnels du bâtiment, tout en participant activement à la transition énergétique et à la construction de bâtiments plus durables.

Name: GPC Coatings
Description:
GPC specializes in wood, industrial, and automotive coatings. With facilities strategically located in USA, France, the Middle East, and a robust distribution network spanning over 70 countries.

Established in 1959 by Ishac Corm, GPC has evolved from a family business focused on decorative paints to a leading force in the coatings industry. Under the new visionary leadership GPC shifted its focus to automotive refinish in the late 1970s, reaching new heights in 1994 with the introduction of the GenRock line. Today, GPC is the fastest-growing automotive refinish company, renowned for upholding the highest color accuracy standards and unmatched support.

Beyond automotive coatings, GPC has successfully diversified into Wood and Industrial coatings, meeting the needs of various industries. With state-of-the-art technology, GPC maintains the highest standards in color accuracy, holding ISO quality certification.

Reflecting on its history, our company is dedicated to enhancing customer profitability by providing innovative solutions and support through versatile trainings that span between process optimization courses to management courses. We prioritize our customers’ financial success by providing strategic partnerships, personalized services, and innovative approaches.

Name: ThreeBond International, Inc.
Description:
ThreeBond International, Inc. is a global leader in the development of industrial adhesives and sealants technologies. Our headquarters has been rooted in Cincinnati, Ohio since 1997, but was established in Los Angeles in 1973.  We now have sales and manufacturing across the US, in Mexico, and in Canada.  

ThreeBond International is known for outstanding products and innovative solutions, but our reputation is fortified by our customers' experiences. Our strong principles drive our consistent pursuit of excellence and our unmatched customer service. We partner closely with our clients to meet their needs with a “how can we help” and “what can we do” mindset. 

The ThreeBond Group has been partnering with leading product manufacturers worldwide for over 60 years, helping to advance society through safer, more reliable and more cost efficient solutions.

Name: Granotone
Description:
Granotone is a renowned brand committed to providing high-quality art supplies and architectural coatings, wood coatings, decorative coatings, and textures. Established in 1984 by Mr. Hari Om Singhal, a visionary who believed in the power of artistic expression and practical solutions, our legacy has continued to grow.

We are dedicated to empowering individuals to unleash their creativity and transform their environments. Our wide range of products includes acrylics, metallic paints, and other art supplies, as well as durable tools for home improvement projects.

Name: Meyer PLC
Description:
At Meyer Paints, we are pioneers in the world of transformative coatings. With a rich heritage spanning several decades, we have established ourselves as a leading manufacturer and provider of high-quality paints and coatings.

Our commitment to innovation and excellence is reflected in every product we offer. From our extensive range of interior and exterior paints to specialised coatings for various industries, we strive to deliver solutions that surpass expectations.

We take pride in our meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that each batch of paint meets the highest standards of quality and durability. Our state-of-the-art facilities and advanced manufacturing processes enable us to create paints that not only enhance the aesthetic appeal of surfaces but also protect them from the elements, maintaining their beauty for years to come.

At Meyer Paints, we understand that colour is a powerful tool for self-expression and creativity. That's why we offer an extensive palette of captivating hues, allowing individuals and professionals alike to bring their visions to life. Our colour experts are dedicated to staying ahead of trends and providing inspiration to help you achieve the perfect look for any space.

But our commitment extends beyond the products we create. We believe in fostering strong relationships with our customers, built on trust, integrity, and exceptional service. Our team of knowledgeable professionals is always ready to provide expert guidance, technical support, and tailored solutions to meet your specific requirements.

Whether you're an architect, contractor, designer, or homeowner, Meyer Paints is your trusted partner in the pursuit of superior coatings. Join us as we continue to innovate, transform spaces, and leave a lasting impression with our exceptional paints and coatings.

Experience the Meyer Paints difference and let us paint your world with beauty, quality, and endless possibilities.

Name: Sunlac Paints Limited
Description:
Sunlac Paints Limited stands as a distinguished player in the manufacturing and marketing realm, specializing in Industrial & Automotive Coatings, Auto Refinish Paints, and ED Coating solutions. The company is the proud amalgamation of three robust brands - Sunlac, Colortek, and Powertek - each bringing its unique strengths and expertise to the market.

Rooted in a legacy of innovation and excellence, Sunlac Paints Limited traces its origins to a pioneering parental company, which holds the distinction of being the first in undivided India to produce Ethyl Acetate, a pivotal ingredient in paint formulations, alongside a range of specialty chemicals. Established in 1988, Sunlac swiftly evolved into a Public Limited Company in 2004, cementing its commitment to transparency and accountability in its operations.

Nestled in the northern part of India, Sunlac Paints Limited boasts a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility located in Greater Noida, equipped with cutting-edge technology to ensure the production of superior quality coatings. The company also possesses its own manufacturing facility for Acrylic and Polyurethane Resins, further enhancing its capabilities and reinforcing its position as a significant industry player.

Sunlac Paints Limited serves a diverse clientele, catering to both OEMs and the dealer market segments. Our unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction has earned us a strong and loyal customer base across the length and breadth of India, underpinned by a commitment to delivering exceptional products and services tailored to meet the evolving needs of its customers.

Name: Diamond Vogel
Description: Diamond Vogel is a manufacturer of high-quality paint and coatings based in Orange City, Iowa. Founded in 1926, Diamond Vogel provides coating solutions to the architectural, industrial, farm and home, wood finishes, toll manufacturing, aerosol, and traffic markets.

Name: ST Powder Coatings S.p.A.
Description:

The company, through its sales network, is present across the European Union to which it exports almost 50% of its turnover. 

ST Powder Coatings S.p.A. has been a member of the Elite network of the Italian Stock Exchange since 2017.

Description:

L’entreprise est à la pointe de la technologie dans la fabrication de peintures et colorants, équipée de machines industrielles ultra modernes.
La SAPEC propose une large gamme de produits pour bâtiment et décoration. 
Véritablement à l’écoute des besoins de ses clients, la SAPEC est sans cesse en processus d’innovation et tend à répondre de plus en plus aux besoins actuels et futurs du marché.

Name: Evertree
Description:
Jeune société française innovante, Evertree est créée en 2016 pour développer, produire et commercialiser des solutions adhésives végétales clefs en main, meilleures pour les hommes et la planète. Grâce à ses résines issues de ressources renouvelables et locales, Evertree contribue dans un univers dominé par l’industrie pétro-chimique à la fabrication de matériaux plus durables. Elle a ainsi permis la mise au point du 1er panneau de bois MDF au Monde sans formaldéhyde ni isocyanate, pour des meubles moins toxiques et plus respectueux de l’environnement  

Filiale du groupe Avril, Evertree reçoit en 2021 le prix Solar Impulse et en 2022 celui du prix de l’Eco-conception aux Trophées Industrie Durable de l’Usine Nouvelle. 
----------------------------
About Evertree
Evertree is an innovative French start-up founded in 2016 with the goal of developing, producing and selling turnkey plant-based adhesive solutions that are better for people and the planet. Thanks to our resins made from renewable local resources, Evertree has helped manufacture more sustainable materials in a sector dominated by the petrochemical industry.
We helped develop the first-ever MDF wood panel that is free of formaldehyde and isocyanate, resulting in less toxic, more environmentally-friendly furniture.  

Evertree, a subsidiary of the Avril Group, received the Solar Impulse Award in 2021 and the Eco-design Award at the 2022 Usine Nouvelle Sustainable Industry Awards.

Name: MAKEOVER PAINTS PVT LTD
Description: Makeover Paints is a company established by a team of professionals who are committed to bring a change by launching a product in emulsion paint industry that can fit in budget with a promise of world class finish and look. Our service sections starts with Exterior and Interior Emulsions, Primers,  Wall Putty, Tile Coat, Floor Coat, Texture Paints, Specialty Paints  and extends up to  Water Proofing, Construction Chemicals. In order to ensure a world class quality and durability in our products we are constructively engaged in research and development of advanced polymers at our facility so that we can ensure best quality at competitive rates.

Name: Hentzen Coatings
Description:
Founded in 1923, Hentzen Coatings has grown from a small producer of industrial coatings into one of the largest and most successful independent paint companies in the United States.

Being privately owned has allowed us to focus our efforts on the needs of the industry and on long-term future developments. As a result, we were one of the first companies to begin work on and produce water-borne coatings long before EPA legislation was announced. Our experience and knowledge gained over the years has allowed us to respond quickly to many requirements, and provide our customers with dedicated technical support.

Hentzen continues to be at the forefront of emerging coating technologies as is evidenced by our current concentration on reducing emissions of Volatile Organic Compounds (V.O.C.'s) and the continual redevelopment of environmentally friendly coating systems. We have been active in the Coatings Care program since its inception which has led to the formulation and production of a wide array of high solids and water reducible liquid products. We employ three in-house legal counsel that work closely with our sales and development group to provide our customers with cost effective coating systems compliant with current and anticipated environmental laws.

Name: EFFCO Finishes & Technologies Pvt Ltd
Description:
EFFCO is a privately owned Indian SSI-registered technology company specialising in next-generation smart coating systems for the global surface-finishing and corrosion-protection industry since 2008. With a strong engineering legacy and a research-driven culture, EFFCO develops advanced, thin-film, PFAS-free coating technologies designed for high-performance small metal parts, threaded hardware, and critical fastener applications across automotive, renewable energy, construction, rail, machinery, offshore and general engineering sectors.

Our ECOMET platform delivers a modern, sustainable alternative to traditional hot-dip galvanizing, electroplating, and solvent-intensive coatings. Built on global standards such as ISO 10683, ASTM F3393, VDA 233-102, ISO 9227 and ISO 12944, EFFCO’s solutions focus on long-term durability, low energy demand, water-free processing, and compliance with emerging ESG and CBAM requirements.

Our technology portfolio includes:
• ECOMET Corundum – Zinc-Lamellar / Zinc-Aluminium Flake Coatings for C3–CX categories
• Corundum ONE – Organic Lamellar Zinc for stainless steel and precision hardware
• ECOMET 1000 – Water-based zinc-lamellar coatings for low-VOC global markets
• ECOMET Titanium CDG – Cold-Dip Galvanizing for HDG-equivalent protection
• Corundum PLUS – Hybrid system with Thermo-Diffusion Galvanizing (Sherardizing)
• ECOMET Sealer Topcoats – Friction, torque-tension, COF, and chemical-resistant finishes
• CE-Certified Dip-Spin Coating Plants & Machinery – Scalable production systems

EFFCO operates with a focus on environmentally responsible chemistry, energy-efficient curing, near-zero liquid discharge, and digital traceability, enabling manufacturers across continents to meet modern performance and sustainability benchmarks.

With its commitment to innovation, quality, and global industry standards, EFFCO is shaping the future of corrosion protection for the world’s small metal components and fastener ecosystems.

Name: Surrey NanoSystems
Description:
Vantablack was developed specifically to suppress stray or unwanted light. Manufactured by Surrey NanoSystems, it is an ultra-black, spray-applied coating engineered for exceptional performance across the visible and infrared spectrum. Originally created for demanding aerospace and scientific applications, Vantablack ack achieves extremely low total hemispherical reflectance (THR), absorbing light from all angles to reduce glare and simplify optical system design.

Designed for durability in extreme environments—from low Earth orbit to high-performance automotive systems—the coating maintains its optical performance throughout the lifetime of the sensor. Whether in space or on the road, Vantablack helps eliminate glare, ghosting, and reduced signal-to-noise ratios, ensuring consistently high-quality imaging.

What can it be used for? 
•	Star trackers
•	Laser communication systems
•	Cameras & imaging
•	Calibration plates & thermal sensors
•	Payload baffles
•	Automotive & transportation
•	Defense & security
•	Scientific research & metrology
•	Consumer electronics 
•	Large led screens & billboards
•	Satellite blackening

By suppressing unwanted light, we help customers simplify optical designs, reduce launch mass, and enhance driver safety delivering reliable performance in the most challenging lighting conditions on Earth and beyond.

~ Seller Group, tikinti materialları bazarında uğurla inkişaf edir  Türkiyə və Rusiya istehsalı təmir-tikinti/inşaat üzrə Azərbaycana idxal edirik Tikinti şirkətləri və satış nöqtələri ilə tərəfdaşlıq edirik

- İZOWER Türkiyə istehsalı Almaniya markamız su əsaslı boyaların istehsalına əsaslanır  Bir çox məhsul seqmentimiz var, lakin bu, hətta izolyasiya materialları və kimyəvi maddələr istehsal etməyimizə mane olmur  Boya və izolyasiya materialları, həmçinin kimyəvi maddələr istehsalımız yüksək keyfiyyətli, ekoloji cəhətdən təmiz və sərfəli qiymətədir  Biz həmçinin Türkiyə və Rusiyadan üzlük və izolyasiya materialları idxal edirik, kimyəvi maddələr də Rusiya Federasiyasında istehsal olunur. Ayrı-ayrılıqda, boyalarımızın məşhur və nadir növlərinə diqqət yetirmək istərdim: odadavamlı, termal, antibakterial, anti-kif/rütubət və s. Anbarımızda hidrostop, yanğından biomühafizə, maye şüşə və s. kimi kimyəvi maddələr var.

- Sileks Rusiya istehsalı kimyəvi maddələr zavodu : hidrostop, beton möhkəmləndirici, oqnebioquruyucu, neft sənayyəsi üçün kimya məhsulları v.s.

- KYK Tütkiyə markamız yüksək keyfiyyətli izolyasiya məhsulların istehsalını həyata keçirir.

- Missiyamız insanların həyatını rahat və ətraf mühitin gözəl olmasıdır, məhz bunun üçün inşaat sekroru üzrə irəlləyirik.

 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 – Supplying advanced protective systems to the 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐧 𝐑𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐰𝐚𝐲𝐬

𝐀𝐝𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐏𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐬 – 𝐁𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐭 𝐨𝐧 𝐋𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐜𝐲. 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐓𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐰.
