Name: Eco Waste Solutions
Description:
Eco Waste Solutions: Your Partner in Sustainable Paint Waste Management

At Eco Waste Solutions, we provide a safe, eco-friendly alternative for disposing of toxic paint waste. Our innovative approach converts hazardous paint sludge into recycled products, helping industries reduce their environmental impact.

We specialize in treating industrial sludge from sectors such as manufacturing, pulp & paper, and metal processing. Our tailored chemical treatments effectively remove harmful substances, including heavy metals and microorganisms, ensuring that toxic sludge doesn’t pollute our water bodies or land.

Choosing Eco Waste Solutions means opting for sustainable practices. We prioritize the use of lead and chrome-free raw materials, employ environmentally conscious processes, and generate minimal waste. Our solutions not only conserve resources but also contribute to cleaner air and water.

Make the green choice with Eco Waste Solutions—leading the way in responsible paint waste recycling

Name: SURFEX - UK Exhibition and Conference
Description:
Surfex 2026 - 9-10 June 2026 at the Coventry Building Society Arena, UK. FREE ATTENDANCE.

Surfex is the UK’s only major event dedicated to Surface, Paint and Coatings Technology.

Follow for event updates including when registration opens and speaker and exhibitor announcements.

Got expertise to share and/or products to showcase? Visit our website to learn about presenting and exhibiting opportunities.

—

Organised by OCCA and staged every two years, 
Surfex brings an essential focus to the science and technology behind paints and coatings, as well as the many different types of people who work in the industry.

Featuring a major trade exhibition and an extensive Conference programme, this is the place to update your knowledge and contacts relating to: chemicals and raw materials; inks; resins; adhesives and sealants; protective coatings; paint application and surface preparation; corrosion and construction chemicals; test equipment; and manufacturing plants.

The Surfex Conference Programme has four streams, each with a full 2-day programme:

SURFACING SCIENCE - presents sessions from scientific societies and associations such as OCCA, SIA, The Graphene Council, MTC, PRA, BSF and the Graphene Engineering Innovation Centre.

INDUSTRY INSIGHT - brings you insights on key issues, from leading authorities in the market.

THE CUTTING EDGE - features universities presenting the latest innovations suitable for industry applications.

TECH FOCUS - where our exhibitors and international manufacturers deliver talks on the most recent advancements in products, technologies, formulation methods, and application innovations.

Malco utfører komplette malings. og  tapetseringsoppdrag både i nybygg og ved rehabilitering av eldre bygninger. Vår serviceavdeling er dykltige og effektive ved mindre oppdrag.

Vi har eget sprøyteverksted for behandling av møbler, kjøkken, dører/vinduer og listverk.

Gulvavdelingen dekker hele tjenestespekteret fra gulvoppbygging til ferdig dekke med teppe eller ulike former for belegg. Vi har også lang erfaring i å legge sportsgulv i store idrettshaller. Vi utfører også rehabilitering av eldre og slitte belegg, som er bærekraftig alternativ til utskifting.

Avdeling for fugefrie gulv leverer komplette gulv med epoxy og terrazzo. Terrazzogulv støpes på stedet, men trapper og sokkellister produseres på vårt verksted, og monteres på stedet for en helhetlig løsning.

Vi har dyktige medarbeidere innen sandblåsning på faste installasjoner, der det ikke er egent for demontering og innlevering til verksted.

Malco AS ønsker og være en god samarbeidspartner for alle kundegrupper. 
Vi er en totalleverandør innen våre fagfelt.

Ta kontakt og vil vil imøtekomme dine krav til kvalitet, effektivitet og ikke minst helse, miljø og sikkerhet på best mulig måte.

Malco er del av Håndverksgruppen, som er Nordens største entreprenør innen overflatebehandling. Gjennom søsterbedrifter i Norge, Sverige og Danmark kan vi tilby nasjonalt eiendomsforvaltere en komplett rammeavtale med høy kvalitet og forutsigbare og konkurransedyktige priser.

Name: KraftBauTr
Description:
Merkezi Ankara’da bulunan Varlık Madencilik A.Ş.’nin bir markası olan KraftBau Yapı Kimyasalları, uzun yıllardır yem, gıda, enerji, dış ticaret, madencilik ve inşaat gibi stratejik sektörlerde kazandığı tecrübeyi bir araya getirerek Döşemealtı Antalya’da kurulmuştur.

Şirketimizin kurucuları, faaliyet gösterdikleri tüm sektörlerde öncü bir rol üstlenmiş, yıllara dayanan köklü tecrübeleri ve yenilikçi vizyonları sayesinde Türkiye’nin 500 Büyük Sanayi Kuruluşu arasında yer almıştır.

Geçmişten günümüze kadar devam eden kaliteli ve güvenilir üretimde öncü olma hassasiyeti ile, başta Ankara olmak üzere ülkemizin farklı bölgelerindeki prestijli konut projelerini hayata geçirme birikimini birleştirerek kurulan KraftBau, profesyonel, deneyimli teknik ekibi ve geniş ürün yelpazesi ile sektöre değer katmak için yola çıkmıştır.

Son teknolojiyle donatılmış olan 5000 m² kapalı/açık alana sahip üretim tesisimizde, alanında uzman personelle Ar‑Ge ve kalite kontrol süreçleri titizlikle yürütülmekte olup, yalnızca üretimde değil, inovasyonda da fark oluşturulmaktadır.

KraftBau olarak, Yapıların Gizli Gücü sloganıyla hareket ediyor, kalite, güven ve estetiği bir araya getirerek ülkemizdeki projelerin en güvenilir destekçisi olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Name: Corrocoat Caspian
Description:
For over 50 years, Corrocoat has been offering cost-effective corrosion protection methods, anti-corrosion materials, and its expertise in the engineering restoration of various equipment. Corrocoat has proven experience in solving corrosion-related problems across the industry, operating on five continents from more than thirty locations worldwide.

Corrocoat Limited's subsidiary in Kazakhstan, Corrocoat Caspian, was established in July 2012.

Today, a plant for the production of anti-corrosion coatings has been launched in Kazakhstan, as well as a repair shop for restoring damaged equipment and applying coatings.

The innovative polymer materials produced in Kazakhstan are currently unrivalled in the CIS countries and are composite materials — industrial coatings and paints based on epoxy resins, polyesters and esters with the addition of fillers made from so-called “glass flakes” (microscopic flakes of corrosion-resistant glass reduced to a size of several submicrons), which allows equipment to be restored at a cost less than or equal to the cost of replacing it with new equipment, in many cases offering the best service life, protecting critical structures from corrosion “attacks” by reducing the frequency and volume of repair and restoration work, maintenance, or complete replacement of equipment.

Corrocoat Caspian offers a comprehensive corrosion protection package using advanced coating technology and providing coating application services, as well as restoration of severely damaged equipment.

Name: ecoblaq - it's not paint
Description:
ecoblaq is not a paint - there are no pigments and top layer added; no binder, no fillers, no toxic chemicals, no plastics.

ecoblaq is a molecule manipulation wood colouring method, based on a non-toxic reaction in the wood fibers.

ecoblaq properties:
- No toxic chemicals. 
- No plastics or other petrochemicals.
- Wood in black, brown, grey, yellow, green colours - plus more colours in development.
- Visible wood structure, providing an organic look and feel.
- Lightfast properties.
- Durable, Martindale test up to 100,000 rubs.
- Product can be repaired, re-used, re-cycled, up-cycled.
- Added production value for clients by converting waste wood (due to splints, fungus, colour differences etc.) into a profitable production of organic coloured wood products.

Lacquered wood is classified as toxic waste – the only safe way to get rid of it is to burn it, releasing all the captured CO2 and toxins into the atmosphere, and into our air and soil. In an original tree life, wood dies and starts to rot and takes the CO2 with it into the ground. An ecoblaq treated furniture can be left to rot without causing environmental harm to the environment. We prefer designs made to last – and the ecoblaq treatment will last with it.
Most paint and lacquer contain toxic ingredients such as pigments, binders, organic solvents, heavy metals, but not least petrochemicals (plastics). New research findings have revealed that the global impact of paint on the environment, specifically in relation to plastics, has been significantly underestimated until now.  

- The ingredients in paints are largely made up of plastic polymers, on average 37%.
- According to a new Swiss study, paint is responsible for 58% of all microplastic pollution in our oceans and rivers.
- Nearly all plastic, 99%, is made from fossil fuels. Plastic is among the most significant and rapidly growing sources of industrial greenhouse gas emissions.

Name: Silverstone Cerakote Ltd
Description:
Why Silverstone Cerakote

Cerakote is a high-performance ceramic coating renowned for its exceptional durability, corrosion resistance, and versatility. Applied through a unique process, Cerakote forms a protective layer on various surfaces, including metals, plastics, and ceramics. Its extensive colour palette, comprising over 200 vibrant options, allows for customisation to suit specific requirements. Whether used for automotive parts, industrial machinery, or other applications, Cerakote provides long-lasting protection and enhances both aesthetics and functionality. 

Corrosion Resistance 
Cerakote E-Series out performs its competition in salt chamber and real-world testing. Cerakote lasted 87% longer than Xylan in salt chamber.

Temperature Resistance
When seeking performance, looks, and temperature stability. There is only one coating that stands out.  Cerakote C&V Series resist temperatures of up to 1500°C and withstand heat cycling and thermal shock.

Performance
Cerakote Piston Coat and Microslick manage heat and reduce friction in engines. Piston Coat lowers temperature, minimising expansion and minimising heat transfer. Microslick reduces friction on piston sidewalls, valve stems, and camshaft lobes, while managing heat, porosity, and oil windage.

Heat Dissipation
Cerakote Heat Dissipating Coatings are a line of sub-micron coatings used on applications requiring high thermal conductivity to transfer heat away from the energy source. Typical uses include radiators, engine blocks, transmission cases, heat sinks, intercoolers, and anywhere heat dissipation is needed.

Name: Classidur
Description:
Depuis des décennies, Classidur s’impose comme une référence incontournable de la peinture au Swiss design, reconnue pour son innovation, sa performance et sa fiabilité. Notre mission : développer des peintures innovantes qui allient durabilité, performance et confort d’application, afin de faciliter le quotidien des peintres professionnels et d’assurer des finitions impeccables.

Inspirée par son histoire, Classidur a toujours repoussé les frontières de la technologie de la peinture avec des innovations comme l’Aqua-Cationic et l’ Hybrid-Cationic.  La marque invente des procédés qui simplifient l’application, renforcent la durabilité et offrent une performance maîtrisée.

Un rayonnement européen : si Classidur est solidement implantée en Suisse à travers le réseau de 13 magasins Classidur Jallut, elle est aussi distribuée à l’international, notamment dans le Bénélux, en France, en Allemagne et en Autriche, via plus de 200 distributeurs et 1 000 points de vente.

Ce qui nous distingue :
• Le Swiss design, synonyme de qualité, de confiance et de fiabilité, reconnu à l’international.
• Une expertise technique reconnue, qui garantit des produits performants, durables et adaptés aux contraintes du bâtiment, en neuf comme en rénovation.
• Un engagement constant en matière de qualité et d’innovation, fidèle aux valeurs suisses de précision et de rigueur.

Sur cette page LinkedIn, découvrez l’actualité de la marque Classidur à travers ses innovations et lancements produits, des exemples de réalisations, ainsi que des conseils pratiques.

Name: BLUECOAT consortium
Description:
BLUECOAT aims to develop bio-based, low-carbon coating formulations specifically designed for the marine, textile and construction industry, using materials such as biopolymers, natural fibres and plant proteins. The project’s coatings will deliver antifouling and anti-corrosion for ship hulls, antimicrobial durability for outdoor garments and flame-retardant, antifungal properties for insulation boards. BLUECOAT pioneers safe and sustainable by design criteria, and explores recyclability and biodegradability, providing viable and eco-friendly solutions for the future.

This project is supported by the Circular Bio-based Europe Joint Undertaking (CBE-JU) and its members under Grant Agreement No. 101213072, and the Swiss partners have received national funding from the Swiss State Secretariat for Education Research and Innovation (SERI).

El trabajo es sinónimo de pasión en Comex, y la piedra angular de nuestro promesa de ofrecer los más altos niveles de experiencia y servicio a través del talento que caracteriza a nuestra gente. 

Por ello, estamos en constante búsqueda de personas comprometidas e innovadoras como tú. Si eres alguien que se esfuerza por superar las metas, te gusta trabajar en equipo y pones en práctica tu talento creativo para conseguir los mejores resultados, queremos conocerte.

Kalite ve müşteri memnuniyetiyle birlikte, çevreye ve insan sağlığına olan sorumluluğumuzu da önemsiyoruz. Çevresel politikalarımız ve insan sağlığını gözeterek işlerimizi yürütüyoruz. Sürdürülebilir uygulamalar ve çevre dostu ürünler kullanarak, olumsuz çevresel etkiyi en aza indirmek için kararlılıkla çalışıyoruz.

Opak Boya is an authorized distributor of International Paint Protective Coatings, which is a brand owned by AkzoNobel, in Kocaeli. The company was established with a commitment to honesty, accuracy, and stability and has become a well-known and respected name in the paint industry. Name: Hale Environments
Description:
Hale have a passion for health environments, which is why we have tried, tested, and developed paint and surface coatings that provide around the clock protection against disease, bacteria, mould and virus.

Hale was established to revolutionise the standard of paint and surface coatings in a world where the built environment is key for healthy living.

Hale products have been manufactured in partnership with leading UK industry to defend the built environment against bacteria and safeguard its occupants.

HALE DEFENCE + 
Hale Defence + is a water based matt emulsion, for painting walls and ceilings and has been focussed with the end user in mind. 

Developed specifically to enhance the quality of the built environment we live and work in, by helping to reduce the spread of mould and bacteria. 

Hale Defence + provides the painted surface with enhanced defence against the growth of mould and bacteria (including MRSA, EColi, Mould and Coronavirus) by inhibiting its ability to become engrained within the building fabric.

Hale Defence + can be used on internal walls and ceilings and externally on facing brickwork.

HALE HYGIENE +
Hale Hygiene + is a high adhesion water-based paint & surface coating that can be applied to any hard surface and comes in a clear coat and range of colours.

Hale Hygiene + has been developed specifically to help reduce the spread of bacteria and virus by focusing on active surfaces that lead to the constant spread of bacteria, such as key touch points in the living environment.

Hale Hygiene + provides the surface coating with enhanced protection against mould and bacterial growth including EColi, Coronavirus, MRSA.

Hale Hygiene + can be used on the majority of hard surfaces including metal, plastic, glass and UPVC. It is extremely durable and ideal for hospitals, health centres, hotels, airports and train stations.

Name: Neuser GmbH
Description:
Die Neuser GmbH freut sich, die Eröffnung ihrer neuen Pulverbeschichtungsanlage in Ludwigsfelde bekannt zu geben. Auf einer Hallenfläche von über 3.000 m² werden sämtliche Arbeiten zur professionellen Beschichtung verschiedenster Teile durchgeführt.

Die fortschrittliche Jumbo-Coat-Pulverlackieranlage ist speziell für große Teile mit Abmessungen bis zu 6,5 x 2,6 x 3,2 Metern und einem maximalen Gewicht von 2.000 Kilogramm ausgelegt. Dank flexibler Vorbehandlungsprozesse können sowohl Stahlteile entfettet und phosphatiert als auch Aluminiumteile entfettet, gebeizt und passiviert werden.

Für die Farbgebung steht eine umfangreiche Auswahl an Farben zur Verfügung, die den unterschiedlichsten Anforderungen gerecht wird. Diese Anforderungen werden in unserem firmeneigenen Prüflabor umfassend getestet.

Unsere Kundschaft umfasst namhafte Unternehmen aus der Automobilindustrie, Elektronikindustrie dem allgemeinen Industriebereich sowie dem Handwerk und Gewerbe. Wir bieten sowohl großformatige als auch kleinformatige Teile an und sind in der Lage, sowohl Großserien als auch Kleinserien effizient zu bedienen.

Nachhaltigkeit wird in unserer neuen Anlage großgeschrieben. Durch den Einsatz von Kraft-Wärme-Kopplungs-Anlagen (KWK) und die kaskadenförmige Nutzung der heißen Luft in den verschiedenen Anlagenbereichen wird Energie äußerst effizient genutzt. Ein Vakuumverdampfer reduziert die Abwassermengen und ermöglicht die Wiederverwendung des recycelten Wassers im Kreislauf.

Spezielle Teile werden an Einzelarbeitsplätzen bearbeitet, wodurch unser umfassendes Leistungsportfolio ergänzt wird. Die Anlage im Gewerbegebiet Genshagen in Ludwigsfelde ist hervorragend über die Autobahnen A10 und A101 erreichbar.

Wir laden Sie herzlich ein, unseren modernen und vielseitigen Betrieb kennenzulernen. Wir bieten Ihnen eine schnelle und flexible Bearbeitung Ihrer Aufträge. Für weitere Informationen stehen wir Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung.

Name: ZBS BOYA VE KİMYA SAN. TİC. A.Ş.
Description:
www.zbsmarket.com online satış sitemiz üzerinden, Türkiye'de ilk defa, fabrikasından tüketicisinin kapısına kadar, ücretsiz kargo ile boya satışı hizmetini başlatan, sadece Zemin Boyaları ve tamamlayıcı ürünler segmentinde imalat yaparak, bu alanda ihtisaslaşmış,   %100 yerli sermayeli ilk boya imalatçısıyız. ZBS (Zemin Boyama Sistemleri) Zeminlerde darbe dayanımı yüksek ve maximum su izolasyonu sağlayabilen, tamamlayıcı ürünler gamı ile ZBS markası adı altında üretim yapmaktadır. Türkiye'de "Zemin Boyası" ismi ile üretim yaparak, aynı isimle, TPE'den tescil almış, Avrupa Birliği kalite sertifikası olan, “CE” belgesine sahip, ilk boya imalatçısı olduğumuzdan gururla bahsedebiliriz.

2009 yılında , köklü sektör tecrübemiz, Yılpaz boya ve yalıtım malzemeleri ticaret ünvanı ile hayat bulmuştur. O yıllarda, küçük bir imalathanede, ağırlıklı olarak, su bazlı iç ve dış cephe boyaları üreten Firmamız, zamanla üretim modelini ve yapısını değiştirerek,  2013 yılında, kendi markası olan ZBS (Zemin Boyama Sistemleri) ile Zemin Boyaları kapsamında, Epoxy ve çok amaçlı zemin kaplama boyaları, zemin kaydırmaz boyaları, bordür boyaları, yol çizgi ve zemin işaretleme Boyaları, ısıya dayanıklı boya, fosforlu boya, endüstriyel boyalar ve özel amaçlı boyalar ürün gamı ile üretime başlamıştır. Zaman içinde, tüketicilerimizin ZBS markamıza ve kalitemize olan güven ve teveccühleri sayesinde, 2019 yılı itibari ile, şirketin sermaye yapısı genişletilerek, "ZBS Boya ve Kimya San.Tic. A.Ş" ticari ünvanını almıştır. Bugün, 300 adet renk seçeneği olan, 7 ayrı kategoride, 60 dan fazla ürün çeşidi ile Zemin Boyaları segmentinde imalat yaparak, Türkiye'nin her noktasındaki tüketicilerimizin kapılarına kadar, ücretsiz kargo ile hizmet vermeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Schilder Lelystad
Description:
Schilder Lelystad is uw betrouwbare partner voor professionele huis- en woning schilderdiensten in Lelystad en omgeving. Met vakmanschap, oog voor detail en een passie voor perfectie zorgen wij ervoor dat iedere woning er weer als nieuw uitziet. Of het nu gaat om een complete renovatie, onderhoudsschilderwerk of een frisse nieuwe uitstraling: wij leveren kwaliteit waar u jarenlang plezier van heeft.

Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in binnenschilderwerk en buitenschilderwerk voor woningen. Denk hierbij aan het schilderen van muren, plafonds, kozijnen, deuren, trappen en gevels. Wij werken uitsluitend met hoogwaardige verfproducten en moderne technieken, zodat het resultaat niet alleen mooi is, maar ook duurzaam en onderhoudsarm. Een goed geschilderd huis beschermt uw woning tegen weersinvloeden en verhoogt direct de waarde en uitstraling.

Bij Schilder Lelystad staat de klant centraal. Wij luisteren naar uw wensen, geven eerlijk advies over kleuren en afwerking en maken duidelijke afspraken vooraf. Transparantie, netheid en betrouwbaarheid zijn voor ons vanzelfsprekend. Tijdens het schilderwerk werken wij zorgvuldig en schoon, met respect voor uw woning en leefomgeving.

Of u nu een particuliere woningeigenaar bent die zijn huis wil laten opknappen of op zoek bent naar periodiek onderhoud om grotere kosten te voorkomen, bij Schilder Lelystad bent u aan het juiste adres. Wij combineren jarenlange ervaring met persoonlijke service en een scherp oog voor kwaliteit.

Bent u benieuwd wat wij voor uw woning kunnen betekenen? Bezoek onze website schilderlelystad.net en neem vrijblijvend contact met ons op. Samen zorgen we voor een perfect geschilderd huis waar u trots op kunt zijn.

Name: Corrocoat Caspian LLP
Description:
For over 50 years, Corrocoat has been offering cost-effective corrosion protection methods, anti-corrosion materials, and its expertise in the engineering restoration of various equipment. Corrocoat has proven experience in solving corrosion-related problems across the industry, operating on five continents from more than thirty locations worldwide.

Corrocoat Limited's subsidiary in Kazakhstan, Corrocoat Caspian LLP, was established in July 2012.

Today, a plant for the production of anti-corrosion coatings has been launched in Kazakhstan, as well as a repair shop for restoring damaged equipment and applying coatings.

The innovative polymer materials produced in Kazakhstan are currently unrivalled in the CIS countries and are composite materials — industrial coatings and paints based on epoxy resins, polyesters and esters with the addition of fillers made from so-called “glass flakes” (microscopic flakes of corrosion-resistant glass reduced to a size of several submicrons), which allows equipment to be restored at a cost less than or equal to the cost of replacing it with new equipment, in many cases offering the best service life, protecting critical structures from corrosion “attacks” by reducing the frequency and volume of repair and restoration work, maintenance, or complete replacement of equipment.

Corrocoat Caspian offers a comprehensive corrosion protection package using advanced coating technology and providing coating application services, as well as restoration of severely damaged equipment.

Name: Rainbow Industrial Coating Solutions
Description:
Rainbow Coatings is India’s trusted name in industrial surface protection. We specialize in fire-rated coatings, epoxy flooring, vermiculite systems, and corrosion-resistant applications that help secure the backbone of the nation’s infrastructure.

With over 20 years of experience and more than 1,000 successful projects under our belt, we’ve worked across every major sector — from power plants and pipelines to airports, stadiums, and data centers. What sets us apart is not just the materials we use, but the trust we build and the safety we deliver.

At the Adani Thermal Power Plant in Dahanu, we executed fire protection systems engineered for high-heat performance. For the Biogas Plant in Indore, we applied specialized chemical-resistant coatings to shield operations from harsh industrial exposure. At Vadodara Airport, we played a key role in strengthening aviation infrastructure with precision coating solutions designed to withstand continuous use and environmental stress.

We may not always be seen, but our work is everywhere. From the floor beneath your feet to the steel above your head, Rainbow Coatings quietly powers India’s growth — protecting, preserving, and performing in ways that matter most.

Name: Paint Formulation Application
Description:
Small team but huge experience in web technology and coatings chemistry. We have decided to join these two technologies in one application and software as the true help for coating formulators. 
What is P.F.A?
P.F.A. stands for Paint Formulation Application and it is software which helps the formulators to create the architectural paints.

Those are the paints based on polymer emulsions in water that form films by the physical mechanism called coalescence.
However, you can use the application to formulate any 1K coating, pigmented or unpigmented, water based or solvent based.

Hoje, orgulhamo-nos de oferecer uma gama diversificada de tintas e soluções que atendem às necessidades dos nossos clientes, desde projetos domésticos a empreendimentos comerciais.

 Parcerias que Pintam Histórias de Sucesso 
Nossos clientes são mais do que transações; são parcerias valiosas que contribuíram para nossa trajetória. Colaboramos lado a lado, entendendo suas visões e transformando-as em realidade. Ao longo dos anos, temos testemunhado espaços ganharem vida, ambientes ganharem personalidade e sonhos ganharem cores vibrantes.

 Inspirando Futuros Coloridos: O Que Vem a Seguir 
Nosso compromisso com a excelência e a inovação só se intensifica com o tempo. Olhando para o futuro, continuaremos a explorar novas fronteiras, lançar tendências e atender às necessidades dinâmicas do mercado. Estamos animados para continuar a compartilhar nossa paixão por cores e a construir parcerias duradouras.

Junte-se a nós em nossa jornada contínua de inspiração, transformação e sucesso. Conecte-se para explorar o mundo de possibilidades que as tintas oferecem!

-Our Infrastructure
Our infrastructure is spread over 25000 sq. yard in greenfield area at Village : Dhamatvam, just 7 Km away from Ahmedabad Ring Road. -KROMA SOLUTION-
Kroma Paints systems reduce touch-ups by up to 50% with factory-proven adhesion.
Our 3-coat system gives 7–10 year durability, backed by ISO 12944 and salt spray testing.
Fast-drying, low-VOC coatings optimized for tight project schedules and remote applications
Engineered systems built for C3–C5 environments, salt spray tested to 1000+ hours.
Smooth finishes with long-lasting color retention and low chalking topcoats.
We offer on-site technical advisors and application support at every project stage.
Kroma’s controlled formulations ensure shade consistency across drums, batches & jobs.

Our clients choose us for consistent quality, reliable lead times, and finishes that perform where it counts. Whether it’s prototype support, small-batch precision, or large-scale production, we help your parts stand up to time, elements, and expectation.

Name: Chemol Sustainable Coatings
Description:
The Chemol Company is leading supplier of sustainable coatings, lubricants, and ingredients used in a variety of packaging, metalworking, textile, personal care and cosmetic products. Our unique chemistry utilizes safe, all-natural fats and oils as substitutes for petroleum-based products that are harmful to both humans and the environment.

Formed in 1959 as the chemical division of Carolina By-Products (a Greensboro, NC rendering and recycling company), our early products consisted of biodegradable and saponifiable compounds used as lubricants and plasticizers. In the late 1960’s, we began producing methyl esters for use in metalworking fluids.

Over the years, Chemol added a belt flaker and prilling tower to provide products in solid form. We also developed new hydrogenated products, fatty acid esters, and other specialty oleochemicals such as canola oil, fish oil, poultry grease, corn oil and jojoba to expand into personal care products, animal nutrition, leather processing, and agriculture. Just before being acquired by The Seydel Companies in 1996, we produced the first commercial volumes of biodiesel from soybean oil.

Since then, Chemol has led additional advances in global efforts to reduce dependence on petroleum through the use of our proprietary bio-products. For example, we are a leading developer and supplier of paper coatings that replace paraffin wax in corrugated board. Using our bio-wax coatings instead of paraffin wax, results in products that are fully recyclable while providing similar moisture barrier and strength performance. Adoption of our products by the corrugating industry has kept millions of boxes from reaching landfills every year!

Today, Chemol remains a trusted supplier and subject matter expert for oleochemicals and other bio-products.

Name: Comune Metal Tech Industries
Description:
Comune Metal Tech Industries will capitalize on this opportunity and develop anti-corrosion and anti-fouling coatings that will meet the evolving needs of industries seeking effective corrosion prevention solutions. The Company will offer an innovative ultra-thin anti-corrosion coating solution, developed through a modified sol-gel method, that will be applied through spray paint, designed to provide exceptional protection to metal surfaces. With very high scalability, the coatings can be efficiently applied to large-scale projects, enabling cost-effective and time-efficient applications. The coatings will also exhibit anti-biofouling and anti-frost properties, preventing the accumulation of biological organisms and frost formation on metal surfaces. The innovative coating will use eco-friendly materials and techniques, ensuring a sustainable corrosion and fouling prevention approach. 

The Company’s solution will offer several advantages over conventional methods and effectively inhibit corrosion, extending the lifespan of metal surfaces and reducing maintenance costs. With its unique formulation, the company’s coating will form a robust bond with the metal substrate, ensuring long-term durability even under harsh conditions. The anti-corrosion and anti-fouling coating will be able to provide superior protection against moisture-induced corrosion as it has very low moisture permeability. This feature will ensure the longevity of metal structures and equipment, reducing maintenance costs and enhancing their operational lifespan. Additionally, the product will demonstrate exceptional stability under harsh conditions, making it suitable for use in demanding environments such as marine, industrial, and offshore applications. The nano-silica coating will be a promising alternative to conventional cleaning methods, providing a more efficient, environment-friendly, and safer solution for metal surface preparation and protection.

Name: PT KREASI SENTOSA ABADI
Description:
In 1966, Eka Santosa and Darmawan Putra Totong launched "Toko Tjat Sentosa," a modest paint store on Jakarta's Gajah Mada Street. Initially specializing in paints, their enterprise gradually diversified its offerings to include a wide array of building materials, responding to the growing market demand.

By 1970, the partnership expanded with the addition of Budyanto Totong and Totong Kurniawan, recognizing the potential for broader product distribution. This evolution laid the foundation for CSA, a company dedicated to distributing building materials. Over the years, the company's growth necessitated improved management, leading to the establishment of PT Catur Sentosa Adiprana in December 1983. Further innovation came in 1997 when Budyanto Totong introduced the pioneering concept of "One Stop Shopping" under the Mitra10 brand, catering to shifting consumer preferences and bolstering profitability. This culminated in the Company's public listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in December 2007, adhering to its core mission of trading self-produced goods.

PT KSA as Indonesia's appointed, trusted, & exclusive distributor for Sherwin Williams, Valspar, Sayerlack, Huarun Paint.

Name: Huitian Türkiye

AR-GE odaklı yaklaşımımız, basınca duyarlı yapıştırıcılar, termal arayüz malzemeleri ve çevre dostu bağlantı sistemlerinde devrim yaratıyor. Elektrikli araçlardan güneş panellerine, akıllı cihazlardan sürdürülebilir binalara kadar hafiflik, dayanıklılık ve enerji verimliliği sağlayan çözümlerimizle endüstrileri dönüştürüyoruz. Sürdürülebilirlik DNA'mızda var: Yeşil kimya, geri dönüştürülebilir malzemeler ve düşük karbonlu üretim süreçleriyle küresel çevre hedeflerine katkı sunuyoruz.

Otomotivde: Elektrikli ve geleneksel araçlar için daha güvenli, sessiz ve verimli tasarımlar mümkün kılan yapıştırıcılar.
Elektronikte: Ekranlar, yarı iletkenler ve giyilebilir teknolojiler için hassas bağlantı çözümleri.
Enerjide: Güneş modüllerinin verimliliğini artıran, rüzgâr türbini ömrünü uzatan malzemeler.
İnşaatta: Yeşil binalar ve altyapı projeleri için dayanıklı, hava koşullarına dirençli yapıştırıcı sistemleri.

Çin'deki son teknoloji tesislerimiz ve Türkiye'deki iştirakimiz de dahil olmak üzere küresel ağımızla, yerel hizmet anlayışını uluslararası kalite standartlarıyla birleştiriyoruz. Fortune 500 şirketlerinden start-up'lara kadar tüm paydaşlarla iş birliği yaparak, malzeme inovasyonuyla daha akıllı ve temiz bir gelecek inşa ediyoruz.

Name: Technology Applications Group, Inc.
Description:
Leaders in magnesium surface protection.  Inventors of the Tagnite anodize coating. 

Technology Applications Group, Inc. (TAG) developed the Tagnite coating for a simple reason: existing magnesium coatings were inadequate for the demanding environments in which the metal was being used. They lacked inherent corrosion resistance and, due to the chemicals employed, were environmentally hazardous.

The major property absent in the other magnesium coatings is corrosion resistance. Prior to the development of Tagnite, Chrome Manganese and Dow 7 provided almost no measurable corrosion resistance. Studies had ranked HAE and Dow 17, Chrome Manganese and Dow 7 as providing the best corrosion resistance. However, HAE and Dow 17 provided only a limited number of hours corrosion resistance protection when exposed to salt spray (ASTM B117 5%).

Environmental concerns were another key issue with other magnesium coatings. Most magnesium coatings (Dow 17, Dow 7, and Chrome Manganese) contain Chromium (VI), a carcinogen that is a major health hazard. At the time these coatings were developed, the health risks associated with Chromium (VI) were unknown.

With these issues to address, TAG set out to develop a coating which would provide superior corrosion resistance and be environmentally acceptable. The Tagnite coating has unmatched abrasion resistance and unequaled coating uniformity and is an excellent base for paint. We are proud of our coating technology and pleased to say it is being used by major aerospace companies

Name: Niltone Powder Coating Industries
Description:
The Biggest Automatic Powder Coating Plant of Gujarat

Niltone Coating Industries is a professionally managed, world-class aluminium powder coating facility engineered for high-volume, precision-driven manufacturing environments.

Operating from a 2 lakh sq. ft. purpose-built plant, Niltone delivers consistent, predictable and scalable coating outcomes for aluminium components used in architectural, infrastructure and industrial applications.
Our infrastructure is designed around process discipline and repeatability, integrating:

• Automated 7-Tank chemical pre-treatment line
• Swiss GEMA 10-auto gun powder coating system
• Manual precision coating for complex profiles
• Temperature-controlled curing ovens
• In-house QA/QC laboratory aligned with BIS and global standards

Each project follows a documented, audit-ready workflow:
Material Receiving → Pre-Treatment → Powder Coating → Curing → Quality Testing → Dispatch.

No shortcuts. No assumptions. Only controlled execution.
Niltone is capable of handling up to 30 tonnes per day and single-piece aluminium profiles up to 30 feet, allowing customers to execute large projects through a single, reliable coating partner.

Our in-house laboratory conducts critical tests, including:
• Micron thickness measurement
• Impact resistance
• Bend and adhesion tests
• Surface hardness checks
• Salt spray corrosion testing

We work exclusively with globally approved powder brands such as AkzoNobel, Jotun, Asian Paints and Pulver, ensuring long-term colour stability, weather resistance and coating life of up to 15–25 years.
Niltone partners with aluminium extrusion plants, facade and elevation companies, builders, PMCs, architects and organised manufacturers who require zero shade variation, minimal rework, reliable dispatch cycles and a vendor they can scale with.

Niltone stands for process, performance and partnership — delivering aluminium finishing at an enterprise level.

Name: Keystone Tape & Supply, Inc.
Description:
Keystone Tape and Supply, Inc. is a family owned and operated adhesive tape and packaging supplies business located in Anaheim, California. In 1996, after years working in the tape industry, Chad McWilliams started the company with his wife, Rory in their garage at their home in Placentia, California. They incorporated the company and relocated to Anaheim in 1999. Their sons Brett and Kerry now oversee the day-to-day operations of the business.

During the early days, Keystone Tape & Supply was primarily a wholesale operation of pressure sensitive tapes and films. TiCleanZ

Name: COLORIFICIO VR
Description:
Da oltre quarant’anni Colorificio VR distribuisce e commercializza prodotti e servizi legati al mondo delle vernici e delle pitture professionali con vendita all'ingrosso e al dettaglio, fornendo consulenza e assistenza.
Ha inoltre allargato recentemente il proprio campo di competenza al settore dell’edilizia leggera.
 
È una storia di fedeltà quella del Colorificio, iniziata nel lontano 1979 da un’idea di papà Valerio Olmi e dal primo socio Roberto (da qui il nome “VR”). Il nuovo Colorificio VR a Domodossola vanta ben 1200 mq² di esposizione e rappresenta il frutto di sacrifici, coraggio, passione e professionalità della famiglia Olmi. Lo store ha oltre quarant’anni di attività durante i quali la famiglia Olmi, composta anche da mamma Ombretta Molteni - il cui supporto è stato fondamentale - si è distinta come protagonista del mercato del colore e delle vernici in Ossola, nel VCO e oltre confine, grazie a prodotti, materiali e attrezzature dei migliori marchi sia per la decorazione e la tinteggiatura che per la pulizia.
 
Si divide in due settori fondamentali: i prodotti destinati alla vendita all'ingrosso e quella al dettaglio. Sono due anime distinte ma per entrambe riusciamo ad accontentare tutti: abbiamo dei prodotti che per tutto il corso dell'anno, vengono scontati del 30 e anche del 40%. Al Colorificio VR è possibile trovare vernici di qualsiasi genere, spray, smalti, stucchi, solventi, idropitture murali, pennelli, prodotti per il trattamento del legno, prodotti igienizzanti, cornici, spatole e articoli per restauro e tanto altro.
 
Il vero motore del successo è la passione per il colore, presente anche nel logo che consiste in una goccia colorata. Altro punto di forza è la consulenza. Riproduciamo il colore identico a quello che si ha nelle pareti di casa dipinte magari dieci anni prima.

Name: Ti-Coating, Inc.
Description:
Improving Productivity Through Coatings

Ti-Coating, Inc. offers pioneering thin film coating technology, service and equipment, as well as hydrogen fluoride ion cleaning (HFIC). We continue to improve coating processes – achieving technological advancements that enable our clients to enjoy increased productivity, and allowing us to provide solutions for difficult metal removal and metal forming applications.

Physical Vapor Deposition Coatings

Ti-Coating’s physical vapor deposition (PVD) process utilizes the latest developments in technology to produce multi-layered and composite heat resistant coatings. These coatings provide our clients with tool life that far exceeds standard titanium nitride coatings. We go beyond just coating, working with clients to help solve their coating issues and arrive at efficient solutions.

Chemical Vapor Deposition Coatings

Chemical vapor deposition (CVD) coatings from Ti-Coating, Inc. provide significant production increases and cost savings on a variety of metal cutting and metal forming applications. Since the introduction of CVD coating technology to the carbide cutting tool industry over 40 years ago, Ti-Coating remains committed to developing and refining this technology in order to broaden the range of applications.

HFIC

Ti-Coating, Inc. offers the cost-effective method of hydrogen fluoride (HF) ion cleaning. Vapor phase hydrogen fluoride ion cleaning (HFIC) was introduced in 1985 as a method to clean gas turbine superalloys. This is a process step in preparation for the repair of cracks and other damage found in field-run high-temperature gas turbine engine components.

Name: Rubcoat BV

Bij Rubcoat B.V. combineren we kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en innovatie in beschermingssystemen voor daken, gevels, constructies en industriële toepassingen. Onze hoogwaardige coatings beschermen tegen veroudering, vocht, chemicaliën, UV en extreme weersomstandigheden. Zo bieden wij maximale bescherming, betrouwbaarheid en langdurige resultaten, nationaal en internationaal.



At Rubcoat B.V., we combine quality, durability, and innovation in protective systems for roofs, facades, structures, and industrial applications. Our premium coatings safeguard against aging, moisture, chemicals, UV, and extreme weather. We serve construction, industry, and agriculture, including the mushroom and fruit cultivation sector, creating gas- and vapor-tight environments worldwide for optimal production. Our eco-friendly coatings, including polyurea, rubber, and liquid plastics, form seamless, flexible layers that reduce maintenance. Rubcoat handles both supply and professional application, including surface assessment and restoration. We deliver maximum protection, reliability, and long-lasting results, nationally and internationally.

Automotive: Bonding interior trim, exterior panels, and electronic components.

Construction: Bonding wood, metal, concrete, and insulation materials.

Why Choose Thermabond?

Thermabond is dedicated to providing high-quality adhesive solutions that exceed expectations in performance and reliability. Discover the strength and reliability of Thermabond—where innovation bonds with quality.

Description:

Produse decorative: vopsele lavabile de interior și exterior, vopsele decorative speciale, grunduri, tencuieli decorative, baițuri, emailuri, lacuri, produse pentru termoizolații, diluanți, accesorii pentru vopsire.

Misiunea April 91 este să ofere Calitate, Diversitate și Performanță.

Pentru a veni în întâmpinarea clienților săi cu produse superioare calitativ la un raport excelent calitate – preț, în 2021, April 91 a inaugurat fabrica de Vopsele de la Prejmer, în care fabrică o gamă largă de produse decorative sub mărcile: Passiflora, April și Vektorr.

În Septembrie 2022, April 91 a deschis un centru modern de training pentru vopsitori, asigurând dotări, produse și knowhow, în vederea creșterii competențelor profesionale a vopsitorilor, a calității și performanței organizațiilor beneficiare.

April 91 își propune să creeze soluții personalizate oricărei situații legate de vopsire și pentru oricare suprafață. Iar acest lucru este posibil datorită rețelei de magazine proprii din țară: https://www.april91.ro/magazine

Il risultato in termini di aderenza è influenzato, oltre che da un'ottima preparazione della superficie, anche dallo spessore di adesivo applicato, che viene costantemente monitorato da un dispositivo professionale. -MARCATURA e INCISIONE LASER: Metodo di incisione/marcatura su diversi materiali (gomma, plastica, metallo...) mediante sistema laser. Si effettuano codici a barre, numeri di serie, scritte varie ecc. per un'ottima identificazione e tracciabilità nel tempo. Name: Pakistan Coating Association (PCA)
Description:
The Pakistan Coating Association (PCA) is the leading representative body for the coatings industry in Pakistan. We serve as the central platform for manufacturers, suppliers, and stakeholders involved in paints, varnishes, printing inks, adhesives, and related products across the nation.

Our core mission is to promote the growth, sustainability, and technical excellence of the Pakistani coatings sector. We work to facilitate an environment of collaboration, knowledge-sharing, and adherence to international quality and safety standards.

Under the visionary leadership of our Chairman, Ch Iftikhar Bashir, the PCA actively engages with government bodies to advocate for policies that support industry development, fair trade, and environmental responsibility. We focus on:

Advocacy: Representing the industry's interests to policymakers.

Networking: Creating forums for members to connect, share best practices, and address common challenges.

Education: Organizing seminars, workshops, and technical training to elevate industry standards and skills.

Promotion: Highlighting the vital role the coatings industry plays in the nation's infrastructure, manufacturing, and economy.

The PCA is committed to driving innovation and ensuring that the Pakistani coatings industry remains competitive and compliant on the global stage. Join us as we paint a brighter future for the coatings sector in Pakistan.

Name: Coatingbro (Coating Engineer & Innovator)
Description:
Als gepassioneerde coating engineer met jarenlange praktische ervaring in de industriële coatings en verfspuiterij, zet ik me in voor innovatie op het gebied van poedercoating en duurzame oplossingen. Met een sterke focus op het verminderen van de milieu-impact en het verbeteren van applicatie-efficiëntie werk ik nauw samen met fabrikanten en experts in de industrie om baanbrekende technieken te ontwikkelen, zoals low-bake poedercoatings en methoden voor het aanbrengen van coatings op nieuwe oppervlakken, waaronder kunststoffen en bestaande verflagen.

Ik geloof dat de toekomst van de coatingsindustrie ligt in het omarmen van nieuwe technologieën die oplosmiddelemissies verminderen, de veiligheid van medewerkers verbeteren en processen efficiënter maken. Mijn doel is om de industrie te transformeren en nieuwe markten te openen door te pleiten voor een bredere acceptatie van poedercoatings en UV-uithardende opties.

Laten we verbinden als je geïnteresseerd bent in samenwerking om de grenzen van coatingtechnologieën te verleggen, of als je op zoek bent naar manieren om je coatingprocessen duurzamer en efficiënter te maken.

ACI: Under the ACI brand, we offer pretreatment chemicals (phosphating chemicals) for mild steel, aluminum, galvanized iron. and cast iron.

Fusion Coat: Under the Fusion Coat brand, we offer thermoset powder for powder coating application. Our powder coating range covers epoxy-polyester (hybrid) system, pure polyester system, anti-microbial coating, and zinc-rich primer.

VISTA Spray Paint: Under the VISTA Spray Paint brand, we offer nitrocellulose-based aerosol touch-up spray paints.

A paint industry veteran with over 30 years of experience in the building industry, he founded NITCO PAINTS and is credited with many industry firsts. He also managed the successful acquisition of NITCO PAINTS by SHERWIN WILLIAMS, the World’s No. 2 ranked paint company. Post its acquisition, he leads the India leadership team in the new venture. He is also a Director with H & R JOHNSON India’s largest tile manufacturing company with which NEW WORLD PAINTS has a strategic alliance.

In the paints industry, a sale is often the end of a relationship. We believe that it is the start of one. With expertise that covers multiple substrates, applications, weather conditions to custom uses we have a range of solutions for all paint challenges. Our product portfolio is not the only thing that separates us. It is our ability to treat our customer’s business as our own and provide them with a high level of after sales services that differentiates us from all our peers. Service that stays even after the first can of paint is sold. Keeping this in mind, we’ve built an infrastructure that can meet your needs in real time.

Our manufacturing facility is a state-of-the-art plant, located just on the outskirts of Mumbai in the state of Maharashtra. The facility is well planned taking into consideration the current and projected demand for our products. It conforms to important quality and environmental manufacturing standards that exceed industry norms. In fact special emphasis has been given to manufacture 'green' products with minimum VOC. An R&D laboratory has also been set up to continuously evolve the product portfolio and keep it consumer relevant.

Name: Armani fam
Description:
شرکت آرمانی فام در روزهای آغازین سال۱۴۰۱ شمسی با جمعی از مدیران با تجربه بازار رنگ و پوشش ایران شروع به فعالیت نموده است. انتخاب محصول و تولیدکننده کیفی، شناخت نیازمندیهای بازار رنگ و پوشش، بهره گیری از کارشناسان زبده در مشاوره و فروش محصولات، تاسیس فروشگاه و انبارهای متعدد محصول جهت به حداقل رساندن زمان تحویل،خدمات پس از فروش، قیمت های رقابتی موجب شده است که در این زمان کوتاه مسیر زیادی را طی نموده و افتخار همکاری با بسیاری از مشتریان معظم بازارهای تحت تمرکز را پیدا کرده باشیم.

توفیق همکاری با شرکتهای رنگین زره و کانسای ایرانیان از بزرگترین شرکتهای تولیدکننده رنگ و پوشش ایران از افتخارت مجموعه آرمانی فام کرانه بوده که در ماههای ابتدایی تاسیس این شرکت به دست آمده است.

همکاری با شرکت کانسای ایرانیان

شرکت رنگ کانسای ایرانیان و شرکت آرمانی فام کرانه از ابتدای سال ۱۴۰۱ شمسی به منظور توسعه بازار رنگهای دریایی کانسای در ایران شروع به همکاری نموده و با تاسیس فروشگاه در بندرعباس و بوشهر و همچنین انبار مجهز در شهر تهران زمان تامین رنگ های دریایی را برای مشتریان عزیز به حداقل رسانده اند.

تلفیق کیفیت و تکنولوژی بالای رنگ کانسای، تجربه مشاوره فنی و فروش شرکت آرمانی فام ،فروشگاههای تخصصی، انبار محصول و همکاران زبده فنی موجب شده تا در این مدت کوتاه افتخار همکاری با اکثر شرکتهای دریایی کشور عزیزمان حاصل شود. شرکت هایی مانند: شرکت کشتیرانی جمهوری اسلامی ایران، سازمان بنادر و دریانوردی ، پایانه های نفتی ایران ، شرکت سکان اروند کیش ، موسسه مکین ، موسسه عمران ساحل ، مروارید پارسیان کیش ، کشتی سازی صدرا ، نیروی دریایی

همکاری با شرکت رنگین زره

شرکت صنعتی و شیمیایی رنگین زره برای توسعه فروش محصولات اپوکسی سنگ خود در استان اصفهان به عنوان یکی از قطب های بزرگ صنعت سنگ ایران اقدام به همکاری با شرکت آرمانی فام نموده و با اعطای نمایندگی انحصاری فروش محصولات اپوکسی سنگ به این شرکت در این استان قصد ارائه مناسب تر خدمات فروش و پس از فروش را به مشتریان عزیر داشته است.

شرکت آرمانی فام با در اختیار داشتن کارشناسان و مدیران با تجربه در صنعت رنگ و پوشش ایران و همچنین تاسیس دفتر و فروشگاه در استان اصفهان در صدد جلب بیشتر رضایت مشتریان عزیز در خصوص تامین به موقع کالا و مشاوره های فنی خواهد بود.

Description:
-EN-
We specialize in high-performance polymer systems and protective coatings for industrial applications. Our solutions are designed to prevent erosion, corrosion, chemical attack, and concrete degradation.

With our expertise in advanced polymer technologies, we help companies protect their assets and infrastructure, extend service life, and improve operational reliability.

As a distributor of Chemco International, we offer innovative and sustainable coating systems suitable for the most demanding environments — from offshore to process industries.

-NL-
Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in hoogperformante polymersystemen en beschermende coatings voor industriële toepassingen. Onze oplossingen zijn gericht op het voorkomen van erosie, corrosie, chemische aantasting en betondegradatie.

Met onze expertise in geavanceerde polymertechnologieën helpen we bedrijven hun installaties en infrastructuur te beschermen, de levensduur van hun assets te verlengen en hun operationele betrouwbaarheid te verhogen.

Name: Lixim
Description:
Yat ve teknelerin altında günümüzde kullanılan, anti-fouling etki gösteren halk dilinde zehirli boya olarak bilinen bakır ve çinko ağırlıklı yoğun bir boyadır. Bu boyaların en büyük problemi pahalı olmaları haricinde yüzeyde tutunma süresi ve etki gücüdür. Boya içerisinde dağınık halde bulunan biyositlerin bir süre sonra etkisini kaybetmesi sonucu etki gücü azalır ve etki gücü azalan boyada biyofilm oluşumu başlar. Bunun sonucunda etki süresi azalır. Bunlarda piyasada daha güçlü ve uzun süre yüzey tutunması sağlayacak bir boya ihtiyacını ortaya çıkarmaktadır.
Bu boya fırçası ile teknenin borda denilen alt kısmına sürülerek biyofilm oluşumunu belirli bir süre için durdurmak veya en aza indirme amacı ile kullanılmaktadır. Çalışmamızda bu boyanın anti-fouling etkisinin arttırılması ve etki süresinin uzatılması amaçlanmıştır. Deniz sektöründe olmayan tamamen biyobozunabilir çevreci bir boya üreterek, deniz sektörü içerisinde bulunan yat ve tekne sahipleri, tersane pazarına ulaşarak bu sektörün en büyük problemlerinden birine çözüm bulunacaktır.
Şu anda hali hazırda bulunan zehirli boyalarda biyosit içerikli olup genelde bakır(1)oksit biyosit olarak kullanılmaktadır. Bu biyositin farkı ise çevresindeki maddeleri kimyasal tepkime ile yok ettiğinden seçilmiştir. Fakat biz ürünümüzde biyosit yerine özel kapsülleri kullanarak çevreci yönümüzle öne çıkmayı planlamaktayız. Mevcut ürünlere göre bu getirdiğimiz yenilik hem piyasa hem de deniz boyaları teknolojisi yönünden geleceği tamamen değiştirebilecek bir ürün olduğuna inanıyoruz. Potansiyel müşterilerimiz olan yat ve tekne sahipleri, bu teknelerin vekaletine sahip kaptanlar en başta yer almak üzeri, tersaneler, boya satış bayileri, deniz ürünleri satan mağazalar yer almaktadır. Bunlar dahilinde müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına yönelik bir boya çıkarılacaktır.

Kjo moto që kemi ndjekur ndër vite, na ka nxitur  të sjellim dhe bojërat italiane dhe ekologjike të Di Donato S.p.a, një grup që prej më shumë se 40 vitesh ka shërbyer dhe shpërndarë produktet e veta me karakteristikat më të mira jo vetëm në Itali per edhe në mbi 21 vende në të gjithë botën. Në dyqanin tonë mund të gjeni bojëra akrilike dhe hidromat për ambientet e brendshme, bojëra kuarci për ambientet e jashtme (fasada) dhe bojëra dekorative përfshire dhe produktet ndihmëse e speciale për secilen prej tyre. Të gjitha produktet janë risi në treg, me larmishmëri ngjyrash dhe teksturash për t'iu përshtatur secilit klient në mënyrën më perfekte të mundshme.
Besimi se njerëzit po ndergjegjësohen cdo ditë e më shumë për ti konsideruar punimet për ambientet ku jetojnë, punojnë dhe argëtohen si një investim për një jetë më të mirë, na bën të punojmë akoma më fort në përmirësimin dhe përzgjedhjen e produkteve që ofrojmë.

Name: ATLANTIQUE ELECTRO PEINTURE
Description:
ATLANTIQUE ELECTRO PEINTURE, basée à Saint Herblain (44), rayonne sur tout le Grand Ouest avec une clientèle B to B très diversifiée.

Mais qu’est-ce que la peinture électrostatique sur site ?
Le principe consiste à projeter une peinture chargée en électricité négative, via un pistolet électrostatique, sur un produit à peindre, chargé d’électricité positive
Il permet aux clients de faire repeindre très qualitativement sur place leurs biens/bâtiments/outils de production en évitant toute perte d’exploitation 
Contrairement aux procédés classiques de projection de peinture, l’impact environnemental est excellent car il n’y a pas d’effet brouillard et la peinture se concentre sur le produit à peindre, même dans les endroits les plus compliqués à atteindre. 
Le bilan carbone et le coût de cette rénovation sont moindres pour le client car il n’y a ni dépose sur son site, ni transport AR chez le prestataire de peinture, ni repose sur son site

ATLANTIQUE ELECTRO PEINTURE redonne ainsi une nouvelle vie à des éléments métalliques, sur place, en intérieur ou en extérieur. Quoi de plus vertueux écologiquement parlant que de RENOVER DURABLEMENT AU LIEU DE REMPLACER ET JETER ?

Voici nos secteurs d'activité :
Grandes surfaces spécialisées ou pas (façades extérieures, plafonds, stations-services, stations de lavage, lignes de caisses de sortie, vitrines réfrigérées, rayonnages, parkings)
 Opérateurs de mobilier urbain publicitaire

Name: Bio-Ad
Description:
Bio-Ad is a 100% bio-based, compostable adhesive solution designed for paper labeling applications. Developed using upcycled potato peels and plant-based materials, it offers strong bonding performance while remaining water-soluble and fully recyclable. Unlike synthetic adhesives, Bio-Ad prevents contamination in cardboard recycling streams, enabling truly circular packaging systems.

By transforming agricultural waste into a high-performance, non-toxic adhesive, Bio-Ad advances the bioeconomy and supports EU Green Deal targets.

Backed by scientific validation and real-world prototyping, Bio-Ad is scalable, safe, and aligned with emerging regulatory and market demands.

We’re actively looking for experienced mentors in the fields of:
• Sustainable materials & adhesives
• Packaging innovation & recyclability
• Circular economy & bioeconomy entrepreneurship
• Scale-up of bioproducts (R&D → pilot → market)
• EU regulatory frameworks and eco-label certifications
• Business development in B2B or green manufacturing sectors

If you have expertise in any of these areas and are passionate about supporting circular, science-driven innovation, we’d love to connect with you.

Let’s stick with the planet.

Name: Onaltis ÇBS
Description:
Türkiye’nin güçlü boyası olmak hedefi ile 1953 de İstanbul’da inşaat boyaları fabrikasının kuruluşu ile yola çıkan ÇBS boya, yıllar içinde üretim ve ticaret hacmi, ürün kalitesi ve çeşitliliği ile en güven duyulan boya markalarından biri olmuştur.
ÇBS Boya ve Yapı Kimyasalları markası 2017 yılından bu yana, Onalt Group bünyesinde kurulan ÇBS Satış ve Pazarlama Ltd. ile başta Kuzey Kıbrıs ve tüm yurtdışı faaliyetlerini başarı ile sürdürmektedir.
Katıldığımız  İngiltere Birmingham Construction 2018, Almanya Köln Farbe 2019, Rusya Moskova Mosbuild 2019 ve Sırbistan Belgrad Sebbee 2019 fuarları ile ÇBS ve KKTC bayraklarını dalgalandırmış, gücünü tanıtmış, yurt dışı müşterileri ile buluşulmuştur  ve buluşulmaya devam edecektir.
ÇBS markası olarak; üstün ürün kalitesi ve  ülkemiz  şartlarına adapte edilmiş ürün performansları, ücretsiz yüzlerce renk seçenekleri, üstün hizmet anlayışı, hem satış hem de satış sonrası destekleriyle öncülük etmeye devam etmektedir.
2018 yılından günümüze 1350 profesyonel boya ustası, 350 karar verici mimar ve mühendisler ile ürün eğitim seminerlerinde bir araya geldik  ve gelmeye devam edeceğiz.
Sürekli gelişim, kalite, yenilikçilik ve eğitim vazgeçilmez prensiplerimizdir. Bu prensipler ile yola çıkarak doğru ürünleri, doğru yerde ve doğru şekilde uygulanmasına destek vermeye devam ediyoruz. İnsanların yaşadıkları mekanlarına  değer katmaya, çözümler üretmeye ve hayatlarına renk katmayı  sürdüreceğiz.

Name: Davlin Coatings
Description:
Welcome to Davlin Coatings – Pioneers in Elastomeric Coatings Since 1968!

 Website: www.davlincoatings.com |  Contact: (555) 123-4567 |  Location: Berkeley, CA

Established in 1968 in California, Davlin Coatings has been a trailblazer in manufacturing high-quality coatings for architectural and industrial use, covering millions of square feet globally.

 Innovation Through the Decades:
In 1975, we introduced Acrylastic, meeting industry demands for superior adhesion, toughness, elongation, and waterproofing. Today, nearly forty years later, Davlin leads in waterproof elastomeric coatings, consistently innovating.

 Versatility Beyond Boundaries:
Our product line spans specialized coatings for defense and naval applications, flame-retardant formulations for NASA, and the legendary 1971 Capseal asphalt sealer.

 Solving Commercial Challenges:
Davlin addresses roofing and wall waterproofing challenges for commercial buildings, using proven technology and a systematic approach to extend leak-free lives sustainably.

 Towards a Sustainable Future:
Davlin is a Cool Roof Rating Council member, with EPA Energy Star Certifications. Our Cool Roof system, featuring the Sunshield formula, is Energy Star certified, offering significant cooling cost savings over its 20-year lifespan.

Join Davlin Coatings as we redefine industry standards, providing unmatched quality, innovation, and sustainability in every coating. Partner with us for a future where protection meets perfection!  #DavlinCoatings #InnovationInProtection #ElastomericExcellence

Name: Málningarvinna Carls
Description:
Þjónustum fyrirtæki og einstaklinga í öllu sem viðkemur málun. Öflugur hópur, lausnamiðaður. Vinnum með fyrirtækjum í að finna hvaða lausnir henta best og tímasetningar þar sem stopptími getur skipt miklu máli. 

Helstu verkþættir okkar eru endurmálun úti og inni. Öflugir í sprautun klæðninga, bæði þak og veggi. Gólflökkun, vinnum með viðskiptavinum um hvaða kerfi hentar best. Allt frá litlum þvottahúsum yfir í stór iðnaðargólf. Nýbyggingar, gifsspörslun og sandspörslun. Bílastæðamálun tökum við einnig fyrir fyrirtæki og húsfélög.

Erum með okkar eigið sprautuverkstæði fyrir innréttingar, húsgögn, hurðir og hvað annað sem þarf að sprauta.

Söluaðili fyrir:
RennerItalia iðnaðarlökk fyrir sprautuiðnaðinn. Vatnsleysanleg Polyurethan lökk sem eru vistvænni en sem er á markaði í dag. Frábær viðloðun og gott að slípa.
AmonnColor, Eldvarnarmálning, bæði leysiefna og vatnsleysanleg. Alvöru glært lakk til, ekki skýjað.
Slippfélagið, öll almenn vara, áhersla á vatnsleysanlegar málningar fyrir stærri notendur. Ekki smásala á 1.l og 4 l. dósum.

Name: YTLAR
Description:
Powder coating of heat-sensitive (non-metal) construction materials for sustainable, circular, healthy and functional buildings.
'Yt' = Swedish for Surface. 'Lar' was the Roman deity that protected the home & its occupants. 

YTLAR is a new company, which is fully dedicated to becoming the leading player in Ultra Low-Bake ("ULB") powder coating for non-metallic, heat-sensitive  substrates ("HSS"), such as drywall/plasterboard, MDF, particleboard, OSB, composite and fibre cement panels & components, that are being used as building & construction materials. 

We offer powder coated drywall/plasterboard panels that we integrate into our own branded (patented) system walls or also as separate panels for use in other system wall designs. We also offer to coat your panels as a service, from our first factory in the Netherlands. We formulate & produce our own ULB powder coatings to ensure optimal fit for each substrate &  application. Together with partners in the value chain, we also design & assemble state-of-the-art (horizontal) application lines for high volume throughput that we offer to OEMs that are ready to scale-up powder coating in-house, with our help and under our license. 

The YTLAR founders and team members are leading experts in the fields of 1) Ultra Low Bake powder coating, 2) Powder application line design and 3) Building materials & distribution, with a long history in relevant industries.

Name: KOFARB LANKA (PVT) LTD
Description:
KOFATERM is a line of water-based paints and pastes that provide thermal reflective coatings capable of saving up to 40% of energy in both hot and cold climates. These products contain densely packed microspheres that reflect over 90% of thermal radiation conducted by electromagnetic waves in the full spectrum of visible light, including thermal (infrared) waves. These waves attempt to penetrate a partition, such as a wall or a roof, scattering inside it before ultimately passing through to the other side. KOFATERM coatings act as a barrier reflecting them away from the surface.
KOFATERM products are technologically advanced coatings with a precise and targeted formulation that emphasizes eco-friendliness and a low carbon footprint. Not only do our products help reduce energy demand and lower associated costs by up to 40% but also aid in lowering carbon dioxide emissions into the atmosphere along with heating and cooling devices’ thermal emissions by yet another 40%. Lastly, the use of our products will reduce the emission of airborne volatile dust and pollutants by an estimated 40%. Most importantly these effects are long-term because the coatings do not lose their efficiency over time and do not require more frequent renovation than today’s standard solutions. 
KOFATERM products are the perfect modern solutions that improve the quality of life while also caring for the ecosystem and the future of our planet.

Name: ARCTURUS TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS
Description:
SIMIX Multisurface Ceramic Clearcoat (SIMIX) is a nano-engineered ceramic coating that cures at room temperature to form an extremely hard, scratch and dirt-resistant coating.

SIMIX is formulated using nano-particles of Titanium Dioxide an environmentally friendly biocide which works with interior light or sunlight to kill germs.

Besides these germ-fighting nano-particles, SIMIX coatings have an extremely high pH of more than 12, which creates a hostile environment for germs as most germs cannot exist in high pH environments.

SIMIX eliminates regular burnishing, saving time and money. Burnishing also scatters germs into the atmosphere where these germs are breathed-in, cling to clothing, soles of shoes and to wheels of mobility equipment, spreading these germs throughout facilities.

SIMIX coating is a permanent coating that will never crack, chip, yellow or peel. Once applied, there is no need to strip SIMIX. Stripping is a costly, time-consuming process that interrupts normal operations. 

SIMIX coatings are rated as high traction by ANSI standard “Dynamic Coefficient of Friction” (DCOF) testing using a tribometer on a wet surface. Coatings that have a high friction coefficient are more resistant to slips and falls.

In health facility settings, one of the greatest benefits of applying antimicrobial coatings is that on treated surfaces, antibiotic use is not required, therefore greatly reducing the risk of emergence of antimicrobial resistance.  

For daily cleaning and sanitising, SIMIX has got the SIMIX Multisurface Cleaner/Degreaser, which can be used on most surfaces and provides antimicrobial protection on an on-going basis. The Multisurface Cleaner/Degreaser is safe for humans, animals and plants and can be safely used on most surfaces in clinical areas, as well as in the kitchen and laundry.

Name: INVACO(Innovative Coatings)
Description:
"INVACO" that specializes in the production and application of innovative industrial coatings to protect structures from corrosion and provide durable decorative properties for various industrial and civil engineering constructions and mechanisms. Since 2020, INVACO has been producing coating materials in Russia under its own brand, INVACO.

INVACO offers comprehensive and high-tech protection for metal and mineral surfaces (concrete, reinforced concrete, etc.) against industrial atmospheres and aggressive environments.

Applications of INVACO include:

Hydraulic and port facilities
Transportation infrastructure (bridges, interchanges, overpasses, tunnels, etc.)
Chemical industry
Metallurgy
Oil and gas complex
Mechanical engineering and rolling stock
Shipbuilding and ship repair
Various metal structures, and more.
INVACO has its own research and development center equipped with modern facilities and qualified specialists in chemistry and organic coating technology.

The INVACO product line is developed and manufactured based on real requirements for protective coatings in specific application areas. The selection of the protective system takes into account application conditions, the type of aggressive atmosphere or environment, and the required service life. The products are designed to work in a wide range of weather and climatic conditions typical for various regions of Russia.

Quality and consistent supply are priorities for INVACO. A unique multistage control process at all manufacturing stages, from raw material acceptance to coating system testing in the laboratory, ensures the stability and high quality of the produced goods.

Independent laboratories provide confirmation of the declared parameters of materials and coating systems, serving as evidence of product quality. Testing in independent laboratories is conducted to meet national and international standards, as well as industry-specific documents, before the application of INVACO coating systems

Aplicaciones y sectores
Nuestros sistemas están diseñados para una amplia variedad de usos en la industria del mueble y la madera:

Creemos que la belleza sin expresión es aburrida, por eso desarrollamos soluciones que no solo garantizan durabilidad y desempeño, sino que también reflejan diseño, estilo y sofisticación. Name: Coatings Radar
Description:
Coatings Radar is a software application designed for tablets and smartphones, specifically for conducting coating surveys in various industries such as marine, offshore, petrochemical, and wind energy.

It has been carefully developed by experts in the coating industry who recognise the significance of gathering exact and reliable data during a coating survey. 

Coatings Radar provides extensive support to the surveyor, offering assistance with both on-site and laboratory paint testing, as well as providing an in-depth understanding of industry standards and tests. 

Additionally, the software includes a collection of informative books and interactive tools, which provide users with access to additional and specialized information.


INNOVATION
The Coatings Radar tool is designed to guarantee the accurate and proper evaluation of Coating Surveys. By utilising the Coatings Radar App, users can ensure that the coating condition information delivered is precise, reliable, and uniform.

INTERACTIVE
The Coatings Radar App offers complete interactivity, enabling Coatings Surveyors to easily compare International Standards for assessing coating conditions. It provides clear, colourful, and concise visualisations of various factors like Rusting, Blistering, Flaking, and Cracking. This user-friendly app is accessible on both phones and tablets.

INTELLIGENCE
The Coating Radar App can illustrate the condition of coatings by comparing them to the Re or RI Scale. Additionally, it can compare the state of newly applied coatings with those that have become stained by rust after being submerged in seawater for a certain duration.


www.coatingsradar.com

Name: E-14 Polymers
Description:
E-14 Polymers, through innovative Sol-gel technology, is providing improved part and surface longevity.

(A “sol” is an extremely small solid particle—typically nanoparticle. Sol-gels are sols behaving as a liquid; vs. aero-sols which are sols behaving as a gas.) 

Commercialized in the 1960’s, sol-gels were used to improve scratch & corrosion resistance on automotive parts (metal bumpers, mirrors, etc.) by coating the surface and baking it at 500F+ for an hour. 

E-14 Polymers’ sol-gels consist of nanoparticles of Silicon Dioxide (SiO2 or Quartz), creating a thin layer of liquid quartz that provides an extremely hard and abrasion resistant surface. More importantly, E-14 Polymers include two important innovations:
•	Our sol-gels cure in ambient conditions—eliminating the high heat cure requirement of other sol gels.
•	Our sol-gels utilize silanes allow them to chemically bond to substrates for far superior adhesion vs. mechanical bonds.

E-14 Polymers' single component, low VOC offerings include:

E-14 Clear: protective crystal quartz layer that is highly abrasion, chemical, corrosion, oxidation, and UV resistant, and improves cleanability (easily removes graffiti, paints, markers [e.g., Sharpies], adhesives, stains, and gum) in gloss, satin, and matte sheens.

E-14 Prime: direct-to-substrate or inter-coat adhesion primer that removes the need to grind, sand, or profile substrates or coatings before top coating, provides strong bonding to hard-to-bond or low/no profile surfaces, and creates a molecular bridge by chemically fusing the substrate and topcoat regardless if surface is porous or non-porous.

E-14 Seal: fast-drying acrylic sealer designed to seal very porous substrates and capillaries before applying E-14 Clear, facilitating better coverage of E-14 Clear (2-3X coverage on porous surfaces) that also repels stains, water/moister, and mold from within the substrate.

Can E-14 Polymers help you? Please contact us to learn more!

Name: NPG - Ecological Paint Systems
Description:
1.	Nanopaint’s unique characteristics and advantages
Nanopaint’s paints are developed to provide revolutionary solutions to customers in the world of coating metals and buildings. 
Our paints are:
	Ecologically safe
	Harmless to users and to the environment
	Highly efficient
	Conveniently applicable
	Of the highest functional protection compared with other existing high functional protection paint

Our technology is water-based and utilizes unique ingredients and production process which provide our paints the flowing functional characteristics:
•	Rust conversion as well as protection against the formation of new rust for long periods of time. These are available for both exposed metal surfaces and as extra protection for the steel in reinforced concrete.
•	Very strong adhesion and long-lasting protection for various surfaces such as metal, rust, concrete, and wood.
•	Flexibility
•	High coverage capability
•	Clear white shade which can be easily covered by light shades
•	Anti-bacterial efficacy protection in the container as well as in the dry film after application.
After painting directly on metal and or directly on rust the paint reacts with both metal and rust. It thus creates a protection layer made of the metal, rust and itself which is strongly adhered to the painted surface, protects it, and prevent the creation of new rust and penetration of water. This process provides long-lasting protection to the treated surface.
After painting concrete surfaces, the Nanopaint strongly sticks to the surface and creates a protective environment which stops harming processes such as rust of the reinforcement steel, growing of molds and fungus on the treated walls which in turn prevents disintegration and deterioration of the surface for a long period of time.

Name: Goonagoon paint
Description:
شرکت رنگ گوناگون اصفهان در سال 1372 به همت جمعی از متخصصین صنعت رنگ و پوششهاي صنعتي در شهر اصفهان تاسیس شد. این شرکت تا سال 1400 پیوسته به تولید انواع رنگ و پوششهاي صنعتی و ساختمانی اشتغال داشت تا در این سال با تغییر مديريت، استراتژی آن به سمت تولید محصولات جدید از جمله پوششهاي مقاوم در برابر حريق با ارزش افزوده بالا تغییر نمود. در این راستا شرکت رنگ گوناگون اصفهان طی یک قرارداد رسمی با شرکت رفراسود ایتالیا (R.E.F.R.A. SUD)، که از تولید کنندگان قدیمی پوششهاي مقاوم در برابر حريق با نام تجاري فلاماستيك INTUCARB 099 در دنیا میباشد، به عنوان نماینده انحصاری توليد و توزيع اين كالا در ایران انتخاب شد.
در حال حاضر شركت رنگ گوناگون اصفهان به تولید انواع محصولات مقاوم در برابر حريق تحت لیسانس رفراسود ایتالیا اشتغال داشته و فرآوردههاي تولیدی آن در اختیار صنایع مختلف داخلی از جمله فولادسازی، خودروسازي، صنايع ذوب و ريختهگري و ديگر صنايع مهم و حياتي كشور قرار گرفته است.

Isfahan Goonagoon Paint Company was established in 1993 in Isfahan by a group of industrial paint and coatings experts. Until the year 2021, the company was continuously engaged in the production of various industrial and construction paints and coatings. However, with a change in management, the company's strategy shifted towards producing new products, including high-value fire retardant coatings. In this regard, Goonagoon Paint Company entered into an official agreement with R.E.F.R.A. SUD, an Italian manufacturer of fire-retardant coatings known as flamastic INTUCARB 099, to become the exclusive representative for the production and distribution of this product in Iran.

Currently, Isfahan Goonagoon Paint Company is involved in the production of various fire-retardant products under the license of R.E.F.R.A. SUD. Its manufactured products serve various industries, including steel, automotive, foundry and other important and vital sectors of the country.

Description:
Công ty cổ phần XVN (XPEL VIỆT NAM) – Đơn vị duy nhất nhập khẩu và phân phối các sản phẩm mang thương hiệu Xpel (USA) tại thị trường Việt Nam, bao gồm: Phim bảo vệ sơn (PPF), Phim cách nhiệt, Phủ Ceramic, ...

2.  Xpel khác biệt với các thương hiệu cùng ngành như thế nào?

- Xpel Việt Nam là đơn vị duy nhất cung cấp trọn bộ 3 sản phẩm với các công nghệ tiên tiến nhất trên Thế giới: Công nghệ màng bảo vệ tự phục hồi (PPF) và Công nghệ Nano Ceramic độc quyền (phim cách nhiệt và phủ Ceramic).
- Nguồn gốc xuất xứ rõ ràng, cam kết sản phẩm chính hãng.
- Các sản phẩm được Tổ chức Ung thư da toàn cầu và Bác sỹ nhãn khoa khuyên dùng.

3.  Xpel Việt Nam đem lại giá trị gì cho người tiêu dùng?

- Được sử dụng sản phẩm chính hãng, nhập khẩu trực tiếp từ USA.
- Xpel Việt Nam cam kết đem lại các sản phẩm thương hiệu hàng đầu tại USA với chất lượng thật, giá trị thật tới người dùng.
- Các sản phẩm Xpel giúp bảo vệ sức khỏe và giữ xe luôn mới mỗi ngày.
4.  Tầm nhìn

“Trở thành thương hiệu dẫn đầu về các sản phẩm bảo vệ và chăm sóc xe hơi cao cấp tại thị trường Việt Nam”.
Chúng tôi luôn nghiên cứu và tìm kiếm những sản phẩm chất lượng, phù hợp nhất với người tiêu dùng tại Việt Nam với chất lượng thât, giá trị thật nhằm mang đến quyền lợi tốt nhất cho khách hàng.

5.  Sứ mệnh
“Mang lại sản phẩm chất lượng thật, giá trị thật tới khách hàng, đối tác”.

6.  Giá trị cốt lõi
“Uy tín - Tận tâm - Chuyên nghiệp”
Tôn chỉ chữ Tín và chữ Tâm, Xpel Việt Nam luôn hướng đến các giá trị cốt lõi để xây dựng một tập thể vững mạnh, chuyên nghiệp và trên cả là sự hợp tác bền chặt với các đối tác và khách hàng.
