Name: Thai Do No - Gen Gen Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1994, we are an industrial coatings manufacturer specializing in wood, fiberglass, and advanced industrial surface applications. With decades of accumulated technical expertise, we develop and produce high-performance coating systems designed to meet the demanding requirements of both industrial and decorative environments.

Our operations are supported by research-driven technology and continuous coating development, enabling us to engineer solutions that balance durability, aesthetics, process efficiency, and long-term performance. Through a strategic joint venture with Japanese Gen Gen Corporation, a leading Japanese wood-coating company, we integrate Japanese precision, formulation expertise, and rigorous quality standards into our manufacturing and development processes.

We specialize in wood coating systems for architectural, furniture, and built-in applications, as well as fiberglass and composite coatings for industrial, marine, and specialty uses. Beyond standard product offerings, we work closely with clients to deliver tailored, application-specific coating solutions aligned with their materials, production methods, environmental conditions, and performance expectations.

Our approach extends beyond manufacturing alone. We provide technical consultation, application support, and process optimization to ensure coatings perform reliably in real-world use. By combining advanced R&D capabilities, disciplined manufacturing practices, and close collaboration with our partners and clients, we transform surface requirements into engineered coating solutions that deliver lasting value.

Driven by innovation, quality, and precision, we remain committed to advancing coating technologies that support modern industrial needs while elevating surface performance across diverse applications.

Name: Siam Coating Innovations
Description:
Siam Coating Innovations (SCI) is a joint venture between Rothenburg Group, producer of RTB paint in Thailand, and Siam Cement Group (SCG). We combine RTB’s coating expertise with SCG’s materials leadership to deliver paints and protective systems built for Thailand’s climate and the region’s growth.
SCI’s strength is rooted in decades of industrial coatings experience from Rothenburg subsidiaries Rothenburg FAR and Eco Coat, supplying protective and performance coatings to factories, infrastructure, and heavy industry. Building on this foundation, SCI also pioneers next-generation architectural solutions, becoming the first mover in Thailand to introduce silicate paint—a breakthrough beyond traditional acrylic, delivering superior durability, breathability, and long-term protection.
From homes and high-rises to factories and infrastructure, our portfolio covers architectural paints, waterproofing, primers, and industrial/protective systems. We focus on durability, easy application, and sustainability—including low-odor, low-VOC formulas and extended service life to reduce repaint cycles.
What sets us apart:
•	Joint-venture strength: RTB paint heritage + SCG distribution and innovation.
•	Industrial pedigree: Decades of coatings expertise via Rothenburg FAR & Eco Coat.
•	First in Thailand with silicate paint: Setting a new benchmark in quality and differentiation.
•	Tropical performance: Proven resistance to UV, humidity, and pollution.
•	Tech + service: Color labs, site technical support, and contractor training.
•	Sustainability: Greener formulas, reduced VOCs, longer-lasting systems.
Solutions: Interior & exterior paints • Silicate paints • Waterproofing systems • Industrial/protective coatings • Primers & sealers • Color tools & services
Customers: Homeowners, contractors, developers, architects, retailers, industrial owners
Coverage: Thailand (nationwide), with selective export via partner networks

Name: TFBE – Technology for a Better Environment
Description:
TFBE – Technologies for a Better Environment
We engineer advanced, high-performance elastomeric lining systems that restore, seal, and protect reinforced concrete in water and wastewater assets—built for PFAS-era demands and the realities of moving, cracking concrete.

The Problem
Traditional coatings treat concrete as static. Failures start at joints, transitions, and penetrations—leading to leaks, downtime, and costly non-compliance.

Our Solution
A patented, joint-integrated, multi-layer system that isolates and protects moving joints while maintaining a seamless, flexible, leak-tight barrier across the structure.

Engineered For
• Potable-water reservoirs & tanks • Wastewater treatment assets • Industrial containment • Critical municipal infrastructure

Performance Highlights
✓ Seamless, corrosion-resistant surface
✓ Crack-bridging flexibility for structural movement and unstable soils
✓ Specification-ready: engineered to help meet EPA/CWA requirements and align with ACI guidance
✓ Potable-water options per NSF/ANSI/CAN 61 project specifications
✓ Designed for long service life (performance data & warranty program available)

Who We Serve
Municipal water/wastewater authorities • EPC firms & civil consultants • Industrial facility operators • Asset managers

Why TFBE
Our patented system focuses on the failure point joints, delivering durable protection at transitions while preserving a continuous lining.

Founded by a team of professionals who are passionate about home improvement, UPVC Paint-It brings together a wealth of knowledge, experience, and a flair for creativity. With our expertise in UPVC paint technology and our dedication to customer satisfaction, we've successfully built a reputation for being the go-to destination for UPVC enhancement.

Name: ZNK+ Engineered Surfaces
Description: ZNK+ coating technology is based on mechanically applying a multi-metal zinc-rich powder mix to the surface of steel parts, including parts with recesses and complex features. Proprietary powders are combined with proprietary plating chemistry to generate relatively thin, dense layers compared with traditional mechanical zinc plating. The resulting surfaces are dense with very low porosity, and partially diffused into the steel substrate. The further application of sealers and primers ensure a high level of both galvanic and barrier protection, and relatively resistant to abrasion during subsequent installation and use.

Name: Eryıldız Boya ve Hırdavat
Description:
Eryıldız Hırdavat, 1996 yılından bu yana Samsun’da faaliyet gösteren köklü bir mobilya hırdavat firmasıdır. 
Kuruluş amacımız; mobilya imalatçıları ve nihai tüketicilerin ihtiyaç duyduğu tüm ürünleri bir arada bulabileceği, geniş ürün yelpazesiyle hizmet veren bir hırdavat market konsepti oluşturmaktır. Dolap kulplarından kapı kollarına, elektrikli el aletlerinden ankastre ürünlere kadar 20.000’e yakın ürün çeşidiyle siz değerli müşterilerimize hizmet sunmaktayız. 
Katıldığımız sektörel fuarlar ve aldığımız başarı ödülleri sayesinde, mobilya hırdavat sektöründe Türkiye genelinde önemli bir konuma ulaşmış bulunuyoruz. Hırdavat ürünleri alanında Türkiye’de sayılı firmalar arasında yer alıyor; 700’e yakın markanın ürünlerine mağazamızda yer veriyoruz. 
Bayiliğini yaptığımız başlıca markalar arasında Samet A.Ş., Kale Kilit, Doğanlar Kapı Kolları, Starax Mutfak Sistemleri, Teka Ankastre, Grundig, Silverline ve System Handles gibi sektörün önde gelen firmaları bulunmaktadır. 
Yıllara dayanan saha tecrübemizle, Karadeniz Bölgesi’nden başlayarak tüm Türkiye’ye kaliteli ve güvenilir hırdavat ürünleri sunmaya devam ediyoruz. Eryıldız Hırdavat olarak, müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak sektördeki liderliğimizi sürdürmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Description:
En Holika desarrollamos soluciones de pintura e impermeabilizantes para quienes construyen, remodelan o mantienen espacios que deben durar, lucir bien y resistir diversas condiciones climáticas y ambientales. 

Somos una empresa marca mexicana con mentalidad joven y experiencia heredada…

Fabricamos con el respaldo técnico de más de 60 años en la industria química, bajo normas NOM y estándares internacionales ASTM. Eso nos permite garantizar productos confiables desde el primer lote.

Nuestro enfoque parte de una idea clara: cada proyecto necesita un recubrimiento diseñado para su contexto. Por eso fabricamos desde líneas base listas para entregar hasta fórmulas desarrolladas a la medida, según los necesidades desafíos de cada cliente.

Por lo mismo, nuestra oferta abarca pinturas vinílicas vinil acrílicas y 100% acrílicas y acrílicas para interior y exterior, sistemas impermeabilizantes con ciclos de 3, 5 y 10 años, pintura para tráfico, selladores y soluciones específicas como contratipos o formulaciones especiales que respondan a humedad, radiación UV o exigencias térmicas.

Además de fabricar, acompañamos... 

Escuchamos a contratistas, desarrolladores y ferreterías para entender qué buscan, qué necesitan y cómo entregarlo con claridad, flexibilidad comercial y soporte técnico real. 

Nos involucramos desde la selección del producto hasta su aplicación en obra.

En Holika no solo vendemos pintura, sino que integramos soluciones que funcionan.

Si necesitas una solución específica, escríbenos.

Name: ScratchWizard
Description:
About Us
ScratchWizard is a division of Applied Colors LLC, established in 2007, and is one of the leading companies in the manufacture, distribution and sale of automotive coatings and related detailing products to retail customers in the U.S.

In 2006 our founder, Robert Keppel, created the Scratchout professional paint touch up kits from his home. Robert’s garage based startup quickly became successful and he soon began to supply these kits to many professional auto dealerships, auto detailing companies and mobile technicians all over the U.S. and Canada. Once the company added instructional videos to the website in 2011, sales skyrocketed. When people heard they could purchase scratch repair kits that result in auto body shop quality repairs without having to pay the high commercial prices, we received thousands of emails from consumers inquiring about Scratchout products. Thus, ScratchWizard came to be. We use the same process as the professionals but without the inflated prices. Over the years, we have expanded our products to aid in much more than scratch repairs such as: interior repairs, windshield chip repairs, headlight repairs, odor removal and many other auto detailing needs. More than a hundred thousand cars have been touched up with our ScratchWizard products.

ScratchWizard is proud to provide professional performance automotive spray and touch up paints for your vehicle’s interior and exterior repair requirements. We provide a 100% OEM Color Match Guarantee and our products are proudly made in the USA.

Name: Victocor
Description:
Victocor Technologies provides hot zinc galvanizing services in a thermodiffusion process for coating steels, iron castings, and stainless steel.

Galvanizing is done by heating to 450 degrees Celsius a rotating drum containing zinc powder and parts for coating. The process is also known by its German name Sherardizing.

In the galvanizing process, in addition to the outer zinc layer that is formed, the zinc penetrates to the depth of the metal, and the coating thickness is over 20 microns (it is also possible to reach 85 microns on request). Thermodiffusion galvanizing is especially suitable for components and parts with a screw and a complex engineering shape, and parts that cannot be hung for hot-dip galvanizing.

Galvanizing is carried out in accordance with the Israeli standard 4271 and in accordance with standards BS EN 13811 and ASTM A 1059. The process is approved by the Israeli Electric Company (NCS-239 specification, Chapter 8), Netivei Israel, and the Dead Sea Works.

Name: FitPlaster Hungary Kft.
Description:
A FitPlaster Hungary Kft.-t 2016-ban alapították, de története már több évtizedes. Tapasztalt és elismert festékipari szakemberek szövetkeztek a FIT márka létrehozására. Céljuk, hogy új, innovatív megoldásokkal csúcsminőségű, de megfizethető árú nemesvakolatokat és falfestékeket kínáljanak a magyar családoknak. 
Saját laborháttérrel, új alapanyagok folyamatos kutatásával és tesztelésével tudják biztosítani, hogy a nemzetközi multik termékeivel megegyező - olykor azt meghaladó - minőségben állítsák elő bevonataikat.
A FIT színezővakolat családba három féle vékonyvakolatot tartozik, így minden általánosan használt falazóanyagra kínálnak kopásálló, tartós vakolatot. A tiszta akrilát kötőanyagú lábazati vakolat extra ellenállóképességgel bír, míg az univerzális vakolatalapozó kiszolgálja a termékkör minden tagját. A FIT nemesvakolatok a hőszigetelés elengedhetetlen záróelemei.
A hőszigetelő rendszerek nemesvakolatai mellett nagy fedőképességű és kopásállóságú falfestékeket kínál a százhalombattai üzem. Kétféle kültéri homlokzatfesték közül választhatnak az építkezők. A hagyományos akril bevonaton kívül elérhető a legkorszerűbb szilikonos – lélegző – kültéri homlokzatfesték is. Beltérre kétféle falfestéket gyártanak. A FIT Prémium beltéri falfesték megfelelő alapfelület esetén már egy rétegben is kiválóan fed. Színét hosszan megtartja, kopásálló és nem utolsósorban könnyen feldolgozható, alkalmazása nem igényel különösebb szaktudást.
A FIT gyárban minden bevonat korszerű, környezetbarát receptúra alapján készül. A lazúrok és zománcfestékek vízbázisú anyagok. Nem ártalmasak az egészségre, nem robbanás és tűzveszélyesek és kevésbé terhelik a környezetet, mint az oldószeres festékek.
Keresse a hazai terméket! Használjon garantáltan megbízható, FIT nemesvakolatot és festékeket otthona szépítéséhez!

Verniciatura Burroni è oggi sinonimo di innovazione e qualità nel campo delle verniciature industriali, grazie a un’attenzione massima al risultato finale e a un aggiornamento costante di operatori e impianti.

Description:
Permaco Concrete Coatings transforms residential and commercial spaces with high-performance concrete coating systems that are built to last. Backed by nearly a decade of experience in the construction industry, we bring a meticulous approach to every project, whether it’s a two-car garage or a 90,000-square-foot industrial facility. Our systems are tailored using high-quality materials including polyaspartic, epoxy, and quartz blends, selected based on the concrete’s porosity and hardness after rigorous on-site testing.
From initial scratch and absorption tests to precision grinding and multi-layer application, every step is designed to maximize durability, adhesion, and visual appeal. We specialize in flake systems, metallic finishes, and fully customized blends, offering sample boards and consultative walkthroughs to help clients visualize the final look. Our team uses industry-leading tools and process controls to ensure long-lasting performance, with slip-resistant finishes and UV-stable coatings that won't yellow or wear down.
Permaco stands apart by blending construction expertise with elevated aesthetics, bringing premium garage, patio, driveway, and commercial floor coatings to Raleigh and its surrounding communities. Our work is backed by a commitment to quality, customer education, and finish integrity, because we believe every surface should perform beautifully and endure for years.

Name: Hsienpo Paint Enterprise Co.
Description:
先柏油漆廠有限公司成立於 1982 年，專注於研發符合台灣及全球多元氣候條件的高性能木器塗料。公司以「品質穩定、技術創新、環保永續」為核心經營理念，產品線涵蓋 NC、PU、UV 固化及水性塗料，廣泛應用於木器、塑膠、碳纖維及各類複合材料。

多年來，先柏與產業客戶維持緊密合作，技術應用由鞋材塗料逐步拓展至木百葉窗、家具及戶外建材等領域，能提供穩定量產支援與完整的表面處理解決方案。

為因應全球市場變化與客戶對關稅、交期及供應彈性的需求，先柏已於中國設立 廣東宏柏 與 山東昇柏 分公司，並規劃於越南成立生產與服務據點。透過跨區域製造與技術支援布局，有效分散關稅與地緣風險，協助客戶建構更具彈性的供應鏈體系，提供即時且全方位的專業服務。

研發團隊持續投入無苯配方與高固成分 UV 系統的開發，相關產品已通過 UL GREENGUARD 認證，有效降低對人體健康與環境的影響，展現公司對綠色製造與永續發展的長期承諾。

主要技術亮點：

木百葉窗塗裝工藝最佳化：累積超過 20 年量產與製程整合經驗。

碳纖維 UV 塗料製程創新：將自行車塗裝製程由七天流程大幅縮短至一天完成。

綠色水性木器塗料系統：通過 UL GREENGUARD 室內空氣品質標準認證。

Since 1982, Hsienpo Paint Enterprise Co., Ltd. has specialized in climate-resilient coating technologies for wood and composite materials.
Our portfolio includes NC, PU, UV-curable, and water-based systems engineered for furniture, blinds, carbon fiber, and industrial plastics. We partner with clients to deliver scalable solutions with excellent surface performance and long-term durability.
Our R&D team leads in developing low-VOC, solvent-free formulations — including high-solids UV systems — certified by UL GREENGUARD for indoor air safety and sustainability.

Key highlights:
• Over 20 years of expertise in wood blind coating optimization
• UV process innovation for carbon fiber, reducing cycle time from 7 days to 1
• Eco-friendly water-based wood coatings with UL GREENGUARD certification

Sa druge strane, VIVA COLOR design tim je osposobljen, kreativan i spreman da odmah pristupi rešavanju i najsloženijih zahteva za teksturom ili bojom određene završne obrade zidnih i podnih površina. Uspešno smo rešavali sve potrebe naših partnera i radovali smo se i najmanjem postignutom uspehu. Kvalitetom smo iz godine u godinu proširivali poslovanje i osvajali nova tržišta i dolazili do novih dekorativnih rešenja završne obrade zidnih i podnih površina.

Description:
Esperienza sul campo
Esperienza pluridecennale, specializzazione in lavori di verniciatura, tinteggiatura e decorazione.

Innovazione
Conosciamo tanto bene il nostro mestiere che abbiamo trovato le soluzioni alle sue problematiche.  

Brevetti
Creazione e brevettazione di strumenti capaci di migliorare le condizioni di lavoro sul campo. 

Restyle Innovation opera su Brescia e provincia, e grazie alla sua ampia rete di collaboratori è in grado di offrire una vasta gamma di servizi: da case e ambienti privati, fino ad ambienti pubblici e aziende, sia per lavori in interni che esterni. I servizi più utilizzati riguardano la tinteggiatura e la verniciatura, ma Restyle innovation è anche esperta in finiture decorative e in stucchi antichi, isolamenti a cappotto e lavorazione in cartongesso, applicazioni pietre e fornitura e posa di porte, parquet o pavimenti.
Proprio grazie a questa esperienza e al costante lavoro sul campo, Restyle Innovation è riuscita a cogliere le problematiche e gli utensili mancanti che avrebbero potuto aiutare a migliorare il rendimento e l’applicazione di alcuni lavori.

 

Da lì, l’idea di dedicarsi alla creazione e brevettazione di alcuni strumenti che potessero essere utili nelle diverse fasi di tinteggiatura, verniciatura o decorazione.
Questi prodotti sono pensati e disegnati per professionisti, ma sono adatti anche per lavori fai da te o di bricolage per migliorare e rendere più pratiche e veloci i lavori di imbiancatura o verniciatura.

Il primo prodotto brevettato è il Filtro Pittura Restyle, per tinteggiatura, verniciatura Bricolage e fai da te, che vi aiuterà a filtrare la pittura e a separarla dalla pittura secca, in maniera autonoma, agile e pratica.

Name: Drip Coatings
Description:
Drip Coatings was founded in 2023 with a mission to bring the value and technology of advanced ceramic coatings directly into the home. 

Ceramic coating has been in the automotive industry for quite some time. Being in the industry, we have been using the product ever since it came out due to how advanced and beneficial it was for automotive paint. Protecting the vehicle from minor scratches, acid, debris, and making the paint look extremely shiny for years to come. 

We eventually decided to try applying the coating on some of our home surfaces. Stainless steel, countertops, sinks, showers, and basically any solid surface in our house that we wanted to protect and make look good. Turns out, it worked. It worked exactly like how it works on auto paint. The main benefit we realized is how easy it is to cleanup messes that sat on top of the coating. A simple wet paper towel would remove the toughest greases, wine stains, and basically anything that dried to the surface. 

Now we want to offer the product to the public. An easy application that will protect your home for years to come!

In 2014, The Paint Brush Cover hit national TV on ABC’s hit show “Shark Tank.”

John presented the product to the Sharks and showed how it solved a universal problem for anyone who paints.
Lori Greiner immediately saw the potential and partnered with us, helping:
 

Scale production

Expand retail distribution

Bring The Paint Brush Cover to painters nationwide
 

We were later featured on “Beyond the Tank,” becoming one of only a small number of companies selected out of thousands who appeared on the show. Our products have since been showcased on:

ABC’s Shark Tank

Beyond the Tank

Good Morning America

Smithsonian Institute speaking engagements

Various industry publications and media outlets

Shark Tank gave us a platform. Innovation keeps us growing.
 

From One Idea to 30+ Products
Today, Likwid Concepts has grown from a single invention to a full family of 30+ painting solutions, including:

The Paint Brush Cover

The Artist Edition Paint Brush Cover

The Roller Cover

Paint trays, sundries, and other time-saving tools
 

Every product is designed with one goal in mind:
Make painting easier, cleaner, faster, and more enjoyable.
 

We proudly support:

Professional painters and contractors

DIY homeowners

Parents and kids doing arts & crafts

Teachers and hobbyists who love to create
 

Our Mission
At Likwid Concepts, we believe small innovations can make a big difference.
 

Our mission is to design tools that:

Save valuable time on every project

Extend the life of brushes, rollers, and other tools

Reduce waste and unnecessary cleanup

Make painting projects more fun and less stressful

Support creativity at every skill level
 

Whether you’re painting a living room, a classroom mural, or your next masterpiece, we’re here to help you work smarter, not harder.

Name: M.H. Inspection
Description:
Welcome to M.H. Inspection Ltd, an independent company that offers coating inspection and surveying services for domestic, industrial and commercial protective coating applications.

As a large percentage of protective coating failures occur, our company provides expert advice and inspection at every stage to ensure that our clients achieve their desired results and the best possible lifespan for their protective coating system.

Additionally, we offer Lead Paint Surveys, Lead Paint analysis, and site-specific reports and lead paint registers. Our team uses the latest Nitron X-ray fluorescence (XRF) analyzers that provide non-destructive, instant results across all sectors.

We also provide certificates from samples taken by either one of our assessors or sent to our office as a standalone exercise. Our staff are all qualified to at least NACE level 2 or ICORR level 2, and are provided with up-to-date training and support. They are all overseen by a NACE level 3 senior or ICORR level 3 senior inspector.

We are committed to providing a professional service to our clients, and with offices in Durham, Bristol, and Watford, we are within easy reach of any location throughout the U.K.
